Based on the memory, the project switched to Monaco Editor, so this old CodeMirror-based component is likely leftover and causing the build error.

1	import React, { useMemo, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
2	import { useCanvasStore } from '../../store/canvasStore';
3	import { useProjectStore } from '../../store/projectStore';

5	import { gridRowFromDisplayRow } from '../../utils/rowNumbering';
6	import KnitCodeEditor from './KnitCodeEditor';
7	import './text-editor.css';
8	
9	const LOCALES: Array<{ id: TextLocale; label: string }> = [
10	  { id: 'abbr', label: 'Abbr' },
11	  { id: 'en', label: 'EN' },
12	  { id: 'zh', label: '中文' },
13	];
14	
15	export const TextEditor: React.FC = () => {
16	  const {
17	    grids,
18	    currentMode,
19	    textLocale,
20	    setTextLocale,
21	    rowNumberDirection,
22	    setRowNumberDirection,
23	    applyTextToGrid,
24	    validationResults,
25	    resizeGrid,
26	  } = useProjectStore();
27	  const setHighlightedRow = useCanvasStore((state) => state.setHighlightedRow);
28	
29	  const [isEditMode, setIsEditMode] = useState(false);
30	  const [editText, setEditText] = useState('');
31	  const [originalText, setOriginalText] = useState('');
32	
33	  const currentGrid = grids[currentMode];
34	  const rowsInGrid = currentGrid.length;
35	  const colsInGrid = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
36	
37	  const instructionLines = useMemo(() => {
38	    const text = compileGridToText(currentGrid, { locale: textLocale, rowNumberDirection });
39	    return text
40	      .split('\n')
41	      .map((line) => line.trim())
42	      .filter(Boolean)
43	      .map((line) => {
44	        const rowNumber = Number(line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i)?.[1] ?? 0);
45	        return { line, rowNumber };
46	      });
47	  }, [currentGrid, rowNumberDirection, textLocale]);
48	
49	  const handleRowClick = (rowNumber: number) => {
50	    const gridRow = gridRowFromDisplayRow(rowNumber, rowsInGrid, rowNumberDirection);
51	    if (gridRow >= 0 && gridRow < rowsInGrid) {
52	      setHighlightedRow(gridRow);
53	    }
54	  };
55	
56	  // 进入编辑模式：用当前编译文本填充编辑器，并保存原始文本用于 diff
57	  const handleEnterEdit = useCallback(() => {
58	    const text = compileGridToText(currentGrid, { locale: textLocale, rowNumberDirection });
59	    setEditText(text);
60	    setOriginalText(text);
61	    setIsEditMode(true);
62	  }, [currentGrid, textLocale, rowNumberDirection]);
63	
64	  // 退出编辑模式
65	  const handleExitEdit = useCallback(() => {
66	    setIsEditMode(false);
67	  }, []);
68	
69	  // 应用文字到画布：逐行 diff，只发送变更的行
70	  const handleApply = useCallback(() => {
71	    const originalLines = originalText.split('\n').map((l) => l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
72	    const editedLines = editText.split('\n').map((l) => l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
73	
74	    // 建立原始行 Map: rowNumber → line text
75	    const originalMap = new Map<number, string>();
76	    for (const line of originalLines) {
77	      const match = line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i);
78	      if (match) originalMap.set(parseInt(match[1], 10), line);
79	    }
80	
81	    // 只保留变化的行或新增的行
82	    const changedLines: string[] = [];
83	    for (const line of editedLines) {
84	      const match = line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i);
85	      if (!match) continue;
86	      const rowNum = parseInt(match[1], 10);
87	      const origLine = originalMap.get(rowNum);
88	      if (!origLine || origLine !== line) {
89	        changedLines.push(line);
90	      }
91	    }
92	
93	    if (changedLines.length === 0) return;
94	
95	    applyTextToGrid(changedLines.join('\n'));
96	  }, [editText, originalText, applyTextToGrid]);
97	
98	  // 扩展画布
99	  const handleResize = useCallback(
100	    (newCols: number) => {
101	      resizeGrid(newCols);
102	    },
103	    [resizeGrid]
104	  );
105	
106	  return (
107	    <div className="text-editor-container instruction-map-panel">
108	      <div className="text-editor-header">
109	        <div>
110	          <span className="text-editor-kicker">Instruction Map</span>
111	          <h3>指令映射</h3>
112	        </div>
113	        {!isEditMode ? (
114	          <button type="button" className="edit-toggle-btn" onClick={handleEnterEdit}>
115	            编辑
116	          </button>
117	        ) : (
118	          <button type="button" className="edit-toggle-btn exit" onClick={handleExitEdit}>
119	            退出编辑
120	          </button>
121	        )}
122	      </div>
123	
124	      <div className="text-editor-toolbar" role="group" aria-label="行号方向">
125	        <button
126	          type="button"
127	          className={rowNumberDirection === 'row1_top' ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
128	          onClick={() => setRowNumberDirection('row1_top')}
129	        >
130	          Row 1 顶部
131	        </button>
132	        <button
133	          type="button"
134	          className={rowNumberDirection === 'row1_bottom' ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
135	          onClick={() => setRowNumberDirection('row1_bottom')}
136	        >
137	          Row 1 底部
138	        </button>
139	      </div>
140	
141	      <div className="text-editor-toolbar" role="group" aria-label="文本输出语言">
142	        {LOCALES.map((locale) => (
143	          <button
144	            key={locale.id}
145	            type="button"
146	            className={textLocale === locale.id ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
147	            onClick={() => setTextLocale(locale.id)}
148	          >
149	            {locale.label}
150	          </button>
151	        ))}
152	      </div>
153	
154	      {/* 编辑模式 */}
155	      {isEditMode ? (
156	        <div className="edit-mode-section">
157	          <KnitCodeEditor
158	            value={editText}
159	            onChange={setEditText}
160	            locale={textLocale}
161	          />
162	          <div className="edit-actions">
163	            <button type="button" className="apply-btn" onClick={handleApply}>
164	              应用到画布
165	            </button>
166	            <span className="edit-hint">格式：Row N: 数量 针法, 数量 针法.</span>
167	          </div>
168	
169	          {/* 校验结果 */}
170	          {validationResults.length > 0 && (
171	            <div className="validation-results">
172	              {validationResults.map((result, index) => (
173	                <div
174	                  key={index}
175	                  className={`validation-row ${result.validation.valid ? 'valid' : 'invalid'}`}
176	                >
177	                  <span className="validation-row-num">Row {result.rowNumber}</span>
178	                  <span className="validation-message">{result.validation.message}</span>
179	                  {result.validation.delta > 0 && (
180	                    <button
181	                      type="button"
182	                      className="resize-btn"
183	                      onClick={() => handleResize(colsInGrid + result.validation.delta)}
184	                    >
185	                      扩展到 {colsInGrid + result.validation.delta} 列
186	                    </button>
187	                  )}
188	                </div>
189	              ))}
190	            </div>
191	          )}
192	        </div>
193	      ) : (
194	        /* 只读映射模式（原有逻辑，完全不变） */
195	        <div className="instruction-map-list" aria-label="只读指令映射">
196	          {instructionLines.length ? (
197	            instructionLines.map(({ line, rowNumber }) => (
198	              <button
199	                key={`${rowNumber}-${line}`}
200	                type="button"
201	                className="instruction-map-row"
202	                onClick={() => handleRowClick(rowNumber)}
203	              >
204	                {line}
205	              </button>
206	            ))
207	          ) : (
208	            <p className="instruction-map-empty">画布中暂无可映射的针法。</p>
209	          )}
210	        </div>
211	      )}
212	    </div>
213	  );
214	};
215

#### Thinking

So the project has a `KnitCodeEditor.tsx` that uses CodeMirror 6, but the CodeMirror packages aren't installed. The project previously switched to Monaco Editor for the floating panel editor (in `KnittingEditor/`), but this `TextEditor` component still references the old CodeMirror-based editor.

I have two options:
1. Install the CodeMirror packages
2. Replace the CodeMirror editor with a simpler textarea or the Monaco editor

Looking at the context, the project already moved to Monaco for the floating editor. The `KnitCodeEditor` is used in the `TextEditor` component for edit mode. 

Since the project already has Monaco set up elsewhere, I should probably use that instead of adding CodeMirror as a new dependency. But if I want the quickest fix, I could just install the CodeMirror packages. Let me think about what makes the most sense given the project's direction.

#### Thinking

The user is asking about why "ssk" shows different symbols on odd/even rows, and sometimes shows "ssk" and sometimes "ssp". This is related to the knitting pattern design app's stitch registry and how it handles RS (Right Side) vs WS (Wrong Side) mapping.

Let me look at the stitch registry to understand how ssk and ssp are mapped.

1	export interface StitchDefinition {
2	  id: string; // 唯一标识符
3	  nameZh: string; // 中文名
4	  nameEn?: string; // 英文名
5	  abbrev?: string; // 自然语言指令缩写
6	  wsStitchId?: string; // 背面映射对应 (反面编织时的展示针法)
7	  svgPath: string; // 图标的相对路径 (public / svg-assets)
8	  span: {
9	    width: number; // 占用网格宽度
10	    height: number; // 占用网格高度
11	  };
12	  renderOffset: {
13	    x: number;
14	    y: number;
15	  };
16	  color: string; // 默认或者分类颜色
17	  category: "knit" | "crochet" | "other"; // 分类
18	}
19	
20	import { getSpanRule } from "./spanRules";
21

#### Thinking

Now I understand the issue. Looking at the stitch registry:

- `ssk` has `wsStitchId: "ssp"` — meaning on the wrong side (WS), ssk maps to ssp
- `ssp` has `wsStitchId: "ssk"` — meaning on the wrong side (WS), ssp maps to ssk

This is the RS/WS (Right Side / Wrong Side) mapping system. When you're knitting flat (back and forth), odd rows are typically the Right Side (RS) and even rows are the Wrong Side (WS). On the WS, the stitch appearance is mirrored, so:


- ssk (slip slip knit, a left-leaning decrease on RS) appears as ssp (slip slip purl) on WS
- ssp appears as ssk on WS

So the behavior I'm seeing is actually correct — the instruction map is showing the RS abbreviation on odd rows and the WS equivalent on even rows, which is exactly how flat knitting works.

Looking at the specific rows in the screenshot, Row 5 (odd) shows ssk while Row 6 (even) shows ssp, and this pattern continues through Rows 7 and 8. The system is automatically converting between RS and WS stitch abbreviations based on the row number, which is the expected behavior for flat knitting patterns.

这不是 bug，而是设计如此。在 `stitchRegistry.ts` 中，每个针法都有一个 `wsStitchId` 字段定义了它在反面的映射：

```
ssk → wsStitchId: "ssp"   （正面右上并针，反面显示为上针滑并）
ssp → wsStitchId: "ssk"   （反过来也一样）
```

编织中，奇数行通常是正面（RS），偶数行是反面（WS）。当你在正面织 `ssk`（slip slip knit，右倾减针），翻到反面看时，同样的操作在文字说明中应该写成 `ssp`（slip slip purl），因为从反面视角看针法方向是镜像的。

所以你在截图中看到的现象：
- Row 5（奇数行/正面）→ 显示 `ssk`
- Row 6（偶数行/反面）→ 显示 `ssp`
- Row 7（奇数行）→ 显示 `ssk`
- Row 8（偶数行）→ 显示 `ssp`

这是正确的 RS/WS 双向映射行为。如果你不希望偶数行自动转换为反面写法，需要告诉我，我可以调整编译逻辑。

3. Not all knitting stitches are visible in the stitch palette - only a few common ones are shown, which means multi-cell stitches (span 2-3 cells) haven't been tested

If users can't access all the stitches, they can't test the multi-cell span functionality, which is critical for the app's core purpose. Issue 1 (crochet mapping) is important for feature completeness but doesn't block current knitting functionality. Issue 2 (UI polish) is nice-to-have but not urgent. So the priority should be: fix the stitch palette visibility first, then tackle crochet mapping, then UI improvements. Let me check the stitch palette implementation to understand what's limiting visibility.

#### Tool: Agent

**Input:**

```json
{
  "description": "Explore stitch palette UI",
  "prompt": "In the project at D:\\aaa-llx\\MyKinttingDesign\\MyKinttingDesignApp, I need to understand:\n\n1. How the stitch palette/selector UI works - which component renders the stitch choices visible to users when drawing? Find the component that shows available stitches to pick from.\n\n2. How the stitch registry's `category` field (\"knit\" vs \"crochet\") is used to filter stitches in the UI.\n\n3. Look at the `compileGridToText` and `parseTextToGrid` functions in translator.ts to understand if there's any crochet-specific handling or if it's purely knitting-focused.\n\n4. Check the span rules in spanRules.ts to understand how multi-cell stitches are defined.\n\nBe thorough - search for components related to stitch selection, palette, toolbar, or drawing mode. Also check how the current mode (\"knit\" vs \"crochet\") affects what's shown.",
  "subagent_type": "Explore"
}
```

**Output:**

```json
Here is the complete analysis of the four areas you asked about:

---

## 1. Stitch Palette / Selector UI

There are two relevant pieces, but only one is actually active in the running app:

**Active: `renderSymbolRail()` in `App.tsx` (lines ~433-452)**
This is the real inline stitch picker users see while drawing. It renders a horizontal list of up to **6 symbols** from the `availableSymbols` array. Each symbol is a clickable button that, when picked, sets `activeSymbolId`, switches the interaction mode to `DRAW`, and the user can then click grid cells to place that stitch.

**Unused: `SymbolPanel.tsx`**
Located at `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\components\SymbolPanel\SymbolPanel.tsx`, this is a fully built standalone stitch palette component that groups symbols by category with section headers, span badges, and proper grid layout. However, it is **not imported or used anywhere in `App.tsx`** -- it exists as dead code or a future enhancement.

The `activeSymbolId` is stored as local state in `App.tsx` (not in any Zustand store). When a symbol is picked, `handleSymbolPick` sets it and switches `canvasStore` to `DRAW` mode. The `Grid` component (`Grid.tsx`) receives `activeSymbolId` as a prop and uses it during draw operations to look up the stitch definition from the registry and call `applyCellChange`.

---

## 2. Category Field Filtering

The filtering happens in `App.tsx` at lines ~183-186:

```typescript
const availableSymbols = useMemo<StitchDefinition[]>(
  () => Object.values(stitchRegistry).filter((definition) => definition.category === currentMode),
  [currentMode]
);
```

This is a **strict equality** check against `currentMode` (which is `"knit"` or `"crochet"`). The effect:

- When mode is `"knit"`: only stitches with `category: "knit"` appear (basic stitches, cables, decreases, increases, twists, etc.)
- When mode is `"crochet"`: only stitches with `category: "crochet"` appear (chain, single/double/treble crochet, post stitches, crochet specials, etc.)
- Stitches with `category: "other"` (if any exist) would **never appear** in either mode -- they are effectively hidden.

The mode toggle in the topbar switches between knit and crochet, which triggers `handleProjectModeChange` that calls `setMode` on the project store. This simultaneously switches which grid is active (each project has separate `grids.knit` and `grids.crochet` arrays) and which symbols are available in the rail.

---

## 3. Crochet-Specific Handling in translator.ts

**There is none.** Both `compileGridToText` and `parseTextToGrid` are completely **mode-agnostic**:

- **`compileGridToText`**: Iterates over grid rows, skips `isSpanChild` cells, looks up display labels via `stitchRegistry[stitchId]`, handles RS/WS reversal for even rows using `wsStitchId`, and aggregates consecutive identical stitches. It works identically regardless of whether the stitch IDs are knit or crochet -- it just reads whatever is in the grid.

- **`parseTextToGrid`**: Builds reverse lookup dictionaries (`abbrevToStitchId`, `labelToStitchId`) from **all** registry entries (both knit and crochet uniformly). Parses "Row N: ..." format text, looks up stitch IDs, and handles WS reversal for even rows. No branching on mode or category.

The translator treats the stitch registry as a flat dictionary. Whether a stitch is knit or crochet is irrelevant to the compilation/parsing logic. This means the text format is unified -- a crochet pattern and a knitting pattern use the same "Row N: st1 st2 st3" syntax.

---

## 4. Span Rules for Multi-Cell Stitches

Defined in `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\configs\spanRules.ts`:

**Key structural facts:**
- All span heights are **1** -- multi-cell only applies **horizontally** (width > 1)
- Single-cell stitches default to `{ width: 1, height: 1, source: "semantic" }`
- Multi-cell stitches use `{ source: "manual-override" }`

**Knit multi-cell stitches (cables and twists):**
| Stitch | Width | 
|--------|-------|
| c2f/c2b, twist-r/twist-l, twist-arch1-5, cable-complex1/2, cable-m1/m2, cable-b1-4, cr-bean, cr-fptr-cross/cr-bptr-cross | 2 |
| c3f/c3b, cable-triple | 3 |
| c4f/c4b | 4 |
| c5f/c5b | 5 |
| c6f/c6b | 6 |
| c8f/c8b | 8 |
| c10f/c10b | 10 |

**Crochet multi-cell stitches:**
| Stitch | Width |
|--------|-------|
| cr-xst | 2 |
| cr-pop, cr-puff, cr-cluster, cr-vst, cr-shell, cr-shell2 | 3 |
| cr-star, cr-suzette | 4 |
| cr-shell3 | 7 |

**How spans work at placement time** (in `projectStore.ts` `applyCellChange`): When a multi-cell stitch is placed, the root cell gets the full `CellData` (char, bg, svgPath, stitchId), and subsequent cells in the row are marked with `isSpanChild: true` and `parentPos: { row, col }` pointing back to the root. During rendering in `Grid.tsx`, `isSpanChild` cells are skipped, and the root cell renders an image spanning `spanWidth x spanHeight` cells. During text compilation in `translator.ts`, `isSpanChild` cells are also skipped to avoid duplicate output.

The `getSpanRule(id)` function returns the matching rule or defaults to `{ width: 1, height: 1, source: "semantic", note: "默认单格" }` for any stitch not explicitly listed.
```

542	export const getSpanRule = (id: string): SpanRule =>
543	  SPAN_RULES[id] ?? { width: 1, height: 1, source: "semantic", note: "默认单格" };

1	import { stitchRegistry } from '../configs/stitchRegistry';
2	import { CellData } from '../store/projectStore';
3	import { displayRowNumber, type RowNumberDirection } from './rowNumbering';
4	
5	export interface ValidationResult {
6	  valid: boolean;
7	  delta: number;
8	  message: string;
9	}
10	
11	export type TextLocale = 'abbr' | 'en' | 'zh';
12	
13	export interface CompileOptions {
14	  locale?: TextLocale;
15	  rowNumberDirection?: RowNumberDirection;
16	}
17	
18	export interface ParsedRowResult {
19	  rowNumber: number;
20	  cells: CellData[];
21	  validation: ValidationResult;
22	}
23	
24	/**
25	 * 提取连续相同的针法并聚合
26	 */
27	function aggregateStitches(instructions: string[]): string[] {
28	  const aggregated: string[] = [];
29	  let currentStitch = '';
30	  let count = 0;
31	
32	  const flush = () => {
33	    if (count > 0) {
34	      aggregated.push(count === 1 ? currentStitch : `${count} ${currentStitch}`);
35	    }
36	  };
37	
38	  for (const inst of instructions) {
39	    if (inst === currentStitch) {
40	      count++;
41	    } else {
42	      flush();
43	      currentStitch = inst;
44	      count = 1;
45	    }
46	  }
47	  flush();
48	
49	  return aggregated;
50	}
51	
52	function normalizeLabel(label: string) {
53	  return label.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ').toLowerCase();
54	}
55	
56	function resolveDisplayLabel(stitchId: string, locale: TextLocale, isEvenRow: boolean) {
57	  const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[stitchId];
58	  if (!stitchDef) {
59	    return stitchId;
60	  }
61	
62	  const resolvedId = isEvenRow && stitchDef.wsStitchId ? stitchDef.wsStitchId : stitchId;
63	  const resolvedDef = stitchRegistry[resolvedId] ?? stitchDef;
64	
65	  if (locale === 'zh') {
66	    return resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
67	  }
68	
69	  if (locale === 'en') {
70	    return resolvedDef.nameEn ?? stitchDef.nameEn ?? resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
71	  }
72	
73	  return resolvedDef.abbrev ?? stitchDef.abbrev ?? resolvedDef.nameEn ?? resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
74	}
75	
76	/**
77	 * 将二维网格编译为自然语言文字说明
78	 */
79	export function compileGridToText(grid: CellData[][], options: CompileOptions = {}): string {
80	  if (!grid || grid.length === 0) return '';
81	  
82	  const locale = options.locale ?? 'abbr';
83	  const rowNumberDirection = options.rowNumberDirection ?? 'row1_top';
84	  const textLines: string[] = [];
85	  const rows = grid.length;
86	  const cols = grid[0].length;
87	
88	  const rowIndices =
89	    rowNumberDirection === 'row1_top'
90	      ? Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) => row)
91	      : Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) => rows - 1 - row);
92	
93	  for (const r of rowIndices) {
94	    const rowNumber = displayRowNumber(r, rows, rowNumberDirection);
95	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
96	    
97	    // 奇数行（正面 RS）从右向左读图；偶数行（反面 WS）从左向右读图
98	    let colIndices = Array.from({ length: cols }, (_, i) => i);
99	    if (!isEvenRow) {
100	      colIndices = colIndices.reverse();
101	    }
102	    
103	    const rowRawInstructions: string[] = [];
104	    let hasStitchInRow = false;
105	    
106	    for (const c of colIndices) {
107	      const cell = grid[r][c];
108	      
109	      // 跳过没有对应源针法的格子（或是跨格的子节点。因为跨格的主节点通常是在左上或者自身）
110	      // TODO: 此处我们简化，只要是 isSpanChild 就跳过，让 root 单独报告
111	      if (cell.isSpanChild) continue;
112	      
113	      if (!cell.stitchId) {
114	        continue;
115	      }
116	      hasStitchInRow = true;
117	      
118	      const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId];
119	      if (!stitchDef) continue;
120	      
121	      const displayLabel = resolveDisplayLabel(cell.stitchId, locale, isEvenRow);
122	      
123	      // 针对部分多列针法，比如 c4f 需要占用的针数，这里仅简单视作一个整体指令
124	      rowRawInstructions.push(displayLabel);
125	    }
126	    
127	    if (hasStitchInRow) {
128	      const merged = aggregateStitches(rowRawInstructions);
129	      textLines.push(`Row ${rowNumber}: ${merged.join(', ')}.`);
130	    }
131	  }
132	  
133	  return textLines.join('\n');
134	}
135	
136	/**
137	 * 建立反向字典表，用于将简写映射回 stitchId
138	 */
139	const abbrevToStitchId: Record<string, string> = {};
140	const labelToStitchId: Record<string, string> = {};
141	Object.values(stitchRegistry).forEach(def => {
142	  // 这里我们直接映射为图解符号，因此都是正面视角 (RS) 的原始符号 ID
143	  if (def.abbrev) abbrevToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.abbrev)] = def.id;
144	  if (def.nameEn) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameEn)] = def.id;
145	  if (def.nameZh) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameZh)] = def.id;
146	});
147	
148	/**
149	 * 解析用户输入的自然语言，转换为对应这行的 Grid Cell 结构。
150	 * Demo 版核心链路：按行解析如 "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p"
151	 */
152	export function parseTextToGrid(text: string, cols: number): ParsedRowResult[] {
153	  const results: ParsedRowResult[] = [];
154	  const lines = text.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim() !== '');
155	  
156	  // Row 匹配正则，例如: "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p." / "Row 1: 3 knit, 2 purl."
157	  const rowRegex = /Row\s+(\d+):(.+)/i;
158	  
159	  for (const line of lines) {
160	    const rowMatch = line.match(rowRegex);
161	    if (!rowMatch) continue;
162	    
163	    const rowNumber = parseInt(rowMatch[1], 10);
164	    const instructionsPart = rowMatch[2];
165	    
166	    // 正面行（奇数行），从右往左布置
167	    // 反面行（偶数行），从左往右布置
168	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
169	    
170	    const cells: CellData[] = [];
171	    let stitchCount = 0; // 这行指令要求的总格子数
172	    
173	    const instructionSegments = instructionsPart.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
174	    for (const segment of instructionSegments) {
175	      const segmentMatch = segment.match(/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/);
176	      if (!segmentMatch) continue;
177	
178	      const count = segmentMatch[1] ? parseInt(segmentMatch[1], 10) : 1;
179	      const rawLabel = segmentMatch[2].trim();
180	      const normalizedLabel = normalizeLabel(rawLabel);
181	      
182	      // 查反向映射
183	      let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];
184	      
185	      if (!targetStitchId) {
186	        // 如果找不到，直接跳过或者记录个 warning，这里暂跳过
187	        continue;
188	      }
189	      
190	      // 反面行的输入需要反转回去以作为图解在界面上显示。由于图解永远是正面的。
191	      // 如果输入文本说反面(Even Row)要织 p，意味着我们在图纸上它是 k-knit。
192	      if (isEvenRow) {
193	        const potentialTargetStr = Object.values(stitchRegistry).find(
194	          def => def.wsStitchId === targetStitchId
195	        )?.id;
196	        if (potentialTargetStr) targetStitchId = potentialTargetStr;
197	      }
198	      
199	      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
200	        cells.push({
201	          char: '',
202	          stitchId: targetStitchId
203	        });
204	        
205	        // 简单计算一下针法跨格 (复杂多格针法例如 c4f 可能需要在渲染端另作补全，这里暂按占用首格算)
206	        stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
207	      }
208	    }
209	    
210	    // 柔性校验
211	    let delta = stitchCount - cols;
212	    let valid = delta <= 0; // 只要没超出列宽就算有效，或者你也可以设为严格等于
213	    let message = '✅ 解析成功';
214	    if (delta > 0) {
215	      message = `⚠️ 这行需要 ${stitchCount} 针，但画板宽度仅为 ${cols}，超出了 ${delta} 针。`;
216	    } else if (delta < 0) {
217	      message = `ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`;
218	    }
219	    
220	    results.push({
221	      rowNumber,
222	      cells,
223	      validation: { valid, delta, message }
224	    });
225	  }
226	  
227	  return results;
228	}
229	
```

1	import { useMemo } from "react";
2	import { StitchDefinition } from "../../configs/stitchRegistry";
3	import { getSpanRule } from "../../configs/spanRules";
4	import "./symbol-panel.css";
5	
6	export type SymbolPanelProps = {
7	  symbols: StitchDefinition[];
8	  selectedSymbolId?: string | null;
9	  onPick: (id: string, svgPath: string) => void;
10	};
11	
12	const SymbolPanel = ({ symbols, selectedSymbolId, onPick }: SymbolPanelProps) => {
13	  const grouped = useMemo(() => {
14	    const map = new Map<string, StitchDefinition[]>();
15	    symbols.forEach((symbol) => {
16	      const key = symbol.category || "other";
17	      if (!map.has(key)) {
18	        map.set(key, []);
19	      }
20	      map.get(key)?.push(symbol);
21	    });
22	    return map;
23	  }, [symbols]);
24	
25	  return (
26	    <div className="symbol-panel">
27	      {[...grouped.entries()].map(([category, list]) => (
28	        <div className="symbol-group" key={category}>
29	          <div className="symbol-group-title">{category === "knit" ? "棒针" : category === "crochet" ? "钩针" : category}</div>
30	          <div className="symbol-grid">
31	            {list.map((symbol) => {
32	              const span = getSpanRule(symbol.id);
33	              const isMultiCell = span.width > 1;
34	              return (
35	                <button
36	                  type="button"
37	                  key={symbol.id}
38	                  className={`symbol-button ${selectedSymbolId === symbol.id ? "selected" : ""} ${isMultiCell ? "multi-cell" : ""}`}
39	                  style={isMultiCell ? { gridColumn: `span ${Math.min(span.width, 4)}` } : undefined}
40	                  onClick={() => onPick(symbol.id, symbol.svgPath)}
41	                  title={`${symbol.nameZh}${isMultiCell ? ` (${span.width}格)` : ""}`}
42	                >
43	                  <div className="symbol-svg-preview">
44	                    <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
45	                  </div>
46	                  <span className="symbol-label">{symbol.nameZh}</span>
47	                  {isMultiCell && <span className="span-badge">{span.width}格</span>}
48	                </button>
49	              );
50	            })}
51	          </div>
52	        </div>
53	      ))}
54	    </div>
55	  );
56	};
57	
58	export default SymbolPanel;
59	
```

1	import { create } from 'zustand';
2	
3	export type InteractionMode = 'SELECT' | 'DRAW' | 'ERASE' | 'PAN';
4	
5	export interface ViewportSize {
6	  width: number;
7	  height: number;
8	}
9	
10	export interface GridCellPosition {
11	  row: number;
12	  col: number;
13	}
14	
15	export interface SelectedCellState {
16	  anchor: GridCellPosition;
17	  root: GridCellPosition;
18	}
19	
20	interface CanvasState {
21	  viewportOffset: { x: number; y: number };
22	  viewportSize: ViewportSize;
23	  scale: number;
24	  interactionMode: InteractionMode;
25	  previousMode: InteractionMode | null;
26	  selectedCell: SelectedCellState | null;
27	  hoverRoot: GridCellPosition | null;
28	  highlightedRow: number | null;
29	  
30	  setViewportOffset: (offset: { x: number; y: number }) => void;
31	  setViewportSize: (size: ViewportSize) => void;
32	  setScale: (scale: number) => void;
33	  setInteractionMode: (mode: InteractionMode) => void;
34	  selectCell: (selection: SelectedCellState) => void;
35	  clearSelection: () => void;
36	  setHoverRoot: (root: GridCellPosition | null) => void;
37	  setHighlightedRow: (row: number | null) => void;
38	  tempSwitchToPan: () => void;
39	  restorePreviousMode: () => void;
40	}
41	
42	export const useCanvasStore = create<CanvasState>((set) => ({
43	  viewportOffset: { x: 0, y: 0 },
44	  viewportSize: { width: 0, height: 0 },
45	  scale: 1,
46	  interactionMode: 'SELECT',
47	  previousMode: null,
48	  selectedCell: null,
49	  hoverRoot: null,
50	  highlightedRow: null,
51	  
52	  setViewportOffset: (offset) => set({ viewportOffset: offset }),
53	  setViewportSize: (size) => set({ viewportSize: size }),
54	  setScale: (scale) => set({ scale }),
55	  setInteractionMode: (mode) => set({ interactionMode: mode, previousMode: null }),
56	  selectCell: (selection) => set({ selectedCell: selection }),
57	  clearSelection: () => set({ selectedCell: null }),
58	  setHoverRoot: (root) => set({ hoverRoot: root }),
59	  setHighlightedRow: (row) => set({ highlightedRow: row }),
60	  tempSwitchToPan: () => set((state) => {
61	    if (state.interactionMode === 'PAN') {
62	      return state;
63	    }
64	
65	    return { previousMode: state.interactionMode, interactionMode: 'PAN' };
66	  }),
67	  restorePreviousMode: () => set((state) => {
68	    if (!state.previousMode) {
69	      return state;
70	    }
71	
72	    return {
73	      interactionMode: state.previousMode,
74	      previousMode: null,
75	    };
76	  }),
77	}));
78	
```

1	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';

13	
14	const DEFAULT_GRID_ROWS = 40;
15	const DEFAULT_GRID_COLS = 40;
16	
17	type ProjectMode = 'knit' | 'crochet';
18	type ExperiencePage = 'workspace' | 'library' | 'ai' | 'crochet' | 'export';
19	type ExportPreset = 'professional' | 'draft' | 'social';
20

22	  { id: 'SELECT', label: '选择', short: 'V' },
23	  { id: 'DRAW', label: '绘制', short: 'B' },
24	  { id: 'ERASE', label: '擦除', short: 'E' },
25	  { id: 'PAN', label: '抓手', short: 'H' },
26	];
27	
28	const PAGE_ITEMS: Array<{
29	  id: ExperiencePage;
30	  label: string;
31	  caption: string;
32	  mode?: ProjectMode;
33	}> = [
34	  { id: 'workspace', label: '棒针模式', caption: '主工坊', mode: 'knit' },
35	  { id: 'library', label: '针法库', caption: '搜索与筛选', mode: 'knit' },
36	  { id: 'ai', label: 'AI 图像转换', caption: '复古方案', mode: 'knit' },
37	  { id: 'crochet', label: '钩针模式', caption: '工作台', mode: 'crochet' },
38	  { id: 'export', label: '导出版权', caption: 'PDF 模板', mode: 'knit' },
39	];
40	
41	const LIBRARY_SHOWCASE = [
42	  { id: 'k-knit', title: '平针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 下针 1', tone: 'cream' },
43	  { id: 'p-purl', title: '反针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 上针 1', tone: 'graphite' },
44	  { id: 'c4f', title: '桂花针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 1 上 1 下', tone: 'rose' },
45	  { id: 'yo', title: '空加针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 全下针', tone: 'teal' },
46	  { id: 'ssk', title: '左并针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 2 并 1', tone: 'amber' },
47	  { id: 'c2b', title: '扭花', subtitle: '基础系列 | 交替', tone: 'forest' },
48	] as const;
49	
50	const clampScale = clampCanvasScale;
51	
52	const createPresetGrid = (mode: ProjectMode, rows: number, cols: number): CellData[][] => {
53	  const sequence =
54	    mode === 'knit'
55	      ? ['k-knit', 'p-purl', 'k-knit', 'yo', 'ssk', 'k2tog']
56	      : ['cr-sc', 'cr-ch', 'cr-dc', 'cr-hdc', 'cr-slst', 'cr-sc'];
57	
58	  return Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) =>
59	    Array.from({ length: cols }, (_, col) => {
60	      if ((row + col) % 5 === 0) {
61	        return {};
62	      }
63	
64	      const stitchId = sequence[(row * 3 + col) % sequence.length];
65	      const definition = stitchRegistry[stitchId];
66	
67	      return definition
68	        ? {
69	            char: definition.nameZh,
70	            svgPath: definition.svgPath,
71	            stitchId: definition.id,
72	            isSpanChild: false,
73	          }
74	        : {};
75	    })
76	  );
77	};
78	
79	function App() {
80	  useInteractionStateMachine();
81	
82	  const [activePage, setActivePage] = useState<ExperiencePage>('workspace');
83	  const [isNavbarCollapsed, setIsNavbarCollapsed] = useState(false);
84	  const [activeSymbolId, setActiveSymbolId] = useState<string | null>(null);
85	  const [fontsReady, setFontsReady] = useState(false);
86	  const [notice, setNotice] = useState('工坊已准备就绪，可继续编辑或进入 AI 解析流程。');
87	  const [libraryQuery, setLibraryQuery] = useState('基础');
88	  const [calculatorOpen, setCalculatorOpen] = useState(false);
89	  const [gaugeForm, setGaugeForm] = useState({
90	    stitchesPerTenCm: '22',
91	    rowsPerTenCm: '36',
92	    targetWidthCm: '50',
93	    targetHeightCm: '50',
94	  });
95	  const [exportPreset, setExportPreset] = useState<ExportPreset>('professional');
96	  const [watermarkText, setWatermarkText] = useState('参考自: [林间织者]');
97	  const [allowCommercial, setAllowCommercial] = useState(false);
98	  const [preventRedistribution, setPreventRedistribution] = useState(true);
99	  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);
100	  const [autosaveMs, setAutosaveMs] = useState<number>(() => {
101	    try {
102	      const raw = window.localStorage.getItem('kintting:autosaveDelayMs');
103	      const parsed = raw ? Number(raw) : NaN;
104	      return !Number.isNaN(parsed) && parsed > 0 ? parsed : 10000;
105	    } catch (e) {
106	      return 10000;
107	    }
108	  });
109	  const [isProjectPanelOpen, setIsProjectPanelOpen] = useState(false);
110	  const [projectPanelTab, setProjectPanelTab] = useState<'projects' | 'recycle'>('projects');
111	
112	  const projects = useProjectStore((state) => state.projects);
113	  const deletedProjects = useProjectStore((state) => state.deletedProjects);
114	  const activeProjectId = useProjectStore((state) => state.activeProjectId);
115	  const grids = useProjectStore((state) => state.grids);
116	  const currentMode = useProjectStore((state) => state.currentMode);
117	  const undoStack = useProjectStore((state) => state.undoStack);
118	  const redoStack = useProjectStore((state) => state.redoStack);
119	  const initGrid = useProjectStore((state) => state.initGrid);
120	  const createProject = useProjectStore((state) => state.createProject);
121	  const switchProject = useProjectStore((state) => state.switchProject);
122	  const deleteProject = useProjectStore((state) => state.deleteProject);
123	  const renameProject = useProjectStore((state) => state.renameProject);
124	  const duplicateProject = useProjectStore((state) => state.duplicateProject);
125	  const replaceModeGrid = useProjectStore((state) => state.replaceModeGrid);
126	  const setMode = useProjectStore((state) => state.setMode);
127	  const restoreProject = useProjectStore((state) => state.restoreProject);
128	  const deleteProjectPermanently = useProjectStore((state) => state.deleteProjectPermanently);
129	  const emptyRecycleBin = useProjectStore((state) => state.emptyRecycleBin);
130	  const purgeExpiredProjects = useProjectStore((state) => state.purgeExpiredProjects);
131	  const undo = useProjectStore((state) => state.undo);
132	  const redo = useProjectStore((state) => state.redo);
133	  const exportSnapshot = useProjectStore((state) => state.exportSnapshot);
134	
135	  const rowNumberDirection = useProjectStore((state) => state.rowNumberDirection);
136	
137	  const projectList = useMemo(
138	    () => Object.values(projects).sort((a, b) => b.lastModified - a.lastModified),
139	    [projects]
140	  );
141	  const deletedProjectList = useMemo(
142	    () => Object.values(deletedProjects).sort((a, b) => b.deletedAt! - a.deletedAt!),
143	    [deletedProjects]
144	  );
145	  const activeProject = activeProjectId ? projects[activeProjectId] : null;
146	
147	  const interactionMode = useCanvasStore((state) => state.interactionMode);
148	  const previousMode = useCanvasStore((state) => state.previousMode);
149	  const scale = useCanvasStore((state) => state.scale);
150	  const selectedCell = useCanvasStore((state) => state.selectedCell);
151	  const setInteractionMode = useCanvasStore((state) => state.setInteractionMode);
152	  const setScale = useCanvasStore((state) => state.setScale);
153	  const clearSelection = useCanvasStore((state) => state.clearSelection);
154	
155	  useEffect(() => {
156	    if (!grids.knit.length || !grids.crochet.length) {
157	      initGrid(DEFAULT_GRID_ROWS, DEFAULT_GRID_COLS);
158	    }
159	  }, [grids.crochet.length, grids.knit.length, initGrid]);
160	
161	  useEffect(() => {
162	    if (activePage === 'workspace') {
163	      purgeExpiredProjects();
164	    }
165	  }, [activePage, purgeExpiredProjects]);
166	
167	  useEffect(() => {
168	    const fontSet = (document as unknown as { fonts?: FontFaceSet }).fonts;
169	    if (!fontSet) {
170	      setFontsReady(true);
171	      return;
172	    }
173	
174	    const uniqueFamilies = Array.from(
175	      new Set(Object.values(stitchRegistry).map((definition) => definition.svgPath.split('/')[2] ?? 'StitchMasteryDash'))
176	    );
177	
178	    Promise.all(uniqueFamilies.map((name) => fontSet.load(`16px "${name}"`)))
179	      .then(() => setFontsReady(true))
180	      .catch(() => setFontsReady(true));
181	  }, []);
182	
183	  const availableSymbols = useMemo<StitchDefinition[]>(
184	    () => Object.values(stitchRegistry).filter((definition) => definition.category === currentMode),
185	    [currentMode]
186	  );
187	
188	  const activeSymbol = useMemo(
189	    () => availableSymbols.find((definition) => definition.id === activeSymbolId) ?? null,
190	    [activeSymbolId, availableSymbols]
191	  );
192	
193	  useEffect(() => {
194	    if (!availableSymbols.length) {
195	      setActiveSymbolId(null);
196	      return;
197	    }
198	
199	    if (!activeSymbolId || !availableSymbols.some((definition) => definition.id === activeSymbolId)) {
200	      setActiveSymbolId(availableSymbols[0].id);
201	    }
202	  }, [activeSymbolId, availableSymbols]);
203	
204	  const currentGrid = grids[currentMode];
205	  const gridRows = currentGrid.length;
206	  const gridCols = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
207	
208	  const filledCellCount = useMemo(
209	    () => currentGrid.flat().filter((cell) => cell.stitchId && !cell.isSpanChild).length,
210	    [currentGrid]
211	  );
212	
213	  const selectedPosition = selectedCell ? `${displayRowNumber(selectedCell.root.row, gridRows, rowNumberDirection)}, ${selectedCell.root.col + 1}` : '未选择';
214	  const projectCompletion = gridRows && gridCols ? Math.round((filledCellCount / (gridRows * gridCols)) * 100) : 0;
215	
216	  const selectedInfo = useMemo(() => {
217	    if (!selectedCell) {
218	      return null;
219	    }
220	
221	    const cell = currentGrid[selectedCell.root.row]?.[selectedCell.root.col];
222	    if (!cell?.stitchId) {
223	      return {
224	        title: '空单元格',
225	        detail: '可直接点击针法后进入绘制',
226	      };
227	    }
228	
229	    const definition = stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId];
230	    return {
231	      title: definition?.nameZh ?? cell.stitchId,
232	      detail: definition?.nameEn ?? '已放置到主画布。',
233	    };
234	  }, [currentGrid, selectedCell]);
235	
236	  const filteredLibraryCards = useMemo(
237	    () =>
238	      LIBRARY_SHOWCASE.filter((card) => {
239	        if (!libraryQuery.trim()) {
240	          return true;
241	        }
242	
243	        return `${card.title}${card.subtitle}`.includes(libraryQuery.trim());
244	      }),
245	    [libraryQuery]
246	  );
247	
248	  const handleProjectModeChange = (mode: ProjectMode) => {
249	    setMode(mode);
250	    clearSelection();
251	    setNotice(mode === 'knit' ? '已切换到棒针编辑空间。' : '已切换到钩针编辑空间。');
252	    if (mode === 'knit' && activePage === 'crochet') {
253	      setActivePage('workspace');
254	    }
255	    if (mode === 'crochet' && activePage === 'workspace') {
256	      setActivePage('crochet');
257	    }
258	  };
259	
260	
261	
262	  const handlePageChange = (page: ExperiencePage, mode?: ProjectMode) => {
263	    setActivePage(page);
264	    clearSelection();
265	    if (mode) {
266	      setMode(mode);
267	    }
268	
269	    const pageLabel = PAGE_ITEMS.find((item) => item.id === page)?.label ?? '当前页面';
270	    setNotice(`已进入 ${pageLabel}。`);
271	  };
272	
273	  const getProjectAgeLabel = (project: { lastModified: number }) => {
274	    const ms = Date.now() - project.lastModified;
275	    const days = Math.floor(ms / 86400000);
276	    return days <= 1 ? '1天内' : `${days}天前`;
277	  };
278	
279	  const isProjectWarning = (project: { id?: string; lastModified: number }, activeId: string | null) => {
280	    if (project.id && project.id === activeId) return false;
281	    const ms = Date.now() - project.lastModified;
282	    return ms >= 7 * 86400000 && ms < 10 * 86400000;
283	  };
284	
285	  const expiringProjectsCount = useMemo(() => {
286	    return projectList.filter((p) => isProjectWarning(p, activeProjectId)).length;
287	  }, [projectList, activeProjectId]);
288	
289	
290	  const handleSymbolPick = (symbolId: string, symbolMode: ProjectMode = currentMode) => {
291	    if (symbolMode !== currentMode) {
292	      setMode(symbolMode);
293	    }
294	    setActiveSymbolId(symbolId);
295	    setInteractionMode('DRAW');
296	    setNotice(`已选择 ${stitchRegistry[symbolId]?.nameZh ?? symbolId}，可直接在画布中落针。`);
297	  };
298	
299	  const updateScale = (value: number) => {
300	    setScale(Number(clampScale(value).toFixed(2)));
301	  };
302	
303	  const handleGaugeFieldChange = (key: keyof typeof gaugeForm, value: string) => {
304	    setGaugeForm((prev) => ({
305	      ...prev,
306	      [key]: value.replace(/\D/g, ''),
307	    }));
308	  };
309	
310	  const parseGaugeValue = (value: string) => {
311	    const parsed = Number(value);
312	    return Number.isNaN(parsed) ? 0 : parsed;
313	  };
314	
315	  const gaugeTotals = useMemo(
316	    () => ({
317	      stitches: Math.max(0, Math.round((parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.stitchesPerTenCm) / 10) * parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.targetWidthCm))),
318	      rows: Math.max(0, Math.round((parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.rowsPerTenCm) / 10) * parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.targetHeightCm))),
319	    }),
320	    [gaugeForm]
321	  );
322	
323	  const applyGaugeToProject = () => {
324	    const nextCols = Math.max(12, gaugeTotals.stitches);
325	    const nextRows = Math.max(12, gaugeTotals.rows);
326	    initGrid(nextRows, nextCols);
327	    clearSelection();
328	    setCalculatorOpen(false);
329	    setNotice(`针数换算已应用，项目尺寸更新为 ${nextCols} 列 x ${nextRows} 行。`);
330	  };
331	
332	  const handleCreateProject = () => {
333	    const name = window.prompt('项目名称', `Project ${projectList.length + 1}`);
334	    if (!name?.trim()) {
335	      return;
336	    }
337	
338	    createProject(name.trim(), DEFAULT_GRID_ROWS, DEFAULT_GRID_COLS);
339	    clearSelection();
340	    setScale(1);
341	    setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
342	    setNotice(`已创建项目：${name.trim()}`);
343	  };
344	
345	  const handleRenameProject = () => {
346	    if (!activeProject) {
347	      return;
348	    }
349	
350	    const name = window.prompt('重命名项目', activeProject.name);
351	    if (!name?.trim()) {
352	      return;
353	    }
354	
355	    renameProject(activeProject.id, name.trim());
356	    setNotice(`项目已重命名为：${name.trim()}`);
357	  };
358	
359	  const handleDuplicateProject = () => {
360	    if (!activeProjectId) {
361	      return;
362	    }
363	
364	    const nextId = duplicateProject(activeProjectId);
365	    if (nextId) {
366	      clearSelection();
367	      setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
368	      setNotice('项目副本已创建。');
369	    }
370	  };
371	
372	  const handleDeleteProject = (id: string) => {
373	    const project = projects[id];
374	    if (!project || !window.confirm(`删除项目“${project.name}”？`)) {
375	      return;
376	    }
377	
378	    deleteProject(id);
379	    clearSelection();
380	    setNotice(`已删除项目：${project.name}`);
381	  };
382	
383	  const handleSwitchProject = (id: string) => {
384	    switchProject(id);
385	    clearSelection();
386	    setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
387	    setNotice(`已打开项目：${projects[id]?.name ?? id}`);
388	  };
389	
390	  const applyAiPresetToProject = () => {
391	    const knitPreset = createPresetGrid('knit', 32, 32);
392	    replaceModeGrid('knit', knitPreset);
393	    clearSelection();
394	    setScale(1);
395	    setInteractionMode('DRAW');
396	    setActiveSymbolId('c4f');
397	    setActivePage('workspace');
398	    setNotice('AI 纹样映射已应用到棒针工作区，可继续精修。');
399	  };
400	
401	  const confirmExport = async () => {
402	    if (isExporting) {
403	      return;
404	    }
405	
406	    const presetLabel =
407	      exportPreset === 'professional' ? '商用专业版' : exportPreset === 'draft' ? '交流草稿版' : '社交分享版';
408	    setNotice(`${presetLabel} 导出任务正在进行中，水印内容为“${watermarkText || '未设置'}”。`);
409	    setIsExporting(true);
410	
411	    try {
412	      const snapshot = exportSnapshot();
413	      const pdfBlob = await exportProjectAsPDF(snapshot, {
414	        watermarkText,
415	        scale: 1,
416	      });
417	      const url = URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob);
418	      const anchor = document.createElement('a');
419	      anchor.href = url;
420	      anchor.download = 'mykintting-design.pdf';
421	      document.body.appendChild(anchor);
422	      anchor.click();
423	      document.body.removeChild(anchor);
424	      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
425	      setNotice(`导出完成：已生成 PDF 并自动下载，水印“${watermarkText || '未设置'}”。`);
426	    } catch (error: any) {
427	      setNotice(`导出失败：${error?.message ?? '未知错误'}`);
428	    } finally {
429	      setIsExporting(false);
430	    }
431	  };
432	
433	  const renderSymbolRail = (symbols: StitchDefinition[]) => (
434	    <div className="studio-list">
435	      {symbols.slice(0, 6).map((symbol) => (
436	        <button
437	          key={symbol.id}
438	          type="button"
439	          className={`symbol-button studio-list-item${activeSymbolId === symbol.id ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
440	          onClick={() => handleSymbolPick(symbol.id)}
441	        >
442	          <span className="studio-list-thumb">
443	            <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
444	          </span>
445	          <span className="studio-list-copy">
446	            <strong>{symbol.nameZh}</strong>
447	            <small>{symbol.nameEn ?? (currentMode === 'knit' ? 'Knitting' : 'Crochet')}</small>
448	          </span>
449	        </button>
450	      ))}
451	    </div>
452	  );
453	
454	  const renderWorkspacePage = () => (
455	    <div className="page-stack">
456	      {expiringProjectsCount > 0 && (
457	        <div className="expiration-banner">
458	          <div className="expiration-banner-content">
459	            <span className="expiration-icon">⚠️</span>
460	            <div className="expiration-text">
461	              <strong>注意：{expiringProjectsCount} 个项目即将回收</strong>
462	              <p>最近 7 天未使用的项目将在 10 天后自动移入回收站。请及时查看项目管理面板。</p>
463	            </div>
464	            <button 
465	              type="button" 
466	              className="expiration-action-btn"
467	              onClick={() => setIsProjectPanelOpen(true)}
468	            >
469	              查看项目
470	            </button>
471	          </div>
472	        </div>
473	      )}
474	      <section className="page-hero">
475	        <div>
476	          <div className="text-base font-bold">复杂提花：北极星图案</div>
477	        </div>
478	        <div className="hero-actions">
479	          <span className="hero-pill">Delta: +2</span>
480	          <span className="hero-pill muted">{Math.round(scale * 100)}%</span>
481	        </div>
482	      </section>
483	
484	      <section className="workspace-layout">
485	        <div className="canvas-column">
486	          <div className="canvas-ruler">
487	            {[0, 8, 16, 24, 32].map((value) => (
488	              <span key={value}>{value}</span>
489	            ))}
490	          </div>
491	          <div className="canvas-stage-card">
492	            <div className="canvas-main-row">
493	              <div className="main-content atelier-grid-shell" style={{ position: 'relative' }}>
494	                <Grid activeSymbolId={activeSymbolId} />
495	              </div>
496	            </div>
497	            <div className="floating-tool-rail">
498	              <button type="button" onClick={() => updateScale(scale + 0.1)}>
499	                +
500	              </button>
501	              <button type="button" onClick={() => updateScale(scale - 0.1)}>
502	                -
503	              </button>
504	              <button type="button" onClick={() => setInteractionMode('SELECT')}>
505	                光标
506	              </button>
507	              <button type="button" onClick={() => setCalculatorOpen(true)}>
508	                换算
509	              </button>
510	            </div>
511	          </div>
512	        </div>
513	
514	        <aside className="workspace-side">
515	          <div className="studio-card compact flush-top">
516	            <div className="studio-card-header">
517	              <div>
518	                <span className="card-kicker">工作台侧栏</span>
519	                <h3>右侧映射面板</h3>
520	              </div>
521	              <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
522	                <button
523	                  type="button"
524	                  className="ghost-button"
525	                  onClick={() => {
526	                    const input = window.prompt('设置自动保存间隔（秒）。输入正数，例如 10 表示 10 秒。', String(Math.round(autosaveMs / 1000)));
527	                    if (!input) return;
528	                    const sec = Number(input);
529	                    if (Number.isNaN(sec) || sec <= 0) {
530	                      setNotice('请输入大于 0 的数字。');
531	                      return;
532	                    }
533	                    const ms = Math.round(sec * 1000);
534	                    try {
535	                      window.localStorage.setItem('kintting:autosaveDelayMs', String(ms));
536	                      setAutosaveMs(ms);
537	                      setNotice(`自动保存间隔已设置为 ${sec} 秒。`);
538	                    } catch (e) {
539	                      setNotice('无法保存设置（localStorage 失败）。');
540	                    }
541	                  }}
542	                  title="设置自动保存间隔"
543	                >
544	                  自动保存: {Math.round(autosaveMs / 1000)}s
545	                </button>
546	              </div>
547	            </div>
548	          </div>
549	
550	          <>
551	            {/* Existing right sidebar content */}
552	            <div className="studio-card compact">
553	              <div className="studio-card-header">
554	                <div>
555	                  <span className="card-kicker">当前笔刷</span>
556	                  <h3>{activeSymbol?.nameZh ?? '未选择针法'}</h3>
557	                </div>
558	                <span className="hero-pill muted">{currentMode === 'knit' ? '棒针' : '钩针'}</span>
559	              </div>
560	              <p className="muted-copy">{selectedInfo?.detail ?? '选择任意单元格后，这里会展示当前针法详情。'}</p>
561	              <div className="tool-grid">
562	                {TOOLBAR_TOOLS.map((tool) => (
563	                  <button
564	                    key={tool.id}
565	                    type="button"
566	                    className={`tool-chip${interactionMode === tool.id ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
567	                    data-testid={`tool-${tool.id.toLowerCase()}`}
568	                    onClick={() => setInteractionMode(tool.id)}
569	                  >
570	                    <strong>{tool.short}</strong>
571	                    <span>{tool.label}</span>
572	                  </button>
573	                ))}
574	              </div>
575	              {renderSymbolRail(availableSymbols)}
576	              <div className="studio-range-row">
577	                <label htmlFor="canvas-scale">缩放</label>
578	                <input
579	                  id="canvas-scale"
580	                  type="range"
581	                  min={CANVAS_SCALE_MIN}
582	                  max={CANVAS_SCALE_MAX}
583	                  step={0.05}
584	                  value={scale}
585	                  onChange={(event) => updateScale(Number(event.target.value))}
586	                  aria-label="画布缩放"
587	                />
588	              </div>
589	              <div className="studio-button-row">
590	                <button type="button" className="ghost-button icon-only-button" onClick={undo} disabled={!undoStack.length} aria-label="Undo" title="Undo">
591	                  ↩
592	                </button>
593	                <button type="button" className="ghost-button icon-only-button" onClick={redo} disabled={!redoStack.length} aria-label="Redo" title="Redo">
594	                  ↪
595	                </button>
596	              </div>
597	
598	              <div className="studio-meta-grid">
599	                <span>选择</span>
600	                <strong>{selectedPosition}</strong>
601	                <span>状态</span>
602	                <strong>{previousMode ? `临时 ${interactionMode}` : interactionMode}</strong>
603	              </div>
604	            </div>
605	
606	            <div className="studio-card compact">
607	              <TextEditor />
608	            </div>
609	
610	
611	            <div className="tracker-card">
612	              <span className="card-kicker">进度追踪</span>
613	              <div className="tracker-ring">
614	                <strong>{projectCompletion}%</strong>
615	                <span>已完成</span>
616	              </div>
617	              <div className="tracker-stat">
618	                <strong>
619	                  第 {Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filledCellCount / Math.max(gridCols, 1)))} 行 / 共 {gridRows} 行
620	                </strong>
621	                <span>
622	                  填充 {filledCellCount}/{gridRows * gridCols}
623	                </span>
624	              </div>
625	            </div>
626	          </>
627	        </aside>
628	      </section>
629	    </div>
630	  );
631	
632	  const renderLibraryPage = () => (
633	    <div className="page-stack">
634	      <section className="page-hero">
635	        <div>
636	          <div className="page-eyebrow">针法库 | 搜索与筛选</div>
637	          <h1>针法库搜索与筛选状态</h1>
638	          <p>在您的工作室中寻找最合适的纹理，并将结果直接应用到当前项目。</p>
639	        </div>
640	      </section>
641	
642	      <section className="library-toolbar">
643	        <label className="library-search">
644	          <span>当前搜索</span>
645	          <input value={libraryQuery} onChange={(event) => setLibraryQuery(event.target.value)} placeholder="搜索基础、麻花、钩针…" />
646	        </label>
647	        <button type="button" className="filter-button">
648	          筛选条件 (3)
649	        </button>
650	      </section>
651

694	            </div>
695	          </div>

879	  const renderExportPage = () => (
880	    <div className="page-stack">

889	      <section className="export-layout">

895	                <h3>导出配置</h3>

902	              </button>
903	              <button type="button" className="radio-item">

906	              </button>
907	            </div>

917	            </div>

919	              生成并下载 PDF
920	            </button>
921	          </div>
922	        </aside>
923	
924	        <div className="studio-card export-options">

929	            </div>
930	          </div>

932	            <button

935	              onClick={() => setExportPreset('professional')}
936	            >
937	              <strong>Professional</strong>

939	            </button>
940	            <button
941	              type="button"
942	              className={`template-item${exportPreset === 'draft' ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
943	              onClick={() => setExportPreset('draft')}
944	            >
945	              <strong>Draft</strong>
946	              <span>仅文字描述，适用于快速记录与内测</span>
947	            </button>
948	            <button
949	              type="button"
950	              className={`template-item${exportPreset === 'social' ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
951	              onClick={() => setExportPreset('social')}
952	            >
953	              <strong>Social</strong>
954	              <span>适合小红书 / Instagram 展示的轻量图案</span>
955	            </button>
956	          </div>
957	
958	          <div className="studio-card-header flush-top">
959	            <div>
960	              <span className="card-kicker">版权设置</span>
961	              <h3>水印与授权</h3>
962	            </div>
963	          </div>
964	          <label className="text-field">
965	            <span>强制签名水印内容</span>
966	            <input value={watermarkText} onChange={(event) => setWatermarkText(event.target.value)} />
967	          </label>
968	          <label className="toggle-row">
969	            <span>允许商业使用</span>
970	            <button type="button" className={`toggle${allowCommercial ? ' is-on' : ''}`} onClick={() => setAllowCommercial((prev) => !prev)}>
971	              <i />
972	            </button>
973	          </label>
974	          <label className="toggle-row">
975	            <span>禁止二次分发</span>
976	            <button
977	              type="button"
978	              className={`toggle${preventRedistribution ? ' is-on' : ''}`}
979	              onClick={() => setPreventRedistribution((prev) => !prev)}
980	            >
981	              <i />
982	            </button>
983	          </label>
984	          <button type="button" className="primary-button" onClick={confirmExport} disabled={isExporting}>
985	            {isExporting ? '导出中...' : '确认并下载'}
986	          </button>
987	        </div>
988	
989	        <div className="studio-card export-preview-panel">
990	          <div className="studio-card-header">
991	            <div>
992	              <span className="card-kicker">PDF 导出预览</span>
993	              <h3>PAGE 1 OF 12</h3>
994	            </div>
995	          </div>
996	          <div className="pdf-preview-sheet">
997	            <div className="pdf-header">
998	              <div>
999	                <h2>复古提花开衫</h2>
1000	                <span>2024 冬季特刊 · 编织工坊 AT-992</span>
1001	              </div>
1002	              <strong>THE ATELIER</strong>
1003	            </div>
1004	            <div className="pdf-hero">
1005	              <div className="media-thumb pdf-swatch" />
1006	              <div className="pdf-stats">
1007	                <span>针法难度</span>
1008	                <strong>★★★★</strong>
1009	                <span>推荐用线</span>
1010	                <strong>美利奴羊毛 50g/120m</strong>
1011	                <span>建议针号</span>
1012	                <strong>4.5mm 环针</strong>
1013	              </div>
1014	            </div>
1015	            <div className="export-grid-preview">
1016	              <GridPreview grid={grids[currentMode]} />
1017	            </div>
1018	            <ol className="pdf-steps">
1019	              <li>起针 120 针，使用 4.0mm 针进行双螺纹编织 15 行。</li>
1020	              <li>换 4.5mm 针，开始按 A 区域提花图进行编织。</li>
1021	            </ol>
1022	            <div className="pdf-footer-box">{watermarkText || '未设置水印'}</div>
1023	          </div>
1024	        </div>
1025	      </section>
1026	    </div>
1027	  );
1028	
1029	  return (
1030	    <div className="studio-app-shell">
1031	      <header className={`studio-topbar ${isNavbarCollapsed ? 'collapsed' : ''}`}>
1032	        <div className="brand-block">
1033	          <strong>The Atelier</strong>
1034	          <span>Tactile Studio</span>
1035	        </div>
1036	
1037	        <nav className="top-nav">
1038	          {PAGE_ITEMS.map((item) => (
1039	            <button
1040	              key={item.id}
1041	              type="button"
1042	              className={`top-nav-item${activePage === item.id ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
1043	              onClick={() => handlePageChange(item.id, item.mode)}
1044	            >
1045	              <span>{item.label}</span>
1046	              <small>{item.caption}</small>
1047	            </button>
1048	          ))}
1049	        </nav>
1050	
1051	        <div className="topbar-actions">
1052	
1053	          <button
1054	            type="button"
1055	            className="navbar-toggle-button"
1056	            onClick={() => setIsNavbarCollapsed((prev) => !prev)}
1057	            aria-label={isNavbarCollapsed ? '展开导航栏' : '收起导航栏'}
1058	          >
1059	            <span className="navbar-toggle-icon">{isNavbarCollapsed ? '▾' : '▴'}</span>
1060	          </button>
1061	          <div className="project-switcher">
1062	            <button
1063	              type="button"
1064	              className="project-switcher-button"
1065	              onClick={() => setIsProjectPanelOpen((prev) => !prev)}
1066	              aria-expanded={isProjectPanelOpen}
1067	            >
1068	              <span>{activeProject?.name ?? 'Untitled Project'}</span>
1069	              <small>{projectList.length} projects</small>
1070	            </button>
1071	            {isProjectPanelOpen ? (
1072	              <div className="project-panel">
1073	                <div className="project-panel-tabs">
1074	                  <button
1075	                    type="button"
1076	                    className={`tab-button${projectPanelTab === 'projects' ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
1077	                    onClick={() => setProjectPanelTab('projects')}
1078	                  >
1079	                    Projects ({projectList.length})
1080	                  </button>
1081	                  <button
1082	                    type="button"
1083	                    className={`tab-button${projectPanelTab === 'recycle' ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
1084	                    onClick={() => setProjectPanelTab('recycle')}
1085	                  >
1086	                    Recycle Bin ({deletedProjectList.length})
1087	                  </button>
1088	                </div>
1089	
1090	                {projectPanelTab === 'projects' ? (
1091	                  <>
1092	                    <div className="project-panel-actions">
1093	                      <button type="button" className="primary-button compact-button" onClick={handleCreateProject}>
1094	                        新建
1095	                      </button>
1096	                      <button type="button" className="ghost-button compact-button" onClick={handleRenameProject} disabled={!activeProject}>
1097	                        重命名
1098	                      </button>
1099	                      <button type="button" className="ghost-button compact-button" onClick={handleDuplicateProject} disabled={!activeProjectId}>
1100	                        复制
1101	                      </button>
1102	                    </div>
1103	                    <div className="project-grid">
1104	                      {projectList.map((project) => (
1105	                        <button
1106	                          key={project.id}
1107	                          type="button"
1108	                          className={`project-card${project.id === activeProjectId ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
1109	                          onClick={() => handleSwitchProject(project.id)}
1110	                        >
1111	                          <div className="project-card-preview">
1112	                            {project.thumbnail ? (
1113	                              <img src={project.thumbnail} alt={project.name} />
1114	                            ) : (
1115	                              <div className="project-card-placeholder">Preview</div>
1116	                            )}
1117	                          </div>
1118	                          <div className="project-card-meta">
1119	                            <strong>{project.name}</strong>
1120	                            <small>{getProjectAgeLabel(project)}</small>
1121	                            {isProjectWarning(project, activeProjectId) ? <span className="status-pill warning">7天后回收</span> : null}
1122	                            <span className="meta-detail">{project.grids[project.currentMode][0]?.length ?? 0} x {project.grids[project.currentMode].length}</span>
1123	                          </div>
1124	                        </button>
1125	                      ))}
1126	                      {!projectList.length ? <div className="project-empty">当前暂无项目</div> : null}
1127	                    </div>
1128	                    <div className="project-panel-actions">
1129	                      <button
1130	                        type="button"
1131	                        className="ghost-button compact-button danger-button"
1132	                        onClick={() => activeProjectId && handleDeleteProject(activeProjectId)}
1133	                        disabled={!activeProjectId}
1134	                      >
1135	                        移入回收站
1136	                      </button>
1137	                    </div>
1138	                  </>
1139	                ) : (
1140	                  <>
1141	                    <div className="project-panel-actions">
1142	                      <button
1143	                        type="button"
1144	                        className="ghost-button compact-button danger-button"
1145	                        onClick={() => emptyRecycleBin()}
1146	                        disabled={!deletedProjectList.length}
1147	                      >
1148	                        清空回收站
1149	                      </button>
1150	                    </div>
1151	                    <div className="project-grid">
1152	                      {deletedProjectList.map((project) => (
1153	                        <div key={project.id} className="project-card recycle-card">
1154	                          <div className="project-card-preview">
1155	                            {project.thumbnail ? (
1156	                              <img src={project.thumbnail} alt={project.name} />
1157	                            ) : (
1158	                              <div className="project-card-placeholder">Deleted</div>
1159	                            )}
1160	                          </div>
1161	                          <div className="project-card-meta">
1162	                            <strong>{project.name}</strong>
1163	                            <small>Deleted {project.deletedAt ? `${Math.floor((Date.now() - project.deletedAt) / 86400000)}天前` : 'unknown'}</small>
1164	                            <span className="meta-detail">{project.grids[project.currentMode][0]?.length ?? 0} x {project.grids[project.currentMode].length}</span>
1165	                          </div>
1166	                          <div className="project-card-actions">
1167	                            <button type="button" className="ghost-button compact-button" onClick={() => restoreProject(project.id)}>
1168	                              恢复
1169	                            </button>
1170	                            <button type="button" className="ghost-button compact-button danger-button" onClick={() => deleteProjectPermanently(project.id)}>
1171	                              永久删除
1172	                            </button>
1173	                          </div>
1174	                        </div>
1175	                      ))}
1176	                      {!deletedProjectList.length ? <div className="project-empty">回收站为空</div> : null}
1177	                    </div>
1178	                  </>
1179	                )}
1180	              </div>
1181	            ) : null}
1182	          </div>
1183	          <div className="mode-toggle">
1184	            <button
1185	              type="button"
1186	              className={currentMode === 'knit' ? 'is-active' : ''}
1187	              onClick={() => handleProjectModeChange('knit')}
1188	            >
1189	              编织
1190	            </button>
1191	            <button
1192	              type="button"
1193	              className={currentMode === 'crochet' ? 'is-active' : ''}
1194	              onClick={() => handleProjectModeChange('crochet')}
1195	            >
1196	              钩针
1197	            </button>
1198	          </div>
1199	          <span className="status-chip">{fontsReady ? '字体已就绪' : '字体加载中'}</span>
1200	          <button type="button" className="primary-button" onClick={() => handlePageChange('export', currentMode)} style={{ marginLeft: 8 }}>
1201	            导出
1202	          </button>
1203	        </div>
1204	      </header>

173	const isPlainObject = (value: unknown): value is Record<string, unknown> =>
174	  typeof value === 'object' && value !== null && !Array.isArray(value);
175	
176	const storageReplacer = (_key: string, value: unknown) => {
177	  if (value instanceof Map) {
178	    return { __type: 'Map', value: Array.from(value.entries()) };
179	  }
180	  if (value instanceof Set) {
181	    return { __type: 'Set', value: Array.from(value.values()) };
182	  }
183	  if (value instanceof Date) {

189	const storageReviver = (_key: string, value: unknown) => {
190	  if (!isPlainObject(value) || typeof value.__type !== 'string') {
191	    return value;
192	  }
193	
194	  switch (value.__type) {
195	    case 'Map':
196	      return new Map(value.value as Array<[unknown, unknown]>);
197	    case 'Set':
198	      return new Set(value.value as Array<unknown>);
199	    case 'Date':
200	      return new Date(value.value as string);
201	    default:
202	      return value;
203	  }

227	const getRootPosition = (grid: CellData[][], row: number, col: number) => {
228	  const cell = grid[row]?.[col];
229	  if (!cell) return null;
230	  if (cell.isSpanChild && cell.parentPos) return cell.parentPos;
231	  return { row, col };
232	};
233	
234	const clearStitchAtRoot = (grid: CellData[][], row: number, col: number) => {
235	  const root = getRootPosition(grid, row, col);
236	  if (!root) return false;
237	  const cell = grid[root.row]?.[root.col];
238	  if (!cell?.stitchId) return false;
239	
240	  const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId];
241	  const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
242	  const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
243	  let changed = false;
244	
245	  for (let i = 0; i < spanH; i++) {
246	    for (let j = 0; j < spanW; j++) {
247	      const target = grid[root.row + i]?.[root.col + j];
248	      if (target) {
249	        grid[root.row + i][root.col + j] = {};
250	        changed = true;
251	      }
252	    }
253	  }
254	
255	  return changed;
256	};
257	
258	const placeStitchSnapshot = (grid: CellData[][], row: number, col: number, snapshot: CellData) => {
259	  if (!snapshot.stitchId) return false;
260	  const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[snapshot.stitchId];
261	  const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
262	  const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
263	
264	  if (row < 0 || col < 0 || row + spanH > grid.length || col + spanW > (grid[0]?.length ?? 0)) {
265	    return false;
266	  }
267	
268	  for (let i = 0; i < spanH; i++) {
269	    for (let j = 0; j < spanW; j++) {
270	      if (i === 0 && j === 0) {
271	        grid[row][col] = {
272	          ...snapshot,
273	          isSpanChild: false,
274	          parentPos: undefined,
275	          svgPath: snapshot.svgPath || stitchDef?.svgPath || '',
276	        };
277	      } else {
278	        grid[row + i][col + j] = {
279	          char: '',
280	          svgPath: '',
281	          stitchId: snapshot.stitchId,
282	          isSpanChild: true,
283	          parentPos: { row, col },
284	        };
285	      }
286	    }
287	  }
288	
289	  return true;
290	};

294	const storage = localforageInstance.createInstance({

299	localforageInstance
300	  .setDriver([localforageInstance.INDEXEDDB, localforageInstance.WEBSQL, localforageInstance.LOCALSTORAGE])

303	  });
304	
305	const forageStorage: StateStorage = {
306	  getItem: async (name: string): Promise<string | null> => {
307	    let val = (await storage.getItem(name)) as string | null;
308	    // Legacy migration step from simple localStorage
309	    if (!val && typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.localStorage) {
310	      val = window.localStorage.getItem(name);
311	      if (val) {
312	        try {
313	          await storage.setItem(name, val);
314	        } catch (e) {
315	          console.warn('Failed to migrate item to localforage', e);
316	        }
317	      }
318	    }
319	    return val || null;
320	  },
321	  setItem: async (name: string, value: string): Promise<void> => {
322	    await storage.setItem(name, value);
323	  },
324	  removeItem: async (name: string): Promise<void> => {
325	    await storage.removeItem(name);
326	  },
327	};
328	
329	// Default autosave debounce delay (ms). Increase to reduce save frequency.
330	const DEFAULT_AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS = 10000;
331	const AUTOSAVE_DELAY_STORAGE_KEY = 'kintting:autosaveDelayMs';
332	
333	// Create a debounced wrapper around the forage storage so frequent writes
334	// (e.g., during continuous drawing) are coalesced. Exposes the same
335	// StateStorage async API expected by zustand's persistence layer.
336	const createDebouncedForageStorage = (delay = DEFAULT_AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS): StateStorage => {
337	  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return forageStorage;
338	
339	  let timeout: number | undefined;
340	  const pending = new Map<string, string>();
341	  let flushing = false;
342	
343	  const flush = async () => {
344	    if (flushing) return;
345	    flushing = true;
346	    for (const [k, v] of pending) {
347	      try {
348	        await storage.setItem(k, v);
349	      } catch (e) {
350	        // ignore individual write errors
351	        console.warn('debounced storage setItem failed', e);
352	      }
353	    }
354	    pending.clear();
355	    if (typeof timeout !== 'undefined') {
356	      clearTimeout(timeout);
357	      timeout = undefined;
358	    }
359	    flushing = false;
360	  };
361	
362	  try {
363	    window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
364	      // flush synchronously where possible
365	      if (pending.size) {
366	        // best-effort flush (no await in beforeunload)
367	        void flush();
368	      }
369	    });
370	  } catch (e) {
371	    // ignore
372	  }
373	
374	  return {
375	    getItem: async (name: string) => {
376	      // If we have a pending value for this key, return it first
377	      if (pending.has(name)) return pending.get(name) as string;
378	      return (await storage.getItem(name)) as string | null;
379	    },
380	    setItem: async (name: string, value: string) => {
381	      pending.set(name, value);
382	      // read current configured delay from localStorage if available
383	      let configured = delay;
384	      try {
385	        const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(AUTOSAVE_DELAY_STORAGE_KEY);
386	        const parsed = raw ? Number(raw) : NaN;
387	        if (!Number.isNaN(parsed) && parsed > 0) configured = parsed;
388	      } catch (e) {
389	        // ignore
390	      }
391	      if (typeof timeout !== 'undefined') clearTimeout(timeout);
392	      timeout = window.setTimeout(() => void flush(), configured) as unknown as number;
393	    },
394	    removeItem: async (name: string) => {
395	      pending.delete(name);
396	      try {
397	        await storage.removeItem(name);
398	      } catch (e) {
399	        console.warn('debounced storage removeItem failed', e);
400	      }
401	    },
402	  };
403	};
