405	export const useProjectStore = create<ProjectState>()(
406	  persist(
407	    (set, get) => {
408	      const updateActiveProject = (updater: (project: Project) => Partial<Project>) => {
409	        const state = get();
410	        if (!state.activeProjectId) return;
411	        const project = state.projects[state.activeProjectId];
412	        if (!project) return;
413	        const nextProject = {
414	          ...project,
415	          ...updater(project),
416	          lastModified: Date.now()
417	        };
418	        set({
419	          projects: {
420	            ...state.projects,
421	            [state.activeProjectId]: nextProject
422	          },
423	          ...projectView(nextProject)
424	        });
425	      };
426	
427	      return {
428	        projects: {},
429	        deletedProjects: {},
430	        activeProjectId: null,
431	        ...emptyProjectView(),
432	        clipboard: null,
433	        validationResults: [],
434	
435	        createProject: (name, rows = 20, cols = 20) => {
436	          const newProject = createProjectRecord(name, rows, cols);
437	          set((state) => ({
438	            projects: { ...state.projects, [newProject.id]: newProject },
439	            activeProjectId: newProject.id,
440	            ...projectView(newProject)
441	          }));
442	          return newProject.id;
443	        },
444	
445	        switchProject: (id) => {
446	          const project = get().projects[id];
447	          if (!project) return;
448	          set({ activeProjectId: id, ...projectView(project), validationResults: [] });
449	        },
450	
451	        deleteProject: (id) => {
452	          set((state) => {
453	            const nextProjects = { ...state.projects };
454	            const projectToDelete = nextProjects[id];
455	            if (!projectToDelete) return state;
456	
457	            delete nextProjects[id];
458	            const nextDeletedProjects = {
459	              ...state.deletedProjects,
460	              [id]: { ...projectToDelete, deletedAt: Date.now() },
461	            };
462	
463	            const fallback = Object.values(nextProjects).sort((a, b) => b.lastModified - a.lastModified)[0];
464	            return {
465	              projects: nextProjects,
466	              deletedProjects: nextDeletedProjects,
467	              activeProjectId: state.activeProjectId === id ? fallback?.id ?? null : state.activeProjectId,
468	              ...(state.activeProjectId === id ? (fallback ? projectView(fallback) : emptyProjectView()) : {})
469	            };
470	          });
471	        },
472	
473	        restoreProject: (id) => {
474	          set((state) => {
475	            const deleted = state.deletedProjects[id];
476	            if (!deleted) return state;
477	
478	            const nextDeletedProjects = { ...state.deletedProjects };
479	            delete nextDeletedProjects[id];
480	
481	            const restoredProject = {
482	              ...deleted,
483	              deletedAt: undefined,
484	              lastModified: Date.now(),
485	            };
486	
487	            return {
488	              projects: { ...state.projects, [id]: restoredProject },
489	              deletedProjects: nextDeletedProjects,
490	            };
491	          });
492	        },
493	
494	        deleteProjectPermanently: (id) => {
495	          set((state) => {
496	            const nextDeletedProjects = { ...state.deletedProjects };
497	            delete nextDeletedProjects[id];
498	            return { deletedProjects: nextDeletedProjects };
499	          });
500	        },
501	
502	        emptyRecycleBin: () => {
503	          set({ deletedProjects: {} });
504	        },
505	
506	        purgeExpiredProjects: () => {
507	          set((state) => {
508	            const nextProjects = { ...state.projects };
509	            const nextDeletedProjects = { ...state.deletedProjects };
510	            let changed = false;
511	
512	            Object.entries(state.projects).forEach(([id, project]) => {
513	              if (state.activeProjectId === id) return;
514	              if (Date.now() - project.lastModified > EXPIRY_SOFT_DELETE_MS) {
515	                nextDeletedProjects[id] = { ...project, deletedAt: Date.now() };
516	                delete nextProjects[id];
517	                changed = true;
518	              }
519	            });
520	
521	            if (!changed) return state;
522	
523	            const fallback = Object.values(nextProjects).sort((a, b) => b.lastModified - a.lastModified)[0];
524	            const nextActiveId = state.activeProjectId && nextProjects[state.activeProjectId] ? state.activeProjectId : fallback?.id ?? null;
525	
526	            return {
527	              projects: nextProjects,
528	              deletedProjects: nextDeletedProjects,
529	              activeProjectId: nextActiveId,
530	              ...(nextActiveId ? projectView(nextProjects[nextActiveId]) : emptyProjectView()),
531	            };
532	          });
533	        },
534	
535	        renameProject: (id, name) => {
536	          const nextName = name.trim();
537	          if (!nextName) return;
538	          set((state) => {
539	            const project = state.projects[id];
540	            if (!project) return state;
541	            const nextProject = { ...project, name: nextName, lastModified: Date.now() };
542	            return {
543	              projects: {
544	                ...state.projects,
545	                [id]: nextProject,
546	              },
547	              ...(state.activeProjectId === id ? projectView(nextProject) : {}),
548	            };
549	          });
550	        },
551	
552	        duplicateProject: (id) => {
553	          const project = get().projects[id];
554	          if (!project) return null;
555	          const nextProject = cloneProject(project, `${project.name} Copy`);
556	          set((state) => ({
557	            projects: { ...state.projects, [nextProject.id]: nextProject },
558	            activeProjectId: nextProject.id,
559	            ...projectView(nextProject),
560	          }));
561	          return nextProject.id;
562	        },
563	
564	        updateProjectThumbnail: (id, thumbnail) => {
565	          set((state) => {
566	            const project = state.projects[id];
567	            if (!project) return state;
568	            return {
569	              projects: {
570	                ...state.projects,
571	                [id]: { ...project, thumbnail, lastModified: Date.now() }
572	              }
573	            };
574	          });
575	        },
576	
577	        replaceModeGrid: (mode, grid, resetHistory = true) => {
578	          const { activeProjectId } = get();
579	          if (!activeProjectId) {
580	            get().createProject('Untitled Project', grid.length, grid[0]?.length ?? 0);
581	          }
582	
583	          updateActiveProject((project) => ({
584	            grids: { ...project.grids, [mode]: cloneGrid(grid) },
585	            currentMode: mode,
586	            ...(resetHistory ? { undoStack: [], redoStack: [] } : {}),
587	          }));
588	        },
589	
590	        setMode: (mode) => {
591	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ currentMode: mode }));
592	        },
593	
594	        setTextLocale: (locale) => {
595	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ textLocale: locale }));
596	          get().compileToText();
597	        },
598	
599	        setRowNumberDirection: (direction) => {
600	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ rowNumberDirection: direction }));
601	          get().compileToText();
602	        },
603	
604	        initGrid: (rows, cols) => {
605	          if (!get().activeProjectId) {
606	            get().createProject('Untitled Project', rows, cols);
607	            return;
608	          }
609	
610	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ 
611	            grids: { 
612	              knit: createEmptyGrid(rows, cols), 
613	              crochet: createEmptyGrid(rows, cols) 
614	            },
615	            description: '',
616	            undoStack: [], 
617	            redoStack: [] 
618	          }));
619	        },
620	
621	        applyCellChange: (row, col, char, svgPath, stitchId) => {
622	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
623	          if (!activeProjectId) return false;
624	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
625	
626	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
627	          if (!currentGrid[row] || !currentGrid[row][col]) return false;
628	        
629	          const isErasing = !stitchId;
630	          const stitchDef = stitchId ? stitchRegistry[stitchId] : null;
631	        
632	          const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
633	          const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
634	
635	          let needsUpdate = false;
636	          const newGrid = currentGrid.map(r => [...r]);
637	
638	          const clearStitchAt = (r: number, c: number) => {
639	            const cell = newGrid[r]?.[c];
640	            if (!cell) return;
641	            if (cell.isSpanChild && cell.parentPos) {
642	              clearStitchAt(cell.parentPos.row, cell.parentPos.col);
643	              return;
644	            }
645	          
646	            const sDef = cell.stitchId ? stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId] : null;
647	            const cSpanW = sDef?.span?.width || 1;
648	            const cSpanH = sDef?.span?.height || 1;
649	          
650	            for (let i = 0; i < cSpanH; i++) {
651	              for (let j = 0; j < cSpanW; j++) {
652	                if (newGrid[r + i] && newGrid[r + i][c + j]) {
653	                  newGrid[r + i][c + j] = { ...newGrid[r + i][c + j], char: '', svgPath: '', stitchId: '', isSpanChild: false, parentPos: undefined };
654	                  needsUpdate = true;
655	                }
656	              }
657	            }
658	          };
659	
660	          if (isErasing) {
661	            if (newGrid[row][col].stitchId || newGrid[row][col].isSpanChild) {
662	              clearStitchAt(row, col);
663	            }
664	          } else {
665	            if (row + spanH > currentGrid.length || col + spanW > currentGrid[0].length) {
666	              return false; 
667	            }
668	
669	            for (let i = 0; i < spanH; i++) {
670	              for (let j = 0; j < spanW; j++) {
671	                 const tarR = row + i;
672	                 const tarC = col + j;
673	                 if (newGrid[tarR]?.[tarC] && (newGrid[tarR][tarC].stitchId || newGrid[tarR][tarC].isSpanChild)) {
674	                   clearStitchAt(tarR, tarC);
675	                 }
676	              }
677	            }
678	
679	            for (let i = 0; i < spanH; i++) {
680	              for (let j = 0; j < spanW; j++) {
681	                const tarR = row + i;
682	                const tarC = col + j;
683	                if (newGrid[tarR] && newGrid[tarR][tarC]) {
684	                  if (i === 0 && j === 0) {
685	                    newGrid[tarR][tarC] = { ...newGrid[tarR][tarC], char, svgPath, stitchId, isSpanChild: false, parentPos: undefined };
686	                  } else {
687	                    newGrid[tarR][tarC] = { ...newGrid[tarR][tarC], char: '', svgPath: '', stitchId: stitchId, isSpanChild: true, parentPos: { row, col } };
688	                  }
689	                  needsUpdate = true;
690	                }
691	              }
692	            }
693	          }
694	
695	          if (needsUpdate) {
696	            get()._saveSnapshot();
697	            updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: newGrid } }));
698	            get().compileToText();
699	            return true;
700	          }
701	
702	          return false;
703	        },
704	
705	        copySelection: (roots, anchor) => {
706	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
707	          if (!activeProjectId || !anchor || roots.length === 0) return false;
708	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
709	
710	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
711	          const seen = new Set<string>();
712	          const items: ClipboardItem[] = [];
713	
714	          for (const root of roots) {
715	            const resolvedRoot = getRootPosition(currentGrid, root.row, root.col);
716	            if (!resolvedRoot) continue;
717	            const key = rootKey(resolvedRoot.row, resolvedRoot.col);
718	            if (seen.has(key)) continue;
719	            seen.add(key);
720	
721	            const cell = currentGrid[resolvedRoot.row]?.[resolvedRoot.col];
722	            if (!cell?.stitchId || cell.isSpanChild) continue;
723	
724	            items.push({
725	              dr: resolvedRoot.row - anchor.row,
726	              dc: resolvedRoot.col - anchor.col,
727	              cellSnapshot: { ...cell, parentPos: undefined, isSpanChild: false },
728	            });
729	          }
730	
731	          if (!items.length) return false;
732	          set({ clipboard: { anchor, items } });
733	          return true;
734	        },
735	
736	        cutSelection: (roots, anchor) => {
737	          if (!get().copySelection(roots, anchor)) return false;
738	
739	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
740	          if (!activeProjectId) return false;
741	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
742	
743	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
744	          const nextGrid = cloneGrid(currentGrid);
745	          let changed = false;
746	
747	          const seen = new Set<string>();
748	          for (const root of roots) {
749	            const resolvedRoot = getRootPosition(currentGrid, root.row, root.col);
750	            if (!resolvedRoot) continue;
751	            const key = rootKey(resolvedRoot.row, resolvedRoot.col);
752	            if (seen.has(key)) continue;
753	            seen.add(key);
754	            changed = clearStitchAtRoot(nextGrid, resolvedRoot.row, resolvedRoot.col) || changed;
755	          }
756	
757	          if (!changed) return false;
758	          get()._saveSnapshot();
759	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: nextGrid } }));
760	          get().compileToText();
761	          return true;
762	        },
763	
764	        pasteClipboard: (target) => {
765	          const { activeProjectId, projects, clipboard } = get();
766	          if (!activeProjectId || !clipboard?.items.length) return null;
767	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
768	
769	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
770	          const rows = currentGrid.length;
771	          const cols = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
772	          const placements = clipboard.items.map((item) => ({
773	            row: target.row + item.dr,
774	            col: target.col + item.dc,
775	            item,
776	          }));
777	
778	          const isOutOfBounds = placements.some(({ row, col, item }) => {
779	            const stitchDef = item.cellSnapshot.stitchId ? stitchRegistry[item.cellSnapshot.stitchId] : null;
780	            const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
781	            const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
782	            return row < 0 || col < 0 || row + spanH > rows || col + spanW > cols;
783	          });
784	
785	          if (isOutOfBounds) return null;
786	
787	          const nextGrid = cloneGrid(currentGrid);
788	          for (const placement of placements) {
789	            placeStitchSnapshot(nextGrid, placement.row, placement.col, placement.item.cellSnapshot);
790	          }
791	
792	          get()._saveSnapshot();
793	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: nextGrid } }));
794	          get().compileToText();
795	          return placements.map(({ row, col }) => ({ row, col }));
796	        },
797	
798	        exportSnapshot: () => {
799	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
800	          if (!activeProjectId) return { pages: [] };
801	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
802	
803	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
804	          const rows = currentGrid.length;
805	          const cols = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
806	
807	          const pageWidth = 595.28;
808	          const pageHeight = 841.89;
809	          const cellSize = 16;
810	          const gridWidth = cols * cellSize;
811	          const gridHeight = rows * cellSize;
812	          const pageScale = Math.min(pageWidth / Math.max(gridWidth, 1), pageHeight / Math.max(gridHeight, 1), 1);
813	
814	          const glyphs = [] as Array<{
815	            id: string;
816	            svgPath: string;
817	            transform: { tx: number; ty: number; scale: number };
818	            bounds: { w: number; h: number };
819	          }>;
820	
821	          for (let row = 0; row < rows; row += 1) {
822	            for (let col = 0; col < cols; col += 1) {
823	              const cell = currentGrid[row]?.[col];
824	              if (!cell?.stitchId || cell.isSpanChild) continue;
825	              const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId];
826	              if (!stitchDef) continue;
827	
828	              const spanW = stitchDef.span.width || 1;
829	              const spanH = stitchDef.span.height || 1;
830	              glyphs.push({
831	                id: `${row}-${col}-${cell.stitchId}`,
832	                svgPath: stitchDef.svgPath,
833	                transform: {
834	                  tx: col * cellSize * pageScale,
835	                  ty: row * cellSize * pageScale,
836	                  scale: pageScale,
837	                },
838	                bounds: {
839	                  w: spanW * cellSize * pageScale,
840	                  h: spanH * cellSize * pageScale,
841	                },
842	              });
843	            }
844	          }
845	
846	          return {
847	            pages: [
848	              {
849	                width: pageWidth,
850	                height: pageHeight,
851	                glyphs,
852	              },
853	            ],
854	          } as ExportSnapshot;
855	        },
856	
857	        moveSelection: (roots, anchor, target) => {
858	          if (!get().copySelection(roots, anchor)) return null;
859	
860	          const { activeProjectId, projects, clipboard } = get();
861	          if (!activeProjectId || !clipboard?.items.length) return null;
862	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
863	
864	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
865	          const rows = currentGrid.length;
866	          const cols = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
867	          const placements = clipboard.items.map((item) => ({
868	            row: target.row + item.dr,
869	            col: target.col + item.dc,
870	            item,
871	          }));
872	
873	          const isOutOfBounds = placements.some(({ row, col, item }) => {
874	            const stitchDef = item.cellSnapshot.stitchId ? stitchRegistry[item.cellSnapshot.stitchId] : null;
875	            const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
876	            const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
877	            return row < 0 || col < 0 || row + spanH > rows || col + spanW > cols;
878	          });
879	
880	          if (isOutOfBounds) return null;
881	
882	          const nextGrid = cloneGrid(currentGrid);
883	
884	          for (const placement of placements) {
885	            const stitchDef = placement.item.cellSnapshot.stitchId ? stitchRegistry[placement.item.cellSnapshot.stitchId] : null;
886	            const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
887	            const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
888	            for (let i = 0; i < spanH; i++) {
889	              for (let j = 0; j < spanW; j++) {
890	                clearStitchAtRoot(nextGrid, placement.row + i, placement.col + j);
891	              }
892	            }
893	          }
894	
895	          const seen = new Set<string>();
896	          for (const root of roots) {
897	            const resolvedRoot = getRootPosition(currentGrid, root.row, root.col);
898	            if (!resolvedRoot) continue;
899	            const key = rootKey(resolvedRoot.row, resolvedRoot.col);
900	            if (seen.has(key)) continue;
901	            seen.add(key);
902	            clearStitchAtRoot(nextGrid, resolvedRoot.row, resolvedRoot.col);
903	          }
904	
905	          for (const placement of placements) {
906	            placeStitchSnapshot(nextGrid, placement.row, placement.col, placement.item.cellSnapshot);
907	          }
908	
909	          get()._saveSnapshot();
910	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: nextGrid } }));
911	          get().compileToText();
912	          return placements.map(({ row, col }) => ({ row, col }));
913	        },
914	
915	        compileToText: () => {
916	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
917	          if (!activeProjectId) return;
918	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
919	
920	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
921	          const text = compileGridToText(currentGrid, { locale: project.textLocale, rowNumberDirection: project.rowNumberDirection });
922	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ description: text }));
923	        },
924	
925	        applyTextToGrid: (text: string) => {
926	          const { activeProjectId, projects, _saveSnapshot } = get();
927	          if (!activeProjectId) return [];
928	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
929	
930	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
931	          const rowsInGrid = currentGrid.length;
932	          const colsInGrid = currentGrid.length > 0 ? currentGrid[0].length : 0;
933	
934	          const parsedRows = parseTextToGrid(text, colsInGrid);
935	
936	          set({ validationResults: parsedRows });
937	
938	          const hasInvalidRows = parsedRows.some((r: any) => !r.validation.valid);
939	
940	          if (hasInvalidRows) {
941	            if (text.trim() === '') {
942	              updateActiveProject(() => ({ description: '' }));
943	            } else {
944	              get().compileToText(); 
945	            }
946	            return parsedRows; 
947	          }
948	
949	          _saveSnapshot(); 
950	
951	          let maxColsFromText = colsInGrid;
952	          parsedRows.forEach((pRow: any) => {
953	            if (pRow.validation.delta > 0) {
954	              maxColsFromText = Math.max(maxColsFromText, colsInGrid + pRow.validation.delta);
955	            }
956	          });
957	
958	          if (rowsInGrid === 0 || text.trim() === '') {
959	            const emptyGrid = createEmptyGrid(rowsInGrid, maxColsFromText);
960	            updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: emptyGrid }, description: '' }));
961	            return parsedRows;
962	          }
963	
964	          // Diff + Overlay 策略：
965	          // 1. 克隆当前网格，保留所有未修改的行
966	          // 2. 对要修改的行，不清空整行，而是检测现有针法位置作为锚点
967	          // 3. 从锚点开始，将文字中的针法覆盖写入
968	          let newGrid: CellData[][] = cloneGrid(currentGrid);
969	
970	          // 如果需要扩展列数，向左扩展（prepend 空单元格，原有数据右移）
971	          if (maxColsFromText > colsInGrid) {
972	            const addedCols = maxColsFromText - colsInGrid;
973	            const emptyCols = Array.from({ length: addedCols }, () => ({} as CellData));
974	            newGrid = newGrid.map((row) => [...emptyCols, ...row]);
975	
976	            // 修复 span 子节点的 parentPos：列索引需要加上偏移量
977	            for (const row of newGrid) {
978	              for (const cell of row) {
979	                if (cell.isSpanChild && cell.parentPos) {
980	                  cell.parentPos = { ...cell.parentPos, col: cell.parentPos.col + addedCols };
981	                }
982	              }
983	            }
984	          }
985	
986	          parsedRows.forEach((parsed: any) => {
987	            const gridRowIndex = gridRowFromDisplayRow(parsed.rowNumber, rowsInGrid, project.rowNumberDirection);
988	            if (gridRowIndex < 0 || gridRowIndex >= rowsInGrid) return;
989	
990	            const row = newGrid[gridRowIndex];
991	
992	            // ── Step 1: 提取当前行已有的针法序列（跳过空格和 span 子节点） ──
993	            const existingStitches: Array<{ col: number; stitchId: string }> = [];
994	            for (let i = 0; i < row.length; i++) {
995	              if (row[i]?.stitchId && !row[i]?.isSpanChild) {
996	                existingStitches.push({ col: i, stitchId: row[i].stitchId! });
997	              }
998	            }
999	
1000	            const textStitchCount = parsed.cells.length;
1001	            const existingCount = existingStitches.length;
1002	            const newCount = textStitchCount - existingCount;
1003	
1004	            // ── Step 2: 如果没有新增针法，跳过这行（已有针法完全不动） ──
1005	            if (newCount <= 0) return;
1006	
1007	            // ── Step 3: 确保行长度足够 ──
1008	            while (row.length < maxColsFromText) {
1009	              row.push({} as CellData);
1010	            }
1011	
1012	            // ── Step 4: 只在右侧放置新增的针法 ──
1013	            // 找到已有针法的最右侧位置
1014	            const rightmostCol = existingStitches.length > 0
1015	              ? existingStitches[existingStitches.length - 1].col
1016	              : maxColsFromText - 1;
1017	
1018	            // 从最右侧已有针法的右边开始，向右放置新增针法
1019	            // 新增针法 = 文字中的最后 newCount 个针法
1020	            let currentCol = rightmostCol + 1;
1021	            const newCells = parsed.cells.slice(existingCount); // 只取新增的
1022	
1023	            for (const cell of newCells) {
1024	              const stitchId = cell.stitchId!;
1025	              const spanW = stitchRegistry[stitchId]?.span?.width || 1;
1026	
1027	              // 放置主节点
1028	              if (currentCol >= 0 && currentCol < maxColsFromText) {
1029	                newGrid[gridRowIndex][currentCol] = {
1030	                  ...cell,
1031	                  svgPath: stitchRegistry[stitchId]?.svgPath || '',
1032	                  isSpanChild: false,
1033	                  parentPos: undefined,
1034	                };
1035	              }
1036	
1037	              // 放置跨格子节点
1038	              for (let k = 1; k < spanW; k++) {
1039	                const childCol = currentCol + k;
1040	                if (childCol >= 0 && childCol < maxColsFromText) {
1041	                  newGrid[gridRowIndex][childCol] = {
1042	                    char: '',
1043	                    svgPath: '',
1044	                    stitchId,
1045	                    isSpanChild: true,
1046	                    parentPos: { row: gridRowIndex, col: currentCol },
1047	                  };
1048	                }
1049	              }
1050	              currentCol += spanW;
1051	            }
1052	          });
1053	
1054	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: newGrid }, description: text }));
1055	          return parsedRows;
1056	        },
1057	
1058	        resizeGrid: (newCols: number) => {
1059	          const { activeProjectId, projects, _saveSnapshot } = get();
1060	          if (!activeProjectId) return;
1061	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
1062	
1063	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];
1064	          const currentRows = currentGrid.length;
1065	          const currentCols = currentGrid.length > 0 ? currentGrid[0].length : 0;
1066	
1067	          if (newCols === currentCols) return; 
1068	
1069	          _saveSnapshot(); 
1070	
1071	          const newGrid = createEmptyGrid(currentRows, newCols);
1072	
1073	          for (let r = 0; r < currentRows; r++) {
1074	            for (let c = 0; c < Math.min(currentCols, newCols); c++) {
1075	              newGrid[r][c] = currentGrid[r][c];
1076	            }
1077	          }
1078	
1079	          updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: newGrid } }));
1080	          get().compileToText(); 
1081	        },
1082	
1083	        undo: () => {
1084	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
1085	          if (!activeProjectId) return;
1086	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
1087	
1088	          if (project.undoStack.length === 0) return;
1089	        
1090	          const previous = project.undoStack[project.undoStack.length - 1];
1091	          const newUndoStack = project.undoStack.slice(0, -1);
1092	        
1093	          updateActiveProject(() => ({
1094	            grids: previous.grids,
1095	            currentMode: previous.currentMode,
1096	            description: previous.description || '',
1097	            undoStack: newUndoStack,
1098	            redoStack: [...project.redoStack, { grids: project.grids, currentMode: project.currentMode, description: project.description }],
1099	          }));
1100	        },
1101	
1102	        redo: () => {
1103	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
1104	          if (!activeProjectId) return;
1105	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
1106	
1107	          if (project.redoStack.length === 0) return;
1108	        
1109	          const next = project.redoStack[project.redoStack.length - 1];
1110	          const newRedoStack = project.redoStack.slice(0, -1);
1111	        
1112	          updateActiveProject(() => ({
1113	            grids: next.grids,
1114	            currentMode: next.currentMode,
1115	            description: next.description || '',
1116	            undoStack: [...project.undoStack, { grids: project.grids, currentMode: project.currentMode, description: project.description }],
1117	            redoStack: newRedoStack,
1118	          }));
1119	        },
1120	
1121	        _saveSnapshot: () => {
1122	          const { activeProjectId, projects } = get();
1123	          if (!activeProjectId) return;
1124	          const project = projects[activeProjectId];
1125	
1126	          updateActiveProject(() => ({
1127	            undoStack: [...project.undoStack, { grids: project.grids, currentMode: project.currentMode, description: project.description }],
1128	            redoStack: []
1129	          }));
1130	        }
1131	      };
1132	    },
1133	    {
1134	      name: 'kintting-design-project',
1135	      storage: createJSONStorage(() => createDebouncedForageStorage(DEFAULT_AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS), {
1136	        replacer: storageReplacer,
1137	        reviver: storageReviver,
1138	      }),
1139	      version: CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION,
1140	      partialize: (state) => ({
1141	        projects: state.projects,
1142	        deletedProjects: state.deletedProjects,
1143	        activeProjectId: state.activeProjectId,
1144	      }),
1145	      merge: (persistedState: any, currentState) => {
1146	        const merged = { ...currentState, ...(persistedState ?? {}) };
1147	        const activeProject = merged.activeProjectId ? merged.projects?.[merged.activeProjectId] : null;
1148	        return {
1149	          ...merged,
1150	          deletedProjects: merged.deletedProjects ?? {},
1151	          ...(activeProject ? projectView(activeProject) : emptyProjectView()),
1152	          clipboard: null,
1153	          validationResults: [],
1154	        };
1155	      },
1156	      migrate: (persistedState: any, version: number) => {
1157	        if (!persistedState || Object.keys(persistedState).length === 0) {
1158	          return {
1159	            projects: {},
1160	            deletedProjects: {},
1161	            activeProjectId: null,
1162	            clipboard: null,
1163	            validationResults: [],
1164	          };
1165	        }
1166	
1167	        if (version === 0 || typeof persistedState.version !== 'number') {
1168	          if (persistedState.projects && typeof persistedState.projects === 'object') {
1169	            const migratedProjects = Object.fromEntries(
1170	              Object.entries(persistedState.projects).map(([id, project]) => [id, normalizeProject(project)])
1171	            );
1172	
1173	            return {
1174	              projects: migratedProjects,
1175	              deletedProjects: {},
1176	              activeProjectId: persistedState.activeProjectId in migratedProjects ? persistedState.activeProjectId : Object.keys(migratedProjects)[0] ?? null,
1177	              clipboard: null,
1178	              validationResults: [],
1179	            };
1180	          }
1181	
1182	          const id = crypto.randomUUID();
1183	          const grids = persistedState.grids || { knit: [], crochet: [] };
1184	          const currentMode = persistedState.currentMode === 'crochet' ? 'crochet' : 'knit';
1185	
1186	          return {
1187	            projects: {
1188	              [id]: {
1189	                id,
1190	                name: 'Migrated Project',
1191	                lastModified: Date.now(),
1192	                deletedAt: undefined,
1193	                thumbnail: undefined,
1194	                version: CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION,
1195	                grids,
1196	                currentMode,
1197	                description: '',
1198	                textLocale: 'abbr' as TextLocale,
1199	                rowNumberDirection: 'row1_top' as RowNumberDirection,
1200	                undoStack: [],
1201	                redoStack: [],
1202	              }
1203	            },
1204	            deletedProjects: {},
1205	            activeProjectId: id,
1206	            clipboard: null,
1207	            validationResults: [],
1208	          };
1209	        }
1210	
1211	        if (version < CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION) {
1212	          if (persistedState.projects && typeof persistedState.projects === 'object') {
1213	            const upgradedProjects = Object.fromEntries(
1214	              Object.entries(persistedState.projects).map(([id, project]) => [id, normalizeProject(project)])
1215	            );
1216	
1217	            return {
1218	              projects: upgradedProjects,
1219	              deletedProjects: {},
1220	              activeProjectId: persistedState.activeProjectId in upgradedProjects ? persistedState.activeProjectId : Object.keys(upgradedProjects)[0] ?? null,
1221	              clipboard: null,
1222	              validationResults: [],
1223	            };
1224	          }
1225	        }
1226	
1227	        return persistedState;
1228	      },
1229	    }
1230	  )
1231	);
1232	
```

1	import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
2	import { Group, Image, Layer, Line, Rect, Stage, Text } from 'react-konva';

4	import { stitchRegistry } from '../../configs/stitchRegistry';
5	import { useCanvasStore } from '../../store/canvasStore';
6	import { useProjectStore } from '../../store/projectStore';
7	import {
8	  calculateZoomOffset,
9	  clamp,
10	  resolveGridCell,
11	  screenToGrid,
12	  toSelectedCellState,
13	} from '../../utils/coordinateTransform';
14	import { displayRowNumber } from '../../utils/rowNumbering';
15	import { CANVAS_CELL_SIZE, CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE, clampCanvasScale } from '../../constants/canvas';
16	import './grid.css';
17	
18	const StitchImage = ({ svgPath, width, height }: { svgPath: string; width: number; height: number }) => {
19	  const [image] = useImage(svgPath);
20	  if (!image) {
21	    return null;
22	  }
23	
24	  return <Image image={image} x={0} y={0} width={width} height={height} />;
25	};
26	
27	const GridKonva = ({ activeSymbolId }: { activeSymbolId: string | null }) => {
28	  const { grids, currentMode, applyCellChange, rowNumberDirection } = useProjectStore();
29	  const grid = grids[currentMode];
30	  const {
31	    viewportOffset,
32	    setViewportOffset,
33	    setViewportSize,
34	    scale,
35	    setScale,
36	    interactionMode,
37	    selectedCell,
38	    hoverRoot,
39	    highlightedRow,
40	    selectCell,
41	    clearSelection,
42	    setHoverRoot,
43	  } = useCanvasStore();
44	
45	  const stageRef = useRef<any>(null);
46	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
47	  const lastDrawPlacementRef = useRef<{
48	    row: number;
49	    col: number;
50	    stitchId: string;
51	    spanWidth: number;
52	    spanHeight: number;
53	  } | null>(null);
54	  const [size, setSize] = useState({ width: 800, height: 600 });
55	  const [isPanning, setIsPanning] = useState(false);
56	  const [isDrawing, setIsDrawing] = useState(false);
57	
58	  const gridRows = grid.length;
59	  const gridCols = grid[0]?.length ?? 0;
60	
61	  const clampViewportOffset = (nextOffset: { x: number; y: number }) => {
62	    const contentWidth = size.width - CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE;
63	    const contentHeight = size.height - CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE;
64	
65	    const minContentX = contentWidth - gridCols * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * scale;
66	    const minContentY = contentHeight - gridRows * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * scale;
67	
68	    return {
69	      x: clamp(nextOffset.x, Math.min(0, minContentX), 0),
70	      y: clamp(nextOffset.y, Math.min(0, minContentY), 0),
71	    };
72	  };
73	
74	  const getPointerPosition = (event?: any) => {
75	    const eventStage = event?.target?.getStage?.();
76	    return eventStage?.getPointerPosition?.() ?? stageRef.current?.getPointerPosition?.() ?? null;
77	  };
78	
79	  useEffect(() => {
80	    const handleResize = () => {
81	      if (!containerRef.current) {
82	        return;
83	      }
84	
85	      const nextSize = {
86	        width: containerRef.current.clientWidth,
87	        height: containerRef.current.clientHeight,
88	      };
89	
90	      setSize(nextSize);
91	      setViewportSize(nextSize);
92	    };
93	
94	    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
95	    window.setTimeout(handleResize, 50);
96	
97	    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
98	  }, [setViewportSize]);
99	
100	  useEffect(() => {
101	    setViewportOffset(clampViewportOffset(viewportOffset));
102	  }, [gridCols, gridRows, scale, size.height, size.width]);
103	
104	  const handleWheel = (event: any) => {
105	    event.evt.preventDefault();
106	    const pointer = getPointerPosition(event);
107	    const scaleBy = 1.1;
108	
109	    if (event.evt.ctrlKey) {
110	      if (!pointer) {
111	        return;
112	      }
113	
114	      const oldScale = scale;
115	      const newScale = clampCanvasScale(event.evt.deltaY < 0 ? oldScale * scaleBy : oldScale / scaleBy);
116	      const nextOffset = calculateZoomOffset(viewportOffset, oldScale, newScale, pointer);
117	
118	      setScale(newScale);
119	      setViewportOffset(clampViewportOffset(nextOffset));
120	      return;
121	    }
122	
123	    setViewportOffset(
124	      clampViewportOffset({
125	        x: viewportOffset.x - event.evt.deltaX,
126	        y: viewportOffset.y - event.evt.deltaY,
127	      })
128	    );
129	  };
130	
131	  const resolvePointer = (pointer: { x: number; y: number }) => {
132	    const logical = screenToGrid(pointer, viewportOffset, scale, CANVAS_CELL_SIZE);
133	    return resolveGridCell(grid, logical.row, logical.col);
134	  };
135	
136	  const drawAtPointer = (pointer: { x: number; y: number }) => {
137	    const logical = screenToGrid(pointer, viewportOffset, scale, CANVAS_CELL_SIZE);
138	    let row = logical.row;
139	    let col = logical.col;
140	
141	    if (interactionMode === 'DRAW' && activeSymbolId) {
142	      const symbol = stitchRegistry[activeSymbolId];
143	      if (!symbol) {
144	        return;
145	      }
146	
147	      const lastPlacement = lastDrawPlacementRef.current;
148	      if (
149	        lastPlacement &&
150	        lastPlacement.stitchId === symbol.id &&
151	        logical.row >= lastPlacement.row &&
152	        logical.row < lastPlacement.row + lastPlacement.spanHeight &&
153	        logical.col >= lastPlacement.col &&
154	        logical.col < lastPlacement.col + lastPlacement.spanWidth
155	      ) {
156	        return;
157	      }
158	
159	      if (applyCellChange(row, col, symbol.nameZh, symbol.svgPath, symbol.id)) {
160	        lastDrawPlacementRef.current = {
161	          row,
162	          col,
163	          stitchId: symbol.id,
164	          spanWidth: symbol.span.width,
165	          spanHeight: symbol.span.height,
166	        };
167	        selectCell({
168	          anchor: logical,
169	          root: { row, col },
170	        });
171	      }
172	
173	      return;
174	    }
175	
176	    if (interactionMode === 'ERASE' && applyCellChange(logical.row, logical.col, '', undefined, undefined)) {
177	      clearSelection();
178	    }
179	  };
180	
181	  const handlePointerDown = (event: any) => {
182	    const pointer = getPointerPosition(event);
183	    if (!pointer) return;
184	
185	    const isRightClick = event.evt.button === 2;
186	    const resolved = resolvePointer(pointer);
187	
188	    setHoverRoot(resolved?.root ?? null);
189	
190	    if (interactionMode === 'PAN' || event.evt.button === 1 || isRightClick) {
191	      setIsPanning(true);
192	      return;
193	    }
194	
195	    if (interactionMode === 'SELECT') {
196	      if (!resolved || !resolved.cell?.stitchId) {
197	        clearSelection();
198	        return;
199	      }
200	
201	      selectCell(toSelectedCellState(resolved));
202	      return;
203	    }
204	
205	    if (interactionMode === 'DRAW' || interactionMode === 'ERASE') {
206	      setIsDrawing(true);
207	      drawAtPointer(pointer);
208	    }
209	  };
210	
211	  const handlePointerMove = (event: any) => {
212	    if (isPanning) {
213	      setViewportOffset(
214	        clampViewportOffset({
215	          x: viewportOffset.x + event.evt.movementX,
216	          y: viewportOffset.y + event.evt.movementY,
217	        })
218	      );
219	      return;
220	    }
221	
222	    const hoverPointer = getPointerPosition(event);
223	    if (hoverPointer) {
224	      const hoverResolved = resolvePointer(hoverPointer);
225	      setHoverRoot(hoverResolved?.root ?? null);
226	    }
227	
228	    if (!isDrawing) {
229	      return;
230	    }
231	
232	    const pointer = getPointerPosition(event);
233	    if (!pointer) {
234	      return;
235	    }
236	
237	    drawAtPointer(pointer);
238	  };
239	
240	  const handlePointerUp = () => {
241	    setIsPanning(false);
242	    setIsDrawing(false);
243	    lastDrawPlacementRef.current = null;
244	  };
245	
246	  const selectedHighlights = useMemo(() => {
247	    if (!selectedCell) {
248	      return [];
249	    }
250	
251	    const resolved = resolveGridCell(grid, selectedCell.root.row, selectedCell.root.col);
252	    if (!resolved?.cell) {
253	      return [];
254	    }
255	
256	    const stitchDef = resolved.cell.stitchId ? stitchRegistry[resolved.cell.stitchId] : null;
257	    const spanWidth = stitchDef?.span.width ?? 1;
258	    const spanHeight = stitchDef?.span.height ?? 1;
259	
260	    return [
261	      {
262	        key: `selected-${resolved.root.row}-${resolved.root.col}`,
263	        x: resolved.root.col * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
264	        y: resolved.root.row * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
265	        width: CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * spanWidth,
266	        height: CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * spanHeight,
267	      },
268	    ];
269	  }, [grid, selectedCell]);
270	
271	  const visibleCells = useMemo(() => {
272	    if (!grid.length || !grid[0]?.length) {
273	      return { cells: [] as Array<{ row: number; col: number; cell: (typeof grid)[number][number] }>, gridLines: [] as Array<{ points: number[]; key: string }> };
274	    }
275	
276	    const scaledCellSize = CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * scale;
277	    const startCol = Math.max(0, Math.floor(-viewportOffset.x / scaledCellSize));
278	    const endCol = Math.min(grid[0].length - 1, Math.ceil((size.width - viewportOffset.x) / scaledCellSize));
279	    const startRow = Math.max(0, Math.floor(-viewportOffset.y / scaledCellSize));
280	    const endRow = Math.min(grid.length - 1, Math.ceil((size.height - viewportOffset.y) / scaledCellSize));
281	
282	    const cells = [];
283	    for (let row = startRow; row <= endRow; row += 1) {
284	      for (let col = startCol; col <= endCol; col += 1) {
285	        cells.push({ row, col, cell: grid[row][col] ?? { bg: 'white' } });
286	      }
287	    }
288	
289	    const gridLines = [];
290	    const maxGridCol = grid[0].length;
291	    const maxGridRow = grid.length;
292	
293	    for (let col = startCol; col <= endCol + 1; col += 1) {
294	      if (col > maxGridCol) {
295	        break;
296	      }
297	
298	      gridLines.push({
299	        points: [
300	          col * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
301	          startRow * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
302	          col * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
303	          Math.min(endRow + 1, maxGridRow) * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
304	        ],
305	        key: `v-${col}`,
306	      });
307	    }
308	
309	    for (let row = startRow; row <= endRow + 1; row += 1) {
310	      if (row > maxGridRow) {
311	        break;
312	      }
313	
314	      gridLines.push({
315	        points: [
316	          startCol * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
317	          row * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
318	          Math.min(endCol + 1, maxGridCol) * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
319	          row * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE,
320	        ],
321	        key: `h-${row}`,
322	      });
323	    }
324	
325	    return { cells, gridLines };
326	  }, [grid, scale, size.height, size.width, viewportOffset.x, viewportOffset.y]);
327	
328	  const gridCursor = interactionMode === 'PAN' || isPanning ? 'grab' : interactionMode === 'SELECT' ? 'pointer' : 'crosshair';
329	
330	  return (
331	    <div ref={containerRef} className="grid-container konva-wrapper" data-testid="grid-root" style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', outline: 'none' }}>
332	      <Stage
333	        ref={stageRef}
334	        width={size.width}
335	        height={size.height}
336	        onWheel={handleWheel}
337	        onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}
338	        onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}
339	        onPointerUp={handlePointerUp}
340	        onMouseLeave={handlePointerUp}
341	        onContextMenu={(event: any) => event.evt.preventDefault()}
342	        style={{ cursor: gridCursor }}
343	      >
344	        <Layer x={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE + viewportOffset.x} y={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE + viewportOffset.y} scaleX={scale} scaleY={scale}>
345	          {visibleCells.cells.map(({ row, col, cell }) => (
346	            <Rect
347	              key={`bg-${row}-${col}`}
348	              x={col * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}
349	              y={row * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}
350	              width={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}
351	              height={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}
352	              fill={cell.bg || 'white'}
353	              listening={false}
354	            />
355	          ))}
356	
357	          {visibleCells.gridLines.map((line) => (
358	            <Line key={line.key} points={line.points} stroke="#e2e8f0" strokeWidth={1 / scale} listening={false} />
359	          ))}
360	
361	          {visibleCells.cells.map(({ row, col, cell }) => {
362	            if (cell.isSpanChild || !cell.svgPath) {
363	              return null;
364	            }
365	
366	            const stitchDef = cell.stitchId ? stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId] : null;
367	            const spanWidth = stitchDef?.span.width ?? 1;
368	            const spanHeight = stitchDef?.span.height ?? 1;
369	
370	            return (
371	              <Group key={`stitch-${row}-${col}`} x={col * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE} y={row * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}>
372	                <StitchImage svgPath={cell.svgPath} width={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * spanWidth} height={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * spanHeight} />
373	              </Group>
374	            );
375	          })}
376	
377	          {highlightedRow !== null ? (
378	            <Rect
379	              x={0}
380	              y={highlightedRow * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}
381	              width={gridCols * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}
382	              height={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE}
383	              fill="rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.14)"
384	              stroke="#f59e0b"
385	              strokeWidth={2 / scale}
386	              listening={false}
387	            />
388	          ) : null}
389	
390	          {selectedHighlights.map((highlight) => (
391	            <Rect
392	              key={`selected-${highlight.key}`}
393	              x={highlight.x}
394	              y={highlight.y}
395	              width={highlight.width}
396	              height={highlight.height}
397	              stroke="#0ea5e9"
398	              strokeWidth={2 / scale}
399	              dash={[6 / scale, 4 / scale]}
400	              fill="rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.12)"
401	              listening={false}
402	            />
403	          ))}
404	
405	          {hoverRoot && (
406	            <Rect
407	              x={hoverRoot.col * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE + 1.5}
408	              y={hoverRoot.row * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE + 1.5}
409	              width={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE - 3}
410	              height={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE - 3}
411	              fill={
412	                interactionMode === 'ERASE'
413	                  ? 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)'
414	                  : interactionMode === 'SELECT'
415	                  ? 'rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.15)'
416	                  : 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.15)'
417	              }
418	              stroke={
419	                interactionMode === 'ERASE'
420	                  ? '#ef4444'
421	                  : interactionMode === 'SELECT'
422	                  ? '#0ea5e9'
423	                  : '#10b981'
424	              }
425	              strokeWidth={1.5 / scale}
426	              listening={false}
427	            />
428	          )}
429	        </Layer>
430	
431	        <Layer>
432	          <Rect x={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} y={0} width={size.width} height={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#e2e8f0" strokeWidth={1} />
433	          <Rect x={0} y={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} width={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} height={size.height} fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#e2e8f0" strokeWidth={1} />
434	          <Rect x={0} y={0} width={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} height={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} fill="#f1f5f9" stroke="#cbd5e1" strokeWidth={1} />
435	
436	          <Group clipX={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} clipY={0} clipWidth={size.width - CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} clipHeight={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE}>
437	            <Group y={0}>
438	              {Array.from(new Set(visibleCells.cells.map((cell) => cell.col))).map((col) => (
439	                <Text
440	                  key={`col-${col}`}
441	                  text={`${col + 1}`}
442	                  x={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE + col * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * scale + viewportOffset.x}
443	                  y={0}
444	                  width={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * scale}
445	                  height={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE}
446	                  align="center"
447	                  verticalAlign="middle"
448	                  fill="#64748b"
449	                  fontSize={12}
450	                />
451	              ))}
452	            </Group>
453	          </Group>
454	
455	          <Group clipX={0} clipY={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} clipWidth={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE} clipHeight={size.height - CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE}>
456	            <Group x={0}>
457	              {Array.from(new Set(visibleCells.cells.map((cell) => cell.row))).map((row) => (
458	                <Text
459	                  key={`row-${row}`}
460	                  text={`${displayRowNumber(row, gridRows, rowNumberDirection)}`}
461	                  x={0}
462	                  y={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE + row * CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * scale + viewportOffset.y}
463	                  width={CANVAS_HEADER_SIZE}
464	                  height={CANVAS_CELL_SIZE * scale}
465	                  align="center"
466	                  verticalAlign="middle"
467	                  fill="#64748b"
468	                  fontSize={12}
469	                />
470	              ))}
471	            </Group>
472	          </Group>
473	        </Layer>
474	      </Stage>
475	    </div>
476	  );
477	};
478	
479	export default GridKonva;
480	
```

#### Thinking

Now I have a clear picture. Let me give the user a thoughtful recommendation on priorities.

The three issues:
1. Crochet mapping logic not implemented - but actually, the translator IS mode-agnostic and works for both. The real issue might be that crochet-specific WS mapping isn't set up properly, or that the crochet grid doesn't have proper RS/WS handling.

2. UI style needs improvement - navbar too large

3. Stitch palette only shows 6 symbols - the `renderSymbolRail()` only shows up to 6 symbols, but there are 100+ stitches in the registry. Users can't access most stitches. The `SymbolPanel.tsx` exists but isn't integrated.
 
Looking at the priorities, the stitch palette limitation is the real blocker—users can't access most of the 100+ stitches since only 6 are visible, and the multi-cell span functionality hasn't been properly tested because of this. The crochet mapping is less urgent since the translator already handles it mode-agnostically, and the UI tweaks are just polish. So I should focus on fixing the stitch palette first to unlock everything else.

基于对代码的了解，我的建议是**先解决第 3 点（针法面板可见性）**，原因如下：

**第 3 点是瓶颈问题。** 目前 `App.tsx` 里的 `renderSymbolRail()` 只展示了最多 6 个针法按钮，但注册表里有 100+ 种针法。这意味着用户根本选不到大部分针法，多格跨度针法（c4f 占 4 格、c6f 占 6 格等）自然也没法被测试。而且项目里已经有一个写好的 `SymbolPanel.tsx` 组件（按分类分组、带 span 标记、网格布局），只是还没接入。把这个面板集成进去，既能解决可见性问题，又能顺带验证多格针法的绘制和编译逻辑。

**第 1 点（钩针映射）的优先级可以稍后。** 因为 `translator.ts` 的编译/解析逻辑本身是 mode-agnostic 的，钩针和棒针共用同一套 "Row N: ..." 文本格式。钩针针法的 `wsStitchId` 目前大多指向自己（比如 `cr-ch → cr-ch`），这意味着钩针的反面映射还没有像棒针那样做 RS/WS 区分。但这不影响基本使用，可以等针法面板上线后再逐步完善。

**第 2 点（UI 紧凑化）属于视觉优化，** 放在功能完善之后做更合理。

所以建议顺序：**针法面板集成 → 钩针 RS/WS 映射完善 → UI 紧凑化调整**。要开始做第 3 点吗？

1	import { useMemo } from "react";
2	import { StitchDefinition } from "../../configs/stitchRegistry";
3	import { getSpanRule } from "../../configs/spanRules";
4	import "./symbol-panel.css";
5	
6	export type SymbolPanelProps = {
7	  symbols: StitchDefinition[];
8	  selectedSymbolId?: string | null;
9	  onPick: (id: string, svgPath: string) => void;
10	};
11	
12	const SymbolPanel = ({ symbols, selectedSymbolId, onPick }: SymbolPanelProps) => {
13	  const grouped = useMemo(() => {
14	    const map = new Map<string, StitchDefinition[]>();
15	    symbols.forEach((symbol) => {
16	      const key = symbol.category || "other";
17	      if (!map.has(key)) {
18	        map.set(key, []);
19	      }
20	      map.get(key)?.push(symbol);
21	    });
22	    return map;
23	  }, [symbols]);
24	
25	  return (
26	    <div className="symbol-panel">
27	      {[...grouped.entries()].map(([category, list]) => (
28	        <div className="symbol-group" key={category}>
29	          <div className="symbol-group-title">{category === "knit" ? "棒针" : category === "crochet" ? "钩针" : category}</div>
30	          <div className="symbol-grid">
31	            {list.map((symbol) => {
32	              const span = getSpanRule(symbol.id);
33	              const isMultiCell = span.width > 1;
34	              return (
35	                <button
36	                  type="button"
37	                  key={symbol.id}
38	                  className={`symbol-button ${selectedSymbolId === symbol.id ? "selected" : ""} ${isMultiCell ? "multi-cell" : ""}`}
39	                  style={isMultiCell ? { gridColumn: `span ${Math.min(span.width, 4)}` } : undefined}
40	                  onClick={() => onPick(symbol.id, symbol.svgPath)}
41	                  title={`${symbol.nameZh}${isMultiCell ? ` (${span.width}格)` : ""}`}
42	                >
43	                  <div className="symbol-svg-preview">
44	                    <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
45	                  </div>
46	                  <span className="symbol-label">{symbol.nameZh}</span>
47	                  {isMultiCell && <span className="span-badge">{span.width}格</span>}
48	                </button>
49	              );
50	            })}
51	          </div>
52	        </div>
53	      ))}
54	    </div>
55	  );
56	};
57	
58	export default SymbolPanel;
59	
```

52	const createPresetGrid = (mode: ProjectMode, rows: number, cols: number): CellData[][] => {
53	  const sequence =
54	    mode === 'knit'
55	      ? ['k-knit', 'p-purl', 'k-knit', 'yo', 'ssk', 'k2tog']
56	      : ['cr-sc', 'cr-ch', 'cr-dc', 'cr-hdc', 'cr-slst', 'cr-sc'];
57	
58	  return Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) =>
59	    Array.from({ length: cols }, (_, col) => {
60	      if ((row + col) % 5 === 0) {
61	        return {};
62	      }
63	
64	      const stitchId = sequence[(row * 3 + col) % sequence.length];
65	      const definition = stitchRegistry[stitchId];
66	
67	      return definition
68	        ? {
69	            char: definition.nameZh,
70	            svgPath: definition.svgPath,
71	            stitchId: definition.id,
72	            isSpanChild: false,
73	          }
74	        : {};
75	    })
76	  );
77	};

362	    }
363	
364	    const nextId = duplicateProject(activeProjectId);
365	    if (nextId) {
366	      clearSelection();
367	      setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
368	      setNotice('项目副本已创建。');
369	    }
370	  };
371	
372	  const handleDeleteProject = (id: string) => {
373	    const project = projects[id];
374	    if (!project || !window.confirm(`删除项目“${project.name}”？`)) {
375	      return;
376	    }
377	
378	    deleteProject(id);
379	    clearSelection();
380	    setNotice(`已删除项目：${project.name}`);
381	  };
382	
383	  const handleSwitchProject = (id: string) => {
384	    switchProject(id);
385	    clearSelection();
386	    setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
387	    setNotice(`已打开项目：${projects[id]?.name ?? id}`);
388	  };
389	
390	  const applyAiPresetToProject = () => {
391	    const knitPreset = createPresetGrid('knit', 32, 32);
392	    replaceModeGrid('knit', knitPreset);
393	    clearSelection();
394	    setScale(1);
395	    setInteractionMode('DRAW');
396	    setActiveSymbolId('c4f');
397	    setActivePage('workspace');
398	    setNotice('AI 纹样映射已应用到棒针工作区，可继续精修。');
399	  };
400	
401	  const confirmExport = async () => {
402	    if (isExporting) {
403	      return;
404	    }
405	
406	    const presetLabel =
407	      exportPreset === 'professional' ? '商用专业版' : exportPreset === 'draft' ? '交流草稿版' : '社交分享版';
408	    setNotice(`${presetLabel} 导出任务正在进行中，水印内容为“${watermarkText || '未设置'}”。`);
409	    setIsExporting(true);
410	
411	    try {
412	      const snapshot = exportSnapshot();
413	      const pdfBlob = await exportProjectAsPDF(snapshot, {
414	        watermarkText,
415	        scale: 1,
416	      });
417	      const url = URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob);
418	      const anchor = document.createElement('a');
419	      anchor.href = url;
420	      anchor.download = 'mykintting-design.pdf';
421	      document.body.appendChild(anchor);
422	      anchor.click();
423	      document.body.removeChild(anchor);
424	      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
425	      setNotice(`导出完成：已生成 PDF 并自动下载，水印“${watermarkText || '未设置'}”。`);
426	    } catch (error: any) {
427	      setNotice(`导出失败：${error?.message ?? '未知错误'}`);
428	    } finally {
429	      setIsExporting(false);
430	    }
431	  };
432	
433	  const renderSymbolRail = (symbols: StitchDefinition[]) => (
434	    <div className="studio-list">
435	      {symbols.slice(0, 6).map((symbol) => (
436	        <button
437	          key={symbol.id}
438	          type="button"
439	          className={`symbol-button studio-list-item${activeSymbolId === symbol.id ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
440	          onClick={() => handleSymbolPick(symbol.id)}
441	        >
442	          <span className="studio-list-thumb">
443	            <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
444	          </span>
445	          <span className="studio-list-copy">
446	            <strong>{symbol.nameZh}</strong>
447	            <small>{symbol.nameEn ?? (currentMode === 'knit' ? 'Knitting' : 'Crochet')}</small>
448	          </span>
449	        </button>
450	      ))}
451	    </div>
452	  );
453	
454	  const renderWorkspacePage = () => (
455	    <div className="page-stack">
456	      {expiringProjectsCount > 0 && (
457	        <div className="expiration-banner">
458	          <div className="expiration-banner-content">
459	            <span className="expiration-icon">⚠️</span>
460	            <div className="expiration-text">
461	              <strong>注意：{expiringProjectsCount} 个项目即将回收</strong>
462	              <p>最近 7 天未使用的项目将在 10 天后自动移入回收站。请及时查看项目管理面板。</p>
463	            </div>
464	            <button 
465	              type="button" 
466	              className="expiration-action-btn"
467	              onClick={() => setIsProjectPanelOpen(true)}
468	            >
469	              查看项目
470	            </button>
471	          </div>
472	        </div>
473	      )}
474	      <section className="page-hero">
475	        <div>
476	          <div className="text-base font-bold">复杂提花：北极星图案</div>
477	        </div>
478	        <div className="hero-actions">
479	          <span className="hero-pill">Delta: +2</span>
480	          <span className="hero-pill muted">{Math.round(scale * 100)}%</span>
481	        </div>
482	      </section>
483	
484	      <section className="workspace-layout">

489	            ))}
490	          </div>

492	            <div className="canvas-main-row">

494	                <Grid activeSymbolId={activeSymbolId} />
495	              </div>
496	            </div>
497	            <div className="floating-tool-rail">
498	              <button type="button" onClick={() => updateScale(scale + 0.1)}>
499	                +
500	              </button>
501	              <button type="button" onClick={() => updateScale(scale - 0.1)}>
502	                -
503	              </button>
504	              <button type="button" onClick={() => setInteractionMode('SELECT')}>
505	                光标
506	              </button>
507	              <button type="button" onClick={() => setCalculatorOpen(true)}>
508	                换算
509	              </button>
510	            </div>
511	          </div>
512	        </div>
513	
514	        <aside className="workspace-side">
515	          <div className="studio-card compact flush-top">
516	            <div className="studio-card-header">
517	              <div>
518	                <span className="card-kicker">工作台侧栏</span>
519	                <h3>右侧映射面板</h3>
520	              </div>
521	              <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
522	                <button
523	                  type="button"
524	                  className="ghost-button"
525	                  onClick={() => {
526	                    const input = window.prompt('设置自动保存间隔（秒）。输入正数，例如 10 表示 10 秒。', String(Math.round(autosaveMs / 1000)));
527	                    if (!input) return;
528	                    const sec = Number(input);
529	                    if (Number.isNaN(sec) || sec <= 0) {
530	                      setNotice('请输入大于 0 的数字。');
531	                      return;
532	                    }
533	                    const ms = Math.round(sec * 1000);
534	                    try {
535	                      window.localStorage.setItem('kintting:autosaveDelayMs', String(ms));
536	                      setAutosaveMs(ms);
537	                      setNotice(`自动保存间隔已设置为 ${sec} 秒。`);
538	                    } catch (e) {
539	                      setNotice('无法保存设置（localStorage 失败）。');
540	                    }
541	                  }}
542	                  title="设置自动保存间隔"
543	                >
544	                  自动保存: {Math.round(autosaveMs / 1000)}s
545	                </button>
546	              </div>
547	            </div>
548	          </div>
549	
550	          <>
551	            {/* Existing right sidebar content */}
552	            <div className="studio-card compact">
553	              <div className="studio-card-header">
554	                <div>
555	                  <span className="card-kicker">当前笔刷</span>
556	                  <h3>{activeSymbol?.nameZh ?? '未选择针法'}</h3>
557	                </div>
558	                <span className="hero-pill muted">{currentMode === 'knit' ? '棒针' : '钩针'}</span>
559	              </div>
560	              <p className="muted-copy">{selectedInfo?.detail ?? '选择任意单元格后，这里会展示当前针法详情。'}</p>
561	              <div className="tool-grid">
562	                {TOOLBAR_TOOLS.map((tool) => (
563	                  <button
564	                    key={tool.id}
565	                    type="button"
566	                    className={`tool-chip${interactionMode === tool.id ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
567	                    data-testid={`tool-${tool.id.toLowerCase()}`}
568	                    onClick={() => setInteractionMode(tool.id)}
569	                  >
570	                    <strong>{tool.short}</strong>
571	                    <span>{tool.label}</span>
572	                  </button>
573	                ))}
574	              </div>
575	              {renderSymbolRail(availableSymbols)}
576	              <div className="studio-range-row">
577	                <label htmlFor="canvas-scale">缩放</label>
578	                <input
579	                  id="canvas-scale"
580	                  type="range"
581	                  min={CANVAS_SCALE_MIN}
582	                  max={CANVAS_SCALE_MAX}
583	                  step={0.05}
584	                  value={scale}
585	                  onChange={(event) => updateScale(Number(event.target.value))}
586	                  aria-label="画布缩放"
587	                />
588	              </div>
589	              <div className="studio-button-row">
590	                <button type="button" className="ghost-button icon-only-button" onClick={undo} disabled={!undoStack.length} aria-label="Undo" title="Undo">
591	                  ↩
592	                </button>
593	                <button type="button" className="ghost-button icon-only-button" onClick={redo} disabled={!redoStack.length} aria-label="Redo" title="Redo">
594	                  ↪
595	                </button>
596	              </div>
597	
598	              <div className="studio-meta-grid">
599	                <span>选择</span>
600	                <strong>{selectedPosition}</strong>
601	                <span>状态</span>
602	                <strong>{previousMode ? `临时 ${interactionMode}` : interactionMode}</strong>
603	              </div>
604	            </div>
605	
606	            <div className="studio-card compact">
607	              <TextEditor />
608	            </div>
609	
610	
611	            <div className="tracker-card">
612	              <span className="card-kicker">进度追踪</span>
613	              <div className="tracker-ring">
614	                <strong>{projectCompletion}%</strong>
615	                <span>已完成</span>
616	              </div>
617	              <div className="tracker-stat">
618	                <strong>
619	                  第 {Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filledCellCount / Math.max(gridCols, 1)))} 行 / 共 {gridRows} 行
620	                </strong>
621	                <span>
622	                  填充 {filledCellCount}/{gridRows * gridCols}
623	                </span>
624	              </div>
625	            </div>
626	          </>
627	        </aside>

```

#### Thinking

Now I have a clear picture. Let me also check the SymbolPanel CSS and the spanRules to understand the full picture.

Key findings:
1. `renderSymbolRail()` in App.tsx (line 433-452) only shows the first 6 symbols - this is the bottleneck
2. `SymbolPanel.tsx` exists as a complete component with grouping, span badges, grid layout - but it's NOT imported or used anywhere
3. The SymbolPanel is used in two places in App.tsx: `renderWorkspacePage()` (line 575) and `renderCrochetPage()` (line 811) - both call `renderSymbolRail(availableSymbols)`


4. The `handleSymbolPick` function takes just a symbolId and uses the current mode, but SymbolPanel's `onPick` callback expects both an id and svgPath, so I need to reconcile these signatures when integrating the component.

My plan is to import SymbolPanel, replace both `renderSymbolRail` calls with it, and adjust the callback to match what SymbolPanel expects.

I should also verify that the CSS file exists and check whether the grouping logic in SymbolPanel—which currently groups by category—will work well since all symbols in a mode share the same category, meaning they'd all end up in one group anyway.

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\configs\spanRules.ts`

542	export const getSpanRule = (id: string): SpanRule =>
543	  SPAN_RULES[id] ?? { width: 1, height: 1, source: "semantic", note: "默认单格" };

**Output:**

```json
1	import { useMemo } from "react";
2	import { StitchDefinition } from "../../configs/stitchRegistry";
3	import { getSpanRule } from "../../configs/spanRules";
4	import "./symbol-panel.css";
5	
6	export type SymbolPanelProps = {
7	  symbols: StitchDefinition[];
8	  selectedSymbolId?: string | null;
9	  onPick: (id: string, svgPath: string) => void;
10	};
11	
12	const SymbolPanel = ({ symbols, selectedSymbolId, onPick }: SymbolPanelProps) => {
13	  const grouped = useMemo(() => {
14	    const map = new Map<string, StitchDefinition[]>();
15	    symbols.forEach((symbol) => {
16	      const key = symbol.category || "other";
17	      if (!map.has(key)) {
18	        map.set(key, []);
19	      }
20	      map.get(key)?.push(symbol);
21	    });
22	    return map;
23	  }, [symbols]);
24	
25	  return (
26	    <div className="symbol-panel">
27	      {[...grouped.entries()].map(([category, list]) => (
28	        <div className="symbol-group" key={category}>
29	          <div className="symbol-group-title">{category === "knit" ? "棒针" : category === "crochet" ? "钩针" : category}</div>
30	          <div className="symbol-grid">
31	            {list.map((symbol) => {
32	              const span = getSpanRule(symbol.id);
33	              const isMultiCell = span.width > 1;
34	              return (
35	                <button
36	                  type="button"
37	                  key={symbol.id}
38	                  className={`symbol-button ${selectedSymbolId === symbol.id ? "selected" : ""} ${isMultiCell ? "multi-cell" : ""}`}
39	                  style={isMultiCell ? { gridColumn: `span ${Math.min(span.width, 4)}` } : undefined}
40	                  onClick={() => onPick(symbol.id, symbol.svgPath)}
41	                  title={`${symbol.nameZh}${isMultiCell ? ` (${span.width}格)` : ""}`}
42	                >
43	                  <div className="symbol-svg-preview">
44	                    <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
45	                  </div>
46	                  <span className="symbol-label">{symbol.nameZh}</span>
47	                  {isMultiCell && <span className="span-badge">{span.width}格</span>}
48	                </button>
49	              );
50	            })}
51	          </div>
52	        </div>
53	      ))}
54	    </div>
55	  );
56	};
57	
58	export default SymbolPanel;
59	
```

1	.symbol-panel {
2	  display: flex;
3	  flex-direction: column;
4	  gap: 12px;
5	  height: 100%;
6	  overflow-y: auto; /* 允许超出时滚动 */
7	  padding-right: 8px; /* 预留滚动条空间 */
8	}
9	
10	.symbol-group {
11	  display: flex;
12	  flex-direction: column;
13	  gap: 8px;
14	}
15	
16	.symbol-group-title {
17	  font-size: 13px;
18	  font-weight: 700;
19	  color: #374151;
20	  text-transform: uppercase;
21	  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
22	}
23	
24	.symbol-grid {
25	  display: grid;
26	  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
27	  gap: 10px;
28	}
29	
30	.symbol-button {
31	  display: flex;
32	  flex-direction: column;
33	  align-items: center;
34	  gap: 8px;
35	  padding: 12px 8px;
36	  border-radius: 8px;
37	  border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
38	  background: #ffffff;
39	  cursor: pointer;
40	  transition: all 0.2s ease;
41	  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1.1;
42	  justify-content: center;
43	}
44	
45	.symbol-button:hover {
46	  border-color: #3b82f6;
47	  background: #eff6ff;
48	}
49	
50	.symbol-button.selected {
51	  border-color: #3b82f6;
52	  background: #eff6ff;
53	  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
54	}
55	
56	.symbol-svg-preview {
57	  width: 100%;
58	  flex: 1;
59	  display: flex;
60	  align-items: center;
61	  justify-content: center;
62	  overflow: hidden;
63	}
64	
65	.symbol-svg-preview img {
66	  width: 100%;
67	  height: 100%;
68	  object-fit: contain;
69	  padding: 4px;
70	  filter: brightness(0); /* 强制所有 SVG 渲染为纯黑，以防某些 SVG 颜色过浅或带透明度 */
71	}
72	
73	.symbol-label {
74	  font-size: 11px;
75	  color: #4b5563;
76	  text-align: center;
77	  white-space: nowrap;
78	  overflow: hidden;
79	  text-overflow: ellipsis;
80	  width: 100%;
81	}
82	
83	/* 多格针法样式 */
84	.symbol-button.multi-cell {
85	  border-color: #f59e0b;
86	  background: #fffbeb;
87	  position: relative;
88	}
89	
90	.symbol-button.multi-cell:hover {
91	  border-color: #d97706;
92	  background: #fef3c7;
93	}
94	
95	.symbol-button.multi-cell.selected {
96	  border-color: #d97706;
97	  background: #fef3c7;
98	  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.3);
99	}
100	
101	/* 跨度标签 */
102	.span-badge {
103	  position: absolute;
104	  top: 4px;
105	  right: 4px;
106	  background: #f59e0b;
107	  color: #fff;
108	  font-size: 9px;
109	  font-weight: 700;
110	  padding: 1px 5px;
111	  border-radius: 8px;
112	  line-height: 1.3;
113	  pointer-events: none;
114	}
115

44	  { id: 'c4f', title: '桂花针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 1 上 1 下', tone: 'rose' },
45	  { id: 'yo', title: '空加针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 全下针', tone: 'teal' },
46	  { id: 'ssk', title: '左并针', subtitle: '基础系列 | 2 并 1', tone: 'amber' },
47	  { id: 'c2b', title: '扭花', subtitle: '基础系列 | 交替', tone: 'forest' },
48	] as const;
49	
50	const clampScale = clampCanvasScale;
51	
52	const createPresetGrid = (mode: ProjectMode, rows: number, cols: number): CellData[][] => {
53	  const sequence =
54	    mode === 'knit'
55	      ? ['k-knit', 'p-purl', 'k-knit', 'yo', 'ssk', 'k2tog']
56	      : ['cr-sc', 'cr-ch', 'cr-dc', 'cr-hdc', 'cr-slst', 'cr-sc'];
57	
58	  return Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) =>
59	    Array.from({ length: cols }, (_, col) => {
60	      if ((row + col) % 5 === 0) {
61	        return {};
62	      }
63	
64	      const stitchId = sequence[(row * 3 + col) % sequence.length];
65	      const definition = stitchRegistry[stitchId];
66	
67	      return definition
68	        ? {
69	            char: definition.nameZh,
70	            svgPath: definition.svgPath,
71	            stitchId: definition.id,
72	            isSpanChild: false,
73	          }
74	        : {};
75	    })
76	  );
77	};
78	
79	function App() {
80	  useInteractionStateMachine();

130	  const purgeExpiredProjects = useProjectStore((state) => state.purgeExpiredProjects);

132	  const redo = useProjectStore((state) => state.redo);
133	  const exportSnapshot = useProjectStore((state) => state.exportSnapshot);
134	
135	  const rowNumberDirection = useProjectStore((state) => state.rowNumberDirection);
136

139	    [projects]

142	    () => Object.values(deletedProjects).sort((a, b) => b.deletedAt! - a.deletedAt!),
143	    [deletedProjects]
144	  );
145	  const activeProject = activeProjectId ? projects[activeProjectId] : null;

147	  const interactionMode = useCanvasStore((state) => state.interactionMode);

154	
155	  useEffect(() => {
156	    if (!grids.knit.length || !grids.crochet.length) {
157	      initGrid(DEFAULT_GRID_ROWS, DEFAULT_GRID_COLS);
158	    }
