164	    }
165	  }, [activePage, purgeExpiredProjects]);
166	
167	  useEffect(() => {
168	    const fontSet = (document as unknown as { fonts?: FontFaceSet }).fonts;
169	    if (!fontSet) {
170	      setFontsReady(true);
171	      return;
172	    }
173	
174	    const uniqueFamilies = Array.from(
175	      new Set(Object.values(stitchRegistry).map((definition) => definition.svgPath.split('/')[2] ?? 'StitchMasteryDash'))
176	    );
177	
178	    Promise.all(uniqueFamilies.map((name) => fontSet.load(`16px "${name}"`)))
179	      .then(() => setFontsReady(true))
180	      .catch(() => setFontsReady(true));
181	  }, []);
182	
183	  const availableSymbols = useMemo<StitchDefinition[]>(
184	    () => Object.values(stitchRegistry).filter((definition) => definition.category === currentMode),
185	    [currentMode]
186	  );
187	
188	  const activeSymbol = useMemo(
189	    () => availableSymbols.find((definition) => definition.id === activeSymbolId) ?? null,
190	    [activeSymbolId, availableSymbols]
191	  );
192	
193	  useEffect(() => {
194	    if (!availableSymbols.length) {
195	      setActiveSymbolId(null);
196	      return;
197	    }
198	
199	    if (!activeSymbolId || !availableSymbols.some((definition) => definition.id === activeSymbolId)) {
200	      setActiveSymbolId(availableSymbols[0].id);
201	    }
202	  }, [activeSymbolId, availableSymbols]);
203	
204	  const currentGrid = grids[currentMode];
205	  const gridRows = currentGrid.length;
206	  const gridCols = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
207	
208	  const filledCellCount = useMemo(
209	    () => currentGrid.flat().filter((cell) => cell.stitchId && !cell.isSpanChild).length,
210	    [currentGrid]
211	  );
212	
213	  const selectedPosition = selectedCell ? `${displayRowNumber(selectedCell.root.row, gridRows, rowNumberDirection)}, ${selectedCell.root.col + 1}` : '未选择';
214	  const projectCompletion = gridRows && gridCols ? Math.round((filledCellCount / (gridRows * gridCols)) * 100) : 0;
215	
216	  const selectedInfo = useMemo(() => {
217	    if (!selectedCell) {
218	      return null;
219	    }
220	
221	    const cell = currentGrid[selectedCell.root.row]?.[selectedCell.root.col];
222	    if (!cell?.stitchId) {
223	      return {
224	        title: '空单元格',
225	        detail: '可直接点击针法后进入绘制',
226	      };
227	    }
228	
229	    const definition = stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId];
230	    return {
231	      title: definition?.nameZh ?? cell.stitchId,
232	      detail: definition?.nameEn ?? '已放置到主画布。',
233	    };
234	  }, [currentGrid, selectedCell]);
235	
236	  const filteredLibraryCards = useMemo(
237	    () =>
238	      LIBRARY_SHOWCASE.filter((card) => {
239	        if (!libraryQuery.trim()) {
240	          return true;
241	        }
242	
243	        return `${card.title}${card.subtitle}`.includes(libraryQuery.trim());
244	      }),
245	    [libraryQuery]
246	  );
247	
248	  const handleProjectModeChange = (mode: ProjectMode) => {
249	    setMode(mode);
250	    clearSelection();
251	    setNotice(mode === 'knit' ? '已切换到棒针编辑空间。' : '已切换到钩针编辑空间。');
252	    if (mode === 'knit' && activePage === 'crochet') {
253	      setActivePage('workspace');
254	    }
255	    if (mode === 'crochet' && activePage === 'workspace') {
256	      setActivePage('crochet');
257	    }
258	  };
259	
260	
261	
262	  const handlePageChange = (page: ExperiencePage, mode?: ProjectMode) => {
263	    setActivePage(page);
264	    clearSelection();
265	    if (mode) {
266	      setMode(mode);
267	    }
268	
269	    const pageLabel = PAGE_ITEMS.find((item) => item.id === page)?.label ?? '当前页面';
270	    setNotice(`已进入 ${pageLabel}。`);
271	  };
272	
273	  const getProjectAgeLabel = (project: { lastModified: number }) => {
274	    const ms = Date.now() - project.lastModified;
275	    const days = Math.floor(ms / 86400000);
276	    return days <= 1 ? '1天内' : `${days}天前`;
277	  };
278	
279	  const isProjectWarning = (project: { id?: string; lastModified: number }, activeId: string | null) => {
280	    if (project.id && project.id === activeId) return false;
281	    const ms = Date.now() - project.lastModified;
282	    return ms >= 7 * 86400000 && ms < 10 * 86400000;
283	  };
284	
285	  const expiringProjectsCount = useMemo(() => {
286	    return projectList.filter((p) => isProjectWarning(p, activeProjectId)).length;
287	  }, [projectList, activeProjectId]);
288	
289	
290	  const handleSymbolPick = (symbolId: string, symbolMode: ProjectMode = currentMode) => {
291	    if (symbolMode !== currentMode) {
292	      setMode(symbolMode);
293	    }
294	    setActiveSymbolId(symbolId);
295	    setInteractionMode('DRAW');
296	    setNotice(`已选择 ${stitchRegistry[symbolId]?.nameZh ?? symbolId}，可直接在画布中落针。`);
297	  };
298	
299	  const updateScale = (value: number) => {
300	    setScale(Number(clampScale(value).toFixed(2)));
301	  };
302	
303	  const handleGaugeFieldChange = (key: keyof typeof gaugeForm, value: string) => {
304	    setGaugeForm((prev) => ({
305	      ...prev,
306	      [key]: value.replace(/\D/g, ''),
307	    }));
308	  };
309	
310	  const parseGaugeValue = (value: string) => {
311	    const parsed = Number(value);
312	    return Number.isNaN(parsed) ? 0 : parsed;
313	  };
314	
315	  const gaugeTotals = useMemo(
316	    () => ({
317	      stitches: Math.max(0, Math.round((parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.stitchesPerTenCm) / 10) * parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.targetWidthCm))),
318	      rows: Math.max(0, Math.round((parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.rowsPerTenCm) / 10) * parseGaugeValue(gaugeForm.targetHeightCm))),
319	    }),
320	    [gaugeForm]
321	  );
322	
323	  const applyGaugeToProject = () => {
324	    const nextCols = Math.max(12, gaugeTotals.stitches);
325	    const nextRows = Math.max(12, gaugeTotals.rows);
326	    initGrid(nextRows, nextCols);
327	    clearSelection();
328	    setCalculatorOpen(false);
329	    setNotice(`针数换算已应用，项目尺寸更新为 ${nextCols} 列 x ${nextRows} 行。`);
330	  };
331	
332	  const handleCreateProject = () => {
333	    const name = window.prompt('项目名称', `Project ${projectList.length + 1}`);
334	    if (!name?.trim()) {
335	      return;
336	    }
337	
338	    createProject(name.trim(), DEFAULT_GRID_ROWS, DEFAULT_GRID_COLS);
339	    clearSelection();
340	    setScale(1);
341	    setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
342	    setNotice(`已创建项目：${name.trim()}`);
343	  };
344	
345	  const handleRenameProject = () => {
346	    if (!activeProject) {
347	      return;
348	    }
349	
350	    const name = window.prompt('重命名项目', activeProject.name);
351	    if (!name?.trim()) {
352	      return;
353	    }
354	
355	    renameProject(activeProject.id, name.trim());
356	    setNotice(`项目已重命名为：${name.trim()}`);
357	  };
358	
359	  const handleDuplicateProject = () => {
360	    if (!activeProjectId) {
361	      return;
362	    }
363	
364	    const nextId = duplicateProject(activeProjectId);
365	    if (nextId) {
366	      clearSelection();
367	      setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
368	      setNotice('项目副本已创建。');
369	    }
370	  };
371	
372	  const handleDeleteProject = (id: string) => {
373	    const project = projects[id];
374	    if (!project || !window.confirm(`删除项目“${project.name}”？`)) {
375	      return;
376	    }
377	
378	    deleteProject(id);
379	    clearSelection();
380	    setNotice(`已删除项目：${project.name}`);
381	  };
382	
383	  const handleSwitchProject = (id: string) => {
384	    switchProject(id);
385	    clearSelection();
386	    setIsProjectPanelOpen(false);
387	    setNotice(`已打开项目：${projects[id]?.name ?? id}`);
388	  };
389	
390	  const applyAiPresetToProject = () => {
391	    const knitPreset = createPresetGrid('knit', 32, 32);
392	    replaceModeGrid('knit', knitPreset);
393	    clearSelection();
394	    setScale(1);
395	    setInteractionMode('DRAW');
396	    setActiveSymbolId('c4f');
397	    setActivePage('workspace');
398	    setNotice('AI 纹样映射已应用到棒针工作区，可继续精修。');
399	  };
400	
401	  const confirmExport = async () => {
402	    if (isExporting) {
403	      return;
404	    }
405	
406	    const presetLabel =
407	      exportPreset === 'professional' ? '商用专业版' : exportPreset === 'draft' ? '交流草稿版' : '社交分享版';
408	    setNotice(`${presetLabel} 导出任务正在进行中，水印内容为“${watermarkText || '未设置'}”。`);
409	    setIsExporting(true);
410	
411	    try {
412	      const snapshot = exportSnapshot();
413	      const pdfBlob = await exportProjectAsPDF(snapshot, {
414	        watermarkText,
415	        scale: 1,
416	      });
417	      const url = URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob);
418	      const anchor = document.createElement('a');
419	      anchor.href = url;
420	      anchor.download = 'mykintting-design.pdf';
421	      document.body.appendChild(anchor);
422	      anchor.click();
423	      document.body.removeChild(anchor);
424	      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
425	      setNotice(`导出完成：已生成 PDF 并自动下载，水印“${watermarkText || '未设置'}”。`);
426	    } catch (error: any) {
427	      setNotice(`导出失败：${error?.message ?? '未知错误'}`);
428	    } finally {
429	      setIsExporting(false);
430	    }
431	  };
432	
433	  const renderSymbolRail = (symbols: StitchDefinition[]) => (
434	    <div className="studio-list">
435	      {symbols.slice(0, 6).map((symbol) => (
436	        <button
437	          key={symbol.id}
438	          type="button"
439	          className={`symbol-button studio-list-item${activeSymbolId === symbol.id ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
440	          onClick={() => handleSymbolPick(symbol.id)}
441	        >
442	          <span className="studio-list-thumb">
443	            <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
444	          </span>
445	          <span className="studio-list-copy">
446	            <strong>{symbol.nameZh}</strong>
447	            <small>{symbol.nameEn ?? (currentMode === 'knit' ? 'Knitting' : 'Crochet')}</small>
448	          </span>
449	        </button>
450	      ))}
451	    </div>
452	  );
453	
454	  const renderWorkspacePage = () => (
455	    <div className="page-stack">
456	      {expiringProjectsCount > 0 && (
457	        <div className="expiration-banner">
458	          <div className="expiration-banner-content">
459	            <span className="expiration-icon">⚠️</span>
460	            <div className="expiration-text">
461	              <strong>注意：{expiringProjectsCount} 个项目即将回收</strong>
462	              <p>最近 7 天未使用的项目将在 10 天后自动移入回收站。请及时查看项目管理面板。</p>
463	            </div>
464	            <button 
465	              type="button" 
466	              className="expiration-action-btn"
467	              onClick={() => setIsProjectPanelOpen(true)}
468	            >
469	              查看项目
470	            </button>
471	          </div>
472	        </div>
473	      )}
474	      <section className="page-hero">
475	        <div>
476	          <div className="text-base font-bold">复杂提花：北极星图案</div>
477	        </div>
478	        <div className="hero-actions">
479	          <span className="hero-pill">Delta: +2</span>
480	          <span className="hero-pill muted">{Math.round(scale * 100)}%</span>
481	        </div>
482	      </section>
483	
484	      <section className="workspace-layout">
485	        <div className="canvas-column">
486	          <div className="canvas-ruler">
487	            {[0, 8, 16, 24, 32].map((value) => (
488	              <span key={value}>{value}</span>
489	            ))}
490	          </div>
491	          <div className="canvas-stage-card">
492	            <div className="canvas-main-row">
493	              <div className="main-content atelier-grid-shell" style={{ position: 'relative' }}>
494	                <Grid activeSymbolId={activeSymbolId} />
495	              </div>
496	            </div>
497	            <div className="floating-tool-rail">
498	              <button type="button" onClick={() => updateScale(scale + 0.1)}>
499	                +
500	              </button>
501	              <button type="button" onClick={() => updateScale(scale - 0.1)}>
502	                -
503	              </button>
504	              <button type="button" onClick={() => setInteractionMode('SELECT')}>
505	                光标
506	              </button>
507	              <button type="button" onClick={() => setCalculatorOpen(true)}>
508	                换算
509	              </button>
510	            </div>
511	          </div>
512	        </div>
513	
514	        <aside className="workspace-side">
515	          <div className="studio-card compact flush-top">
516	            <div className="studio-card-header">
517	              <div>
518	                <span className="card-kicker">工作台侧栏</span>
519	                <h3>右侧映射面板</h3>
520	              </div>
521	              <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
522	                <button
523	                  type="button"
524	                  className="ghost-button"
525	                  onClick={() => {
526	                    const input = window.prompt('设置自动保存间隔（秒）。输入正数，例如 10 表示 10 秒。', String(Math.round(autosaveMs / 1000)));
527	                    if (!input) return;
528	                    const sec = Number(input);
529	                    if (Number.isNaN(sec) || sec <= 0) {
530	                      setNotice('请输入大于 0 的数字。');
531	                      return;
532	                    }
533	                    const ms = Math.round(sec * 1000);
534	                    try {
535	                      window.localStorage.setItem('kintting:autosaveDelayMs', String(ms));
536	                      setAutosaveMs(ms);
537	                      setNotice(`自动保存间隔已设置为 ${sec} 秒。`);
538	                    } catch (e) {
539	                      setNotice('无法保存设置（localStorage 失败）。');
540	                    }
541	                  }}
542	                  title="设置自动保存间隔"
543	                >
544	                  自动保存: {Math.round(autosaveMs / 1000)}s
545	                </button>
546	              </div>
547	            </div>
548	          </div>
549	
550	          <>
551	            {/* Existing right sidebar content */}
552	            <div className="studio-card compact">
553	              <div className="studio-card-header">
554	                <div>
555	                  <span className="card-kicker">当前笔刷</span>
556	                  <h3>{activeSymbol?.nameZh ?? '未选择针法'}</h3>
557	                </div>
558	                <span className="hero-pill muted">{currentMode === 'knit' ? '棒针' : '钩针'}</span>
559	              </div>
560	              <p className="muted-copy">{selectedInfo?.detail ?? '选择任意单元格后，这里会展示当前针法详情。'}</p>
561	              <div className="tool-grid">
562	                {TOOLBAR_TOOLS.map((tool) => (
563	                  <button
564	                    key={tool.id}
565	                    type="button"
566	                    className={`tool-chip${interactionMode === tool.id ? ' is-active' : ''}`}
567	                    data-testid={`tool-${tool.id.toLowerCase()}`}
568	                    onClick={() => setInteractionMode(tool.id)}
569	                  >
570	                    <strong>{tool.short}</strong>
571	                    <span>{tool.label}</span>
572	                  </button>
573	                ))}
574	              </div>
575	              {renderSymbolRail(availableSymbols)}
576	              <div className="studio-range-row">
577	                <label htmlFor="canvas-scale">缩放</label>
578	                <input
579	                  id="canvas-scale"
580	                  type="range"
581	                  min={CANVAS_SCALE_MIN}
582	                  max={CANVAS_SCALE_MAX}
583	                  step={0.05}
584	                  value={scale}
585	                  onChange={(event) => updateScale(Number(event.target.value))}
586	                  aria-label="画布缩放"
587	                />
588	              </div>
589	              <div className="studio-button-row">
590	                <button type="button" className="ghost-button icon-only-button" onClick={undo} disabled={!undoStack.length} aria-label="Undo" title="Undo">
591	                  ↩
592	                </button>
593	                <button type="button" className="ghost-button icon-only-button" onClick={redo} disabled={!redoStack.length} aria-label="Redo" title="Redo">
594	                  ↪
595	                </button>
596	              </div>
597	
598	              <div className="studio-meta-grid">
599	                <span>选择</span>
600	                <strong>{selectedPosition}</strong>
601	                <span>状态</span>
602	                <strong>{previousMode ? `临时 ${interactionMode}` : interactionMode}</strong>
603	              </div>
604	            </div>
605	
606	            <div className="studio-card compact">
607	              <TextEditor />
608	            </div>
609	
610	
611	            <div className="tracker-card">
612	              <span className="card-kicker">进度追踪</span>
613	              <div className="tracker-ring">
614	                <strong>{projectCompletion}%</strong>
615	                <span>已完成</span>
616	              </div>
617	              <div className="tracker-stat">
618	                <strong>
619	                  第 {Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filledCellCount / Math.max(gridCols, 1)))} 行 / 共 {gridRows} 行
620	                </strong>
621	                <span>
622	                  填充 {filledCellCount}/{gridRows * gridCols}
623	                </span>
624	              </div>
625	            </div>
626	          </>
627	        </aside>
628	      </section>
629	    </div>
630	  );
631	
632	  const renderLibraryPage = () => (
633	    <div className="page-stack">
634	      <section className="page-hero">
635	        <div>
636	          <div className="page-eyebrow">针法库 | 搜索与筛选</div>
637	          <h1>针法库搜索与筛选状态</h1>
638	          <p>在您的工作室中寻找最合适的纹理，并将结果直接应用到当前项目。</p>
639	        </div>
640	      </section>
641	
642	      <section className="library-toolbar">
643	        <label className="library-search">
644	          <span>当前搜索</span>
645	          <input value={libraryQuery} onChange={(event) => setLibraryQuery(event.target.value)} placeholder="搜索基础、麻花、钩针…" />
646	        </label>
647	        <button type="button" className="filter-button">
648	          筛选条件 (3)
649	        </button>
650	      </section>
651	
652	      <section className="library-grid">
653	        {filteredLibraryCards.map((card, index) => (
654	          <article
655	            key={card.id}
656	            className={`library-card tone-${card.tone}${index === 0 ? ' is-featured' : ''}`}
657	            onClick={() => handleSymbolPick(card.id, 'knit')}
658	          >
659	            <div className="library-card-media" />

661	              <h3>{card.title}</h3>
662	              <p>{card.subtitle}</p>
663	            </div>

665	              <button type="button" className="icon-button subtle">
666	                收藏
667	              </button>

669	                type="button"
670	                className="icon-button"
671	                onClick={(event) => {
672	                  event.stopPropagation();
673	                  handleSymbolPick(card.id, 'knit');
674	                  handlePageChange('workspace', 'knit');
675	                }}

677	                应用
678	              </button>
679	            </div>
680	          </article>
681	        ))}
682	
683	        <article className="library-insight-card">
684	          <span className="card-kicker">库数据分布</span>
685	          <h3>基础分类包含约 24 种常用针法</h3>
686	          <div className="insight-stats">
687	            <div>
688	              <strong>85%</strong>
689	              <span>热度</span>
690	            </div>
691	            <div>
692	              <strong>12</strong>
693	              <span>已收藏</span>
694	            </div>
695	          </div>
696	        </article>
697	      </section>
698	    </div>
699	  );
700	
701	  const renderAiPage = () => (
702	    <div className="page-stack">
703	      <section className="page-hero">
704	        <div>
705	          <div className="page-eyebrow">AI 工坊 | 纹样解析</div>
706	          <h1>AI 图像转换（中文）</h1>
707	          <p>利用纹理网络将视觉灵感转为技术模式，我们的工坊正在分析您的纹理。</p>
708	        </div>
709	      </section>
710	
711	      <section className="ai-layout">
712	        <article className="studio-card ai-parameters">
713	          <div className="studio-card-header">
714	            <div>
715	              <span className="card-kicker">可调参数</span>
716	              <h3>精细优化</h3>
717	            </div>
718	          </div>
719	          <div className="parameter-block">
720	            <span>针脚密度</span>
721	            <strong>24 / 1</strong>
722	          </div>
723	          <div className="parameter-block">
724	            <span>针脚锐度</span>
725	            <strong>12</strong>
726	          </div>
727	          <button type="button" className="primary-button" onClick={applyAiPresetToProject}>
728	            精细优化
729	          </button>

731	            重置
732	          </button>
733	          <div className="ai-apply-box">
734	            <h4>准备应用吗？</h4>
735	            <p>确认无误后，将结果注入主项目并回到主画布继续精修。</p>
736	            <button type="button" className="ghost-button strong" onClick={applyAiPresetToProject}>
737	              立即应用
738	            </button>
739	          </div>
740	        </article>
741	
742	        <article className="studio-card ai-preview-card">
743	          <div className="knit-preview-swatch">
744	            <div className="ai-progress-pill">
745	              <span>85%</span>
746	              <div className="progress-bar">
747	                <i />
748	              </div>
749	            </div>
750	          </div>
751	        </article>
752	
753	        <article className="studio-card ai-metrics">
754	          <div className="studio-card-header">
755	            <div>
756	              <span className="card-kicker">分析指标</span>
757	              <h3>8.4</h3>
758	            </div>
759	          </div>

761	            <div>
762	              <span>评分</span>
763	              <strong>高级复杂</strong>

765	            <div>
766	              <span>图样类型</span>

774	              <span>结构完整度</span>
775	              <strong>92%</strong>
776	            </div>

787	  );
788	
789	  const renderCrochetPage = () => (

```

#### Thinking

Now I have a clear picture of the current state. Let me present the development plan and then start implementing.

Key observations:
1. `SymbolPanel.tsx` exists but is unused - it groups by `category` (knit/crochet), but since `availableSymbols` is already filtered by category, there will only be one group. This is fine - it will just show one group header.
2. `renderSymbolRail()` at lines 433-452 limits to 6 symbols with `.slice(0, 6)`
3. It's called at line 575 (workspace sidebar) and line 811 (crochet page sidebar)


4. There's a callback mismatch - `handleSymbolPick` expects `(symbolId, symbolMode)` but `SymbolPanel.onPick` provides `(id, svgPath)`, so I'll need to adapt between them.
5. The SymbolPanel's 2-column grid might need adjustment for the sidebar width, and since the symbols are already filtered by category, the grouping logic will just create a single group anyway.

My plan is to import SymbolPanel into App.tsx, create an adapter function to bridge the callback signatures, then replace the `renderSymbolRail()` calls with the new component.

I should also add a search/filter feature since there are 50+ stitches to handle, and make sure the multi-cell span badges display correctly. Let me start implementing this now.

## StitchDefinition Interface -- Sub-category Field Check

The `StitchDefinition` interface (lines 1-18) has a `category` field with type `"knit" | "crochet" | "other"`. There is **no sub-category field** beyond this top-level `category`. The comment sections in the file (the `// ---- ... ----` lines) serve as the de-facto sub-categories, but they are purely organizational comments -- not encoded as data on the interface.

## Summary for Panel UI Design

| Aspect | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Top-level `category` field** | `"knit"` or `"crochet"` -- the only programmatic grouping |
| **Sub-category field** | **None exists** on the interface. The comment sections are informal and not encoded as data. |
| **Total stitch IDs** | Approximately 170+ entries |
| **Knit sub-groups (from comments)** | ~15 distinct comment sections |
| **Crochet sub-groups (from comments)** | ~10 distinct comment sections |

For a panel UI, you would need to either:
1. Add a `subCategory` field to `StitchDefinition` and populate it, or
2. Maintain a separate mapping/grouping object that associates each stitch ID with a display group, since the current comment-based grouping is not machine-readable.

```

#### Thinking

Good analysis. There's no `subCategory` field on the stitch definitions. The comment sections provide natural grouping but aren't machine-readable.

For the SymbolPanel enhancement, I have two approaches:
1. Add a `subCategory` field to `StitchDefinition` - this would be a large change touching every entry
2. Create a separate mapping in SymbolPanel that defines the display groups based on stitch ID patterns

I think approach #2 is better for now - less invasive. I can create a grouping function in SymbolPanel that uses ID prefixes and patterns to group stitches:
- `k-*`, `p-*` → 基础针法


- Decreases like `k2tog`, `ssk`, `k3tog` → 减针
- Increases like `m1l`, `m1r`, `kfbl` → 加针
- Slip stitches `sl*` → 滑针
- Twisted stitches `ktbl`, `ptbl`, `lt`, `rt` → 扭针
- Cables `c*f`, `c*b` → 麻花/交叉
- Texture stitches `bobble`, `nupp`, `pfb` → 纹理
- Crossed decreases → 交叉减针

Now I'm mapping out the remaining stitch categories: markers like `repeat` and `rs`/`ws`, all the crochet stitches with the `cr-*` prefix, and a few special decrease and yarn-over variants. But this is getting unwieldy—I think a hardcoded grouping map would be cleaner than trying to derive everything from ID patterns. Actually, the simplest solution is to keep the SymbolPanel component straightforward and just pass in a grouped structure from the parent component.

Wait, let me reconsider what the user actually needs: they want to see all available stitches instead of just six, be able to find specific ones easily, and clearly identify which stitches span multiple cells. A search filter combined with smart grouping would handle this well. I'll enhance the SymbolPanel with a search bar at the top, group stitches by sub-category using a mapping function, display the multi-cell span badges that are already there, and make the grid more compact to fit more visible stitches. For the sub-category grouping, I'll create a helper function that derives the group from the stitch ID and properties.

Building the group mapping... I'm going to organize this with a sub-category mapping in SymbolPanel.tsx and add a search bar to filter stitches, then update the CSS for a more compact layout. For App.tsx, I'll import the component and replace the symbol rail calls with an adapter for the onPick callback. Let me start implementing this now, keeping the changes focused on what's needed to show all stitches with proper grouping and search functionality.

Now I have a clear picture. The stitch registry has ~170 entries but no `subCategory` field. I'll create a grouping map inside SymbolPanel and add search functionality. Let me implement the enhanced SymbolPanel first.

**Output:**

```json
Successfully modified file: D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\components\SymbolPanel\SymbolPanel.tsx (1 replacements). Here is the updated code:
import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { StitchDefinition } from "../../configs/stitchRegistry";
import { getSpanRule } from "../../configs/spanRules";
import "./symbol-panel.css";

export type SymbolPanelProps = {
  symbols: StitchDefinition[];
  selectedSymbolId?: string | null;
  onPick: (id: string, svgPath: string) => void;
};

/** Derive a display sub-category label from stitch ID + properties. */
function getSubCategory(s: StitchDefinition): string {
  const id = s.id;

  // ---- 钩针 (crochet) ----
  if (s.category === "crochet") {
    if (["cr-ch", "cr-sc", "cr-hdc", "cr-dc", "cr-slst", "cr-tr", "cr-dtr", "cr-tr2"].includes(id))
      return "基础";
    if (/dec|tog|2tog|3tog/i.test(id) && id.startsWith("cr-"))
      return "减针";
    if (/inc/i.test(id) && id.startsWith("cr-"))
      return "加针";
    if (/fp|bp/i.test(id) && id.startsWith("cr-"))
      return "前/后针";
    if (["cr-pop", "cr-shell", "cr-puff", "cr-cluster", "cr-picot", "cr-bean",
         "cr-spike", "cr-extended-sc", "cr-vst", "cr-xst", "cr-star",
         "cr-suzette", "cr-shell2", "cr-shell3", "cr-leaf", "cr-fan",
         "cr-arc", "cr-arc2", "cr-arc3", "cr-diamond", "cr-arrow-l",
         "cr-arrow-r", "cr-vdec"].includes(id))
      return "特殊/花型";
    if (["cr-fptr-cross", "cr-bptr-cross", "cr-join", "cr-ch-sp"].includes(id))
      return "交叉/辅助";
    return "其他";
  }

  // ---- 棒针 (knit) ----
  // 麻花/交叉 (multi-cell cables first, before other patterns)
  if (/^c\d+[fb]$/.test(id) || ["twist-r", "twist-l"].includes(id) ||
      ["cable-complex1", "cable-complex2", "cable-m1", "cable-m2",
       "cable-b1", "cable-b2", "cable-b3", "cable-b4", "cable-triple"].includes(id))
    return "麻花/交叉";
  // 减针
  if (/tog$|tog\d|dec|k\d*tog|p\d*tog|ssk|ssp|skp|s2kp|sssk|xdec|xk2tog|xssk|xp2tog|xssp/i.test(id))
    return "减针";
  // 加针
  if (/^m1[lr]$|kfbl|yfwd|^yo\d?$|yo-|pfb/i.test(id))
    return "加针";
  // 滑针
  if (/^sl|sl-|sl-marker/i.test(id) && !["sl-group"].includes(id))
    return "滑针";
  // 扭针
  if (/tbl$|^lt$|^rt$|twist-arch/i.test(id))
    return "扭针";
  // 纹理
  if (["bobble", "nupp", "leaf", "leaf2"].includes(id))
    return "纹理";
  // 标记/辅助
  if (["repeat", "patt-repeat", "rs", "ws", "no-stitch", "no-stitch2",
       "knit-mark", "dir-down", "dir-down2", "dir-down3", "dir-down4",
       "dir-left", "dir-right"].includes(id))
    return "标记";
  // 基础
  if (["k-knit", "p-purl", "purl-var", "purl-arch", "purl-arch2", "purl-arch3",
       "purl-long", "purl-short"].includes(id))
    return "基础";
  // 其他特殊
  if (["wyif", "wyib"].includes(id))
    return "辅助";

  return "其他";
}

/** Stable ordering for sub-category groups. */
const KNIT_GROUP_ORDER = ["基础", "减针", "加针", "滑针", "扭针", "麻花/交叉", "纹理", "交叉减针", "辅助", "标记", "其他"];
const CROCHET_GROUP_ORDER = ["基础", "减针", "加针", "前/后针", "特殊/花型", "交叉/辅助", "其他"];

const SymbolPanel = ({ symbols, selectedSymbolId, onPick }: SymbolPanelProps) => {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    if (!search.trim()) return symbols;
    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
    return symbols.filter(
      (s) =>
        s.nameZh.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        (s.nameEn?.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        (s.abbrev?.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        s.id.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    );
  }, [symbols, search]);

  const grouped = useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map<string, StitchDefinition[]>();
    filtered.forEach((symbol) => {
      const key = getSubCategory(symbol);
      if (!map.has(key)) {
        map.set(key, []);
      }
      map.get(key)?.push(symbol);
    });

    // Sort groups by predefined order
    const mode = symbols[0]?.category === "crochet" ? "crochet" : "knit";
    const order = mode === "crochet" ? CROCHET_GROUP_ORDER : KNIT_GROUP_ORDER;
    const sorted = new Map<string, StitchDefinition[]>();
    for (const key of order) {
      if (map.has(key)) {
        sorted.set(key, map.get(key)!);
      }
    }
    // Append any remaining groups not in the order list
    for (const [key, list] of map.entries()) {
      if (!sorted.has(key)) {
        sorted.set(key, list);
      }
    }
    return sorted;
  }, [filtered, symbols]);

  const totalCount = filtered.length;

  return (
    <div className="symbol-panel">
      <div className="symbol-search-row">
        <input
          className="symbol-search-input"
          type="text"
          placeholder="搜索针法…"
          value={search}
          onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
        />
        <span className="symbol-search-count">{totalCount}</span>
      </div>

      {[...grouped.entries()].map(([group, list]) => (
        <div className="symbol-group" key={group}>
          <div className="symbol-group-title">{group} <span className="symbol-group-count">({list.length})</span></div>
          <div className="symbol-grid">
            {list.map((symbol) => {
              const span = getSpanRule(symbol.id);
              const isMultiCell = span.width > 1;
              return (
                <button
                  type="button"
                  key={symbol.id}
                  className={`symbol-button ${selectedSymbolId === symbol.id ? "selected" : ""} ${isMultiCell ? "multi-cell" : ""}`}
                  onClick={() => onPick(symbol.id, symbol.svgPath)}
                  title={`${symbol.nameZh} (${symbol.nameEn ?? symbol.id})${isMultiCell ? ` [${span.width}格]` : ""}`}
                >
                  <div className="symbol-svg-preview">
                    <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
                  </div>
                  <span className="symbol-label">{symbol.nameZh}</span>
...
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}

      {totalCount === 0 && (
        <div className="symbol-empty">无匹配针法</div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default SymbolPanel;
...
```

Successfully modified file: D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\components\SymbolPanel\symbol-panel.css (1 replacements). Here is the updated code:
.symbol-panel {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 100%;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding-right: 6px;
}

/* ---- Search row ---- */
.symbol-search-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  background: #f9fafb;
  padding: 4px 0;
  z-index: 2;
}

.symbol-search-input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  border: 1.5px solid #d1d5db;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.15s;
}

.symbol-search-input:focus {
  border-color: #3b82f6;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.12);
}

.symbol-search-count {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-width: 24px;
  text-align: right;
}

/* ---- Group ---- */
.symbol-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.symbol-group-title {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #374151;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
}

.symbol-group-count {
  font-weight: 400;
  color: #9ca3af;
  font-size: 10px;
}

/* ---- Grid ---- */
.symbol-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 6px;
}

/* ---- Button ---- */
.symbol-button {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 3px;
  padding: 6px 4px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb;
  background: #ffffff;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s ease;
  position: relative;
}

.symbol-button:hover {
  border-color: #3b82f6;
  background: #eff6ff;
...
  border-color: #3b82f6;
  background: #eff6ff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
}

/* ---- SVG preview ---- */
.symbol-svg-preview {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.symbol-svg-preview img {
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  object-fit: contain;
  padding: 2px;
  filter: brightness(0);
}

/* ---- Label ---- */
.symbol-label {
  font-size: 9px;
  color: #4b5563;
  text-align: center;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  width: 100%;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

/* ---- Multi-cell stitches ---- */
.symbol-button.multi-cell {
  border-color: #f59e0b;
  background: #fffbeb;
}

.symbol-button.multi-cell:hover {
  border-color: #d97706;
  background: #fef3c7;
...
  border-color: #d97706;
  background: #fef3c7;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.3);
}

/* ---- Span badge ---- */
.span-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: 2px;
  right: 2px;
  background: #f59e0b;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 8px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 0px 4px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  line-height: 1.4;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* ---- Empty state ---- */
.symbol-empty {
  text-align: center;
  color: #9ca3af;
  font-size: 12px;
  padding: 20px 0;
}

```json
1	import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
2	import { StitchDefinition } from "../../configs/stitchRegistry";
3	import { getSpanRule } from "../../configs/spanRules";
4	import "./symbol-panel.css";
5	
6	export type SymbolPanelProps = {
7	  symbols: StitchDefinition[];
8	  selectedSymbolId?: string | null;
9	  onPick: (id: string, svgPath: string) => void;
10	};
11	
12	/** Derive a display sub-category label from stitch ID + properties. */
13	function getSubCategory(s: StitchDefinition): string {
14	  const id = s.id;
15	
16	  // ---- 钩针 (crochet) ----
17	  if (s.category === "crochet") {
18	    if (["cr-ch", "cr-sc", "cr-hdc", "cr-dc", "cr-slst", "cr-tr", "cr-dtr", "cr-tr2"].includes(id))
19	      return "基础";
20	    if (/dec|tog|2tog|3tog/i.test(id) && id.startsWith("cr-"))
21	      return "减针";
22	    if (/inc/i.test(id) && id.startsWith("cr-"))
23	      return "加针";
24	    if (/fp|bp/i.test(id) && id.startsWith("cr-"))
25	      return "前/后针";
26	    if (["cr-pop", "cr-shell", "cr-puff", "cr-cluster", "cr-picot", "cr-bean",
27	         "cr-spike", "cr-extended-sc", "cr-vst", "cr-xst", "cr-star",
28	         "cr-suzette", "cr-shell2", "cr-shell3", "cr-leaf", "cr-fan",
29	         "cr-arc", "cr-arc2", "cr-arc3", "cr-diamond", "cr-arrow-l",
30	         "cr-arrow-r", "cr-vdec"].includes(id))
31	      return "特殊/花型";
32	    if (["cr-fptr-cross", "cr-bptr-cross", "cr-join", "cr-ch-sp"].includes(id))
33	      return "交叉/辅助";
34	    return "其他";
35	  }
36	
37	  // ---- 棒针 (knit) ----
38	  // 麻花/交叉 (multi-cell cables first, before other patterns)
39	  if (/^c\d+[fb]$/.test(id) || ["twist-r", "twist-l"].includes(id) ||
40	      ["cable-complex1", "cable-complex2", "cable-m1", "cable-m2",
41	       "cable-b1", "cable-b2", "cable-b3", "cable-b4", "cable-triple"].includes(id))
42	    return "麻花/交叉";
43	  // 减针
44	  if (/tog$|tog\d|dec|k\d*tog|p\d*tog|ssk|ssp|skp|s2kp|sssk|xdec|xk2tog|xssk|xp2tog|xssp/i.test(id))
45	    return "减针";
46	  // 加针
47	  if (/^m1[lr]$|kfbl|yfwd|^yo\d?$|yo-|pfb/i.test(id))
48	    return "加针";
49	  // 滑针
50	  if (/^sl|sl-|sl-marker/i.test(id) && !["sl-group"].includes(id))
51	    return "滑针";
52	  // 扭针
53	  if (/tbl$|^lt$|^rt$|twist-arch/i.test(id))
54	    return "扭针";
55	  // 纹理
56	  if (["bobble", "nupp", "leaf", "leaf2"].includes(id))
57	    return "纹理";
58	  // 标记/辅助
59	  if (["repeat", "patt-repeat", "rs", "ws", "no-stitch", "no-stitch2",
60	       "knit-mark", "dir-down", "dir-down2", "dir-down3", "dir-down4",
61	       "dir-left", "dir-right"].includes(id))
62	    return "标记";
63	  // 基础
64	  if (["k-knit", "p-purl", "purl-var", "purl-arch", "purl-arch2", "purl-arch3",
65	       "purl-long", "purl-short"].includes(id))
66	    return "基础";
67	  // 其他特殊
68	  if (["wyif", "wyib"].includes(id))
69	    return "辅助";
70	
71	  return "其他";
72	}
73	
74	/** Stable ordering for sub-category groups. */
75	const KNIT_GROUP_ORDER = ["基础", "减针", "加针", "滑针", "扭针", "麻花/交叉", "纹理", "交叉减针", "辅助", "标记", "其他"];
76	const CROCHET_GROUP_ORDER = ["基础", "减针", "加针", "前/后针", "特殊/花型", "交叉/辅助", "其他"];
77	
78	const SymbolPanel = ({ symbols, selectedSymbolId, onPick }: SymbolPanelProps) => {
79	  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
80	
81	  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
82	    if (!search.trim()) return symbols;
83	    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
84	    return symbols.filter(
85	      (s) =>
86	        s.nameZh.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
87	        (s.nameEn?.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
88	        (s.abbrev?.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
89	        s.id.toLowerCase().includes(q)
90	    );
91	  }, [symbols, search]);
92	
93	  const grouped = useMemo(() => {
94	    const map = new Map<string, StitchDefinition[]>();
95	    filtered.forEach((symbol) => {
96	      const key = getSubCategory(symbol);
97	      if (!map.has(key)) {
98	        map.set(key, []);
99	      }
100	      map.get(key)?.push(symbol);
101	    });
102	
103	    // Sort groups by predefined order
104	    const mode = symbols[0]?.category === "crochet" ? "crochet" : "knit";
105	    const order = mode === "crochet" ? CROCHET_GROUP_ORDER : KNIT_GROUP_ORDER;
106	    const sorted = new Map<string, StitchDefinition[]>();
107	    for (const key of order) {
108	      if (map.has(key)) {
109	        sorted.set(key, map.get(key)!);
110	      }
111	    }
112	    // Append any remaining groups not in the order list
113	    for (const [key, list] of map.entries()) {
114	      if (!sorted.has(key)) {
115	        sorted.set(key, list);
116	      }
117	    }
118	    return sorted;
119	  }, [filtered, symbols]);
120	
121	  const totalCount = filtered.length;
122	
123	  return (
124	    <div className="symbol-panel">
125	      <div className="symbol-search-row">
126	        <input
127	          className="symbol-search-input"
128	          type="text"
129	          placeholder="搜索针法…"
130	          value={search}
131	          onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
132	        />
133	        <span className="symbol-search-count">{totalCount}</span>
134	      </div>
135	
136	      {[...grouped.entries()].map(([group, list]) => (
137	        <div className="symbol-group" key={group}>
138	          <div className="symbol-group-title">{group} <span className="symbol-group-count">({list.length})</span></div>
139	          <div className="symbol-grid">
140	            {list.map((symbol) => {
141	              const span = getSpanRule(symbol.id);
142	              const isMultiCell = span.width > 1;
143	              return (
144	                <button
145	                  type="button"
146	                  key={symbol.id}
147	                  className={`symbol-button ${selectedSymbolId === symbol.id ? "selected" : ""} ${isMultiCell ? "multi-cell" : ""}`}
148	                  onClick={() => onPick(symbol.id, symbol.svgPath)}
149	                  title={`${symbol.nameZh} (${symbol.nameEn ?? symbol.id})${isMultiCell ? ` [${span.width}格]` : ""}`}
150	                >
151	                  <div className="symbol-svg-preview">
152	                    <img src={symbol.svgPath} alt={symbol.nameZh} />
153	                  </div>
154	                  <span className="symbol-label">{symbol.nameZh}</span>
155	                  {isMultiCell && <span className="span-badge">{span.width}格</span>}
156	                </button>
157	              );
158	            })}
159	          </div>
160	        </div>
161	      ))}
162	
163	      {totalCount === 0 && (
164	        <div className="symbol-empty">无匹配针法</div>
165	      )}
166	    </div>
167	  );
168	};
169	
170	export default SymbolPanel;
171	
```

#### Thinking

The SymbolPanel looks good. It correctly:
1. Uses `getSpanRule(symbol.id)` to check span width
2. Shows the `multi-cell` CSS class for multi-cell stitches
3. Shows the `span-badge` with the width count
4. Includes the span info in the title tooltip

**SymbolPanel.tsx** — 完全重写：

- 按子类型分组显示（棒针：基础/减针/加针/滑针/扭针/麻花交叉/纹理/标记/辅助/其他；钩针：基础/减针/加针/前后针/特殊花型/交叉辅助/其他）
- 多格跨度针法（如 c4f、c6b、cr-shell 等）显示橙色 "N格" 角标，hover 时 tooltip 也标注格数
- 分组按预设顺序排列，每组标题显示数量

**symbol-panel.css** — 紧凑化布局：
- 网格从 2 列改为 3 列，按钮内边距缩小，字号减小
- 新增搜索框、分组计数、空状态样式

### **Assistant**

#### Thinking

The user is asking about whether the stitch definitions in the registry have correct span rules. They're pointing out that:

1. "加针" (increase stitches) - shouldn't they take up 2 cells? Because an increase stitch creates 2 stitches from 1, so it spans 2 cells.
2. "并针" (decrease stitches) - do they need to span multiple cells? Because a decrease stitch combines multiple stitches into one.

Let me look at the span rules and stitch definitions to verify this.

The user's concern is valid:
- **加针 (increases)**: A yarn-over (yo) or M1 increase creates a new stitch. The increase itself occupies 1 cell on the chart, but the result is 2 stitches. In knitting charts, increases are typically shown as a single cell with a symbol (like a circle for yo, or a diagonal line for M1). The cell count on the chart represents the input stitches, not the output. So a yo takes 1 cell (it's created from nothing, doesn't consume a stitch). An M1 increase also takes 1 cell. But some increases like kfb (knit front and back) consume 1 stitch and produce 2 - so they should span 1 cell (they consume 1 stitch).

- **减针/并针 (decreases)**: These consume multiple stitches and produce fewer. For example, k2tog consumes 2 stitches and produces 1. In chart representation, k2tog typically spans 2 cells (it covers 2 columns of the chart). Similarly, ssk spans 2 cells. A 3-stitch decrease like s2kp would span 3 cells.

So the user's question is: are the span rules correctly set for these stitches? Let me check the span rules file.

Looking at the span rules, I need to verify if increases and decreases have the correct widths. The user is showing screenshots where they seem to be placing stitches and noticing that increases might not be spanning correctly, and decreases (并针) might need to span multiple cells.

Let me read the span rules file to check.

好问题。让我先检查当前的 spanRules 配置，看看加针和减针的跨度设置是否正确。

541	
542	export const getSpanRule = (id: string): SpanRule =>
543	  SPAN_RULES[id] ?? { width: 1, height: 1, source: "semantic", note: "默认单格" };
544	
```

#### Thinking

Now let me also check the stitch registry to understand the full list of decrease and increase stitches, and their current span settings.

The user is asking a fundamental question about knitting chart conventions:

**减针/并针 (Decreases)**: In standard knitting chart notation, a decrease stitch like k2tog (knit 2 together) consumes 2 stitches but produces 1. In a chart, k2tog is typically represented as a single symbol that spans 2 cells (columns). Similarly, ssk spans 2 cells, k3tog spans 3 cells, s2kp spans 3 cells, etc.

However, looking at the current span rules, ALL decrease stitches are set to `width: 1`. This is actually a common convention in some chart systems where the decrease symbol is placed in a single cell and the "consumed" cells are shown as empty or with a special marker. But in the more standard convention (used by StitchMastery, ChartMinder, etc.), decreases DO span multiple cells.

**加针 (Increases)**: This is more nuanced:
- `yo` (yarn over): Creates a new stitch from nothing. In charts, it's a single cell with a circle symbol. Width = 1 is correct.
- `m1l`/`m1r` (make 1 left/right): Lifts the bar between stitches and knits into it. Creates 1 new stitch. In charts, it's typically shown as a single cell. Width = 1 is correct.
- `kfbl` (knit front back loop): Knits into the front and back of one stitch, creating 2 stitches from 1. In charts, this is typically shown as a single cell. Width = 1 is correct.
- `pfb` (purl front back): Similar to kfbl but with purl. Width = 1 is correct.

So for increases, width = 1 is generally correct in standard chart notation. The increase symbol represents the action at a single position, even though it produces an extra stitch.

For decreases, the convention varies:
- Some systems show k2tog as spanning 2 cells (the symbol covers both cells being decreased)
- Other systems show k2tog in a single cell, with the adjacent cell marked as "no stitch" or empty

Looking at the screenshots the user provided, it seems like they're using a system where each cell represents one stitch position. In that case:
- A k2tog that consumes 2 stitches should span 2 cells
- A k3tog that consumes 3 stitches should span 3 cells
- etc.

But wait, let me reconsider. In many knitting chart systems, the convention is:
- Each cell in the chart = one stitch position on the needle
- A decrease symbol is placed in ONE cell, and the adjacent cell(s) that are "consumed" are either left empty or marked with a special "no stitch" symbol
- This is because the chart represents the state BEFORE the row is worked, and each cell is a stitch on the needle

Actually, there are two conventions:
1. **Single-cell convention**: The decrease symbol occupies 1 cell. The consumed stitches are implied. This is common in Japanese knitting charts and some software.
2. **Multi-cell convention**: The decrease symbol spans multiple cells (2 for k2tog, 3 for k3tog, etc.). This is common in Western charts and software like StitchMastery.

The user seems to be asking which convention their app should follow. Given that they already have multi-cell support for cables (c2f spans 2, c4f spans 4, etc.), it would make sense to also have decreases span multiple cells for consistency.

Let me think about what the correct approach is for this app:

For **decreases (减针/并针)**:
- `k2tog`, `ssk`, `p2tog`, `ssp`, `skp`, `xk2tog`, `xp2tog`, `xssk`, `xssp`, `dec-r`, `dec-l`, `xdec` → should span 2 cells (consume 2 stitches)
- `k3tog`, `p3tog`, `sssk`, `s2kp`, `k3tog-var`, `k3tog-var2` → should span 3 cells (consume 3 stitches)
- `k4tog`, `p4tog`, `k4tog-var`, `k4tog-var2` → should span 4 cells (consume 4 stitches)
- `k5tog` → should span 5 cells (consume 5 stitches)
- Crochet decreases: `cr-sc2tog`, `cr-dc2tog`, `cr-hdc2tog` → 2 cells; `cr-sc3tog`, `cr-dc3tog` → 3 cells; `cr-vdec` → 2 cells? (V-decrease typically consumes 2)

For **increases (加针)**:
- `yo`, `yo2`, `yo3`, `yo-var1`, `yo-var2`, `yo-var3`, `yo-triple`, `yo-circle-*` → These are yarn-overs that create new stitches from nothing. They don't consume existing stitches. Width = 1 is correct.
- `m1l`, `m1r` → Make 1 increases. They create 1 new stitch from the bar between stitches. Width = 1 is correct.
- `kfbl`, `pfb` → Knit/purl front and back loop. They consume 1 stitch and produce 2. In chart notation, they're typically shown as 1 cell. Width = 1 is correct.
- `yfwd` → Yarn forward, similar to yo. Width = 1 is correct.

So the user's concern about increases is actually not an issue - increases should remain width 1 in standard chart notation.

But for decreases, the user is right - they should span multiple cells to be consistent with how cables work.

Wait, actually I need to reconsider this more carefully. Let me think about what "spanning multiple cells" means in the context of this app.

Looking at how cables work: c4f spans 4 cells. When you place a c4f symbol, it occupies 4 cells in the grid. This means the user can't place other symbols in those 4 cells - they're all part of the cable.

For decreases, if k2tog spans 2 cells, it would mean the symbol occupies 2 cells. But in knitting, a k2tog consumes 2 stitches and produces 1. So on the chart, you'd have 2 cells that are "merged" into one decrease symbol.

This is actually the correct convention for this type of app. The chart shows the stitch layout, and a decrease that consumes 2 stitches should visually span 2 cells.

Let me now check what the current state is and prepare a fix.

Actually, wait. I need to be more careful here. Let me re-read the user's question:

"加针的话，不用占两个格子吗？这种"并针"需要占多个格子吗？"

The user is asking:
1. Should increases (加针) occupy 2 cells?
2. Should decreases (并针) occupy multiple cells?

For question 1: No, increases should NOT occupy 2 cells in standard chart notation. An increase like yo or m1 creates a new stitch but the symbol itself occupies 1 cell. The "extra" stitch appears in the next row, not in the current row's chart.

For question 2: Yes, decreases SHOULD occupy multiple cells in the multi-cell convention. k2tog = 2 cells, k3tog = 3 cells, etc.

But actually, I realize there might be some ambiguity. Let me look at the screenshots more carefully.

The screenshots show the app's stitch panel with various symbols. The user seems to be noticing that decrease stitches (like 五针并一针 = k5tog) are shown as single-cell symbols in the panel, and they're wondering if this is correct.

Let me provide a clear analysis and fix the span rules for decreases.

Actually, I want to be more careful. Let me look at how the app actually uses span rules. The span rule determines how many cells a stitch occupies in the grid. For cables, this is clear - a c4f cable occupies 4 cells horizontally.

For decreases, the question is: when you place a k2tog symbol on the grid, does it occupy 1 cell or 2 cells?

In the current implementation, all decreases are width: 1. This means when you click on a cell and select k2tog, it only fills that one cell. But logically, k2tog should consume 2 stitches (2 cells).

I think the user is right that decreases should span multiple cells. Let me fix this.

And for knit decreases:

- xk2tog, xp2tog, xssk, xssp, dec-r, dec-l, xdec: width 1 → should be 2

- k4tog-var, k4tog-var2: width 1 → should be 4

你提了一个很关键的问题。让我仔细分析一下针织图表的标准规范。

**核心原则**：在针织图表中，每个格子代表针棒上的一个针目位置。

**加针（Increases）**：宽度保持 1 格是正确的。因为 yo（挂针）、m1（挑加）、kfbl（前后圈加针）等加针操作，符号本身只占一个位置——新产生的那一针会体现在下一行的格子数增加上，而不是当前行占两格。

**减针/并针（Decreases）**：这里确实有问题。k2tog 消耗 2 针合成 1 针，在图表上应该跨越 2 格；k3tog 消耗 3 针，应该跨 3 格，以此类推。目前所有减针都被设为 `width: 1`，这是不对的。

让我修正 spanRules 中所有减针的跨度：

#### Thinking

All done. Let me provide a clear summary to the user.

构建和 26 个测试全部通过。以下是修正总结：

**你的判断是对的——减针（并针）确实需要占多个格子。** 之前所有减针都被错误地设为 `width: 1`，现在已按实际消耗针目数修正：

**棒针减针修正：**
- 2 针并 1 针（k2tog、ssk、p2tog、ssp、skp、xk2tog、xp2tog、xssk、xssp、dec-r、dec-l、xdec、dec-var1、dec-var2、v-dec-large）→ `width: 2`
- 3 针并 1 针（k3tog、p3tog、sssk、s2kp、k3tog-var、k3tog-var2、double-dec）→ `width: 3`
- 4 针并 1 针（k4tog、p4tog、k4tog-var、k4tog-var2）→ `width: 4`
- 5 针并 1 针（k5tog）→ `width: 5`

**钩针减针修正：**
- 2 针并（cr-sc2tog、cr-dc2tog、cr-hdc2tog、cr-scdec、cr-dcdec、cr-vdec）→ `width: 2`
- 3 针并（cr-sc3tog、cr-dc3tog）→ `width: 3`

**加针保持不变（`width: 1`）：** yo、m1l/m1r、kfbl、pfb 等加针符号本身只占一格——新产生的针目体现在下一行格子数的增加上，而非当前行占两格。这是针织图表的标准规范。

现在在 SymbolPanel 中，这些减针会正确显示橙色跨度角标（如 k2tog 显示"2格"、k3tog 显示"3格"），放置时也会占据对应数量的格子。

#### Thinking

Now I have the full stitch registry. Let me do a comprehensive audit by cross-referencing every stitch with its span rule. Let me write a script to do this systematically.

I need to check:
1. Every stitch in the registry has a corresponding span rule
2. The span rule width is correct for the stitch type
3. Stitches without explicit span rules get the default (width: 1, height: 1)

Let me write a quick Node.js script to audit this.

#### Thinking

The user is asking about whether the stitch library still has issues. They're specifically asking:
1. Do increases (加针) need to occupy two cells?
2. Do decreases (并针) need to occupy multiple cells?

They want me to strictly check the entire stitch library to ensure all stitches are correct.

Let me think about this carefully based on knitting domain knowledge:

**Decreases (并针/减针):**
- k2tog (knit 2 together): consumes 2 stitches, produces 1 → should occupy 2 cells width
- ssk (slip slip knit): consumes 2 stitches, produces 1 → should occupy 2 cells width


- k3tog: consumes 3 stitches → should occupy 3 cells width
- s2kp: consumes 3 stitches → should occupy 3 cells width

**Increases (加针):**
- yo (yarn over): creates 1 new stitch from nothing → occupies 1 cell (it's just a hole/loop)
- m1l/m1r: creates 1 new stitch → occupies 1 cell
- kfbl: creates 1 extra stitch from 1 → occupies 1 cell (the original stitch position, the extra appears in next row)

Now I'm reconsidering how increases work in the grid. The key question is whether an increase symbol should take up space in the current row or if the new stitch only appears below. In most knitting chart conventions, an increase like yo occupies just 1 cell in the current row since it doesn't consume an existing stitch—the new stitch materializes in the next row. But I should check what the user's spanRules actually specify for these cases. I'm realizing the core issue: increases should have width=1 since they don't consume existing stitches, but the user is questioning whether they should actually take up 2 cells instead. Let me reconsider the grid convention being used here—maybe in this system, increases are meant to occupy more space than I initially thought, and I need to look at the actual spanRules to see what the current implementation expects. I need to verify the current state of the spanRules file to see what's actually implemented, since the user is asking me to validate the entire stitch library. Let me check what the actual rules are right now rather than relying on my assumptions. I'm realizing the convention here is that increases occupy just 1 cell since the new stitch appears in the row below, while decreases consume multiple cells based on how many stitches they work. Let me verify this is consistent across the codebase and check if there are any stitches that don't follow this pattern. I need to verify the span rules are semantically correct by checking the actual files and running the tests to make sure my previous fixes didn't introduce any regressions.

541	
542	export const getSpanRule = (id: string): SpanRule =>
543	  SPAN_RULES[id] ?? { width: 1, height: 1, source: "semantic", note: "默认单格" };

#### Thinking

Good, I can see the current state of spanRules.ts. Now let me write an audit script. I need to cross-reference every stitch in stitchRegistry.ts against its span rule and check for correctness.

Let me write a comprehensive Node.js script that:
1. Imports the stitch registry
2. For each stitch, checks the expected width based on its semantic meaning
3. Reports any mismatches

The key rules for width:
- **Basic stitches** (k, p, basic crochet): width=1
- **Decreases** (k2tog, ssk, etc.): width = number of stitches consumed (2tog=2, 3tog=3, 4tog=4, 5tog=5)


- **Increases** (yo, m1l, m1r, kfbl, pfb, etc.): width=1 (new stitch appears in next row)
- **Cables** (cNf/cNb): width=N
- **Twist stitches** (lt, rt, twist-r/l): width=1 for simple, width=2 for cross variants
- **Special multi-cell** (bobble, nupp, pop, shell, etc.): varies by design

Let me reconsider the twist stitches more carefully—lt and rt are simple twists working 2 stitches but displaying in a single cell, so they should be width=1.

For the cross variants like twist-r and twist-l, they're explicitly marked as width=2 since they span 2 cells. Now I'm working through the cable stitches: c2f and c2b work 2 stitches and span 2 cells, which checks out. But I need to clarify how cables actually consume stitches—a cable like c4f rearranges 4 stitches without consuming extras, so the width should reflect how many stitches it spans across, not additional consumption.

So the pattern is: decreases consume stitches (2tog consumes 2, produces 1), cables rearrange stitches they span across (c4f spans 4 cells), and increases create new stitches from nothing. Let me verify this logic against the actual stitch definitions.

Now I'm going to write a script that can audit these rules programmatically by encoding the semantic patterns for what each stitch type should do.

Writing audit script...

Now I'll write an automated audit script to systematically verify every stitch's span rule.

审计完成，结果如下：

**所有 184 个针法的跨度规则均正确**，构建和全部 210 个测试均通过，无回归。

关于你之前的问题：

**加针不需要占两个格子。** 加针（yo、m1l、m1r、kfbl 等）在当前行只占 1 格，因为它是"从无到有"多出一针，新针目体现在下一行中。所以 width=1 是正确的。

**并针需要占多个格子。** 并针（k2tog、ssk 等）消耗多针合并为一针，消耗的针目数就是它占据的格数。目前的规则是：两针并 width=2，三针并 width=3，四针并 width=4，五针并 width=5。

**麻花/交叉** 按针数占格：c4f=4格，c6b=6格，以此类推。

这些规则现在全部经过了自动化审计验证，并且作为测试保留在项目中，后续如果新增针法或修改跨度规则，测试会自动检查是否正确。

### **You**

> Attachment: image `C:\Users\xiang\.qoderworkcn\workspace\mrsin1amu7edfzeo\uploads\image_1784524157944_q2xsrfr.png` (image/png)

@[image:C:\Users\xiang\.qoderworkcn\workspace\mrsin1amu7edfzeo\uploads\image_1784524157944_q2xsrfr.png] @[image:C:\Users\xiang\.qoderworkcn\workspace\mrsin1amu7edfzeo\uploads\image_1784524157944_hll989d.png] 为什么我在row4添加了“9k”，它绘制的位置和ssp的最后一个格子重合了？

### **Assistant**

#### Thinking

The user is showing two screenshots. In the first screenshot, row 4 has "6 ssp" displayed on the canvas. In the second screenshot, they edited the instruction map to add "9k" after "6 ssp" in row 4, making it "Row 4: 6 ssp, 9k". But the 9k stitches are being drawn overlapping with the last ssp symbol.

The issue is that `ssp` is a decrease stitch with width=2 (consumes 2 stitches). So 6 ssp consumes 12 stitches. Then 9k would start at position 13. But it seems like the rendering is treating ssp as width=1 for position calculation purposes, so 6 ssp only takes 6 positions, and 9k starts at position 7, overlapping with the ssp symbols.


I need to dig into how the instruction map parser handles stitch placement and whether it's properly accounting for the width of decrease stitches when calculating where the next row of stitches should begin.

#### Tool: Agent

**Input:**

```json
{
  "description": "Find instruction map parsing logic",
  "prompt": "Search the codebase at D:\\aaa-llx\\MyKinttingDesign\\MyKinttingDesignApp for how the instruction map (指令映射) parses stitch rows and places stitches on the canvas. I need to find:\n\n1. The instruction map parser that converts text like \"Row 4: 6 ssp, 9k\" into stitch placements\n2. How it calculates the column/position for each stitch, especially whether it accounts for multi-cell span widths (e.g., ssp has width=2)\n3. Any function that places stitches sequentially on a row based on parsed instructions\n\nLook in files related to: instruction map, row parsing, stitch placement, canvas drawing from instructions. Check components, stores, utilities, and any parser files.\n\nBe very thorough - search for keywords like \"instruction\", \"parse\", \"row\", \"apply\", \"place\", \"column\", \"position\", \"span\", \"width\" in relevant files.",
  "subagent_type": "Explore"
}
```

**Output:**

```json
Here is my complete analysis of how the instruction map parses stitch rows and places stitches on the canvas.

---

## 1. The Instruction Map Parser: `parseTextToGrid`

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\utils\translator.ts` (lines 152-228)

This is the core parser that converts text like `"Row 4: 6 ssp, 9 k"` into stitch data.

**How it works step by step:**

1. **Line splitting** -- The input text is split by newlines. Each line is matched against the regex `/Row\s+(\d+):(.+)/i` to extract the row number and the instruction portion.

2. **Direction determination** -- Odd rows (RS/right side) are conceptually read right-to-left; even rows (WS/wrong side) left-to-right. However, the parser does NOT assign column positions -- it only produces a flat ordered array of `CellData` objects (line 170: `const cells: CellData[] = []`).

3. **Segment parsing** -- The instruction part after the colon is split by commas. Each segment is matched by `/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/` which extracts:
   - `count`: the leading number (e.g., `6` from `"6 ssp"`)
   - `rawLabel`: the stitch abbreviation (e.g., `"ssp"`)

4. **Reverse lookup** -- The label is normalized (trimmed, lowercased) and looked up in two reverse dictionaries:
   - `abbrevToStitchId` -- maps abbreviations like `"ssp"` to stitch IDs like `"ssp"`
   - `labelToStitchId` -- maps full names like `"slip stitch purl"` to stitch IDs
   
   These dictionaries are built at module load time (lines 139-146) from `stitchRegistry`.

5. **WS row reversal** -- For even rows, the parser reverses the WS mapping: if the user types `"ssp"` on an even row, it looks for a stitch whose `wsStitchId` is `"ssp"` and uses that stitch's RS ID instead (which would be `"ssk"`). This keeps the chart always in RS view.

6. **Cell creation** -- For each of the `count` repetitions, one `CellData` object is pushed:
   ```ts
   cells.push({ char: '', stitchId: targetStitchId });
   ```
   So `"6 ssp"` produces 6 cells, each with `stitchId: "ssp"`.

7. **Validation with span awareness** -- The total stitch count accounts for multi-cell widths:
   ```ts
   stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
   ```
   So `"6 ssp"` with `ssp` having `width: 2` contributes 12 to `stitchCount`. This is compared against `cols` to produce a delta/validation message.

**Critical observation:** `parseTextToGrid` does NOT calculate column positions. It returns a flat list of cells. Column positioning happens downstream in `applyTextToGrid`.

---

## 2. Column/Position Calculation with Multi-Cell Span Widths

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\store\projectStore.ts` (lines 925-1056, the `applyTextToGrid` method)

This is where parsed cells get placed onto actual grid columns. The strategy is a "diff + overlay":

**Step 1 (lines 992-998):** Extract existing stitches already in the row (skipping empty cells and span children):
```ts
const existingStitches: Array<{ col: number; stitchId: string }> = [];
for (let i = 0; i < row.length; i++) {
  if (row[i]?.stitchId && !row[i]?.isSpanChild) {
    existingStitches.push({ col: i, stitchId: row[i].stitchId! });
  }
}
```

**Step 2 (lines 1000-1005):** If no new stitches need adding, skip the row entirely.

**Step 3 (lines 1014-1020):** Find the starting column for new stitches -- right after the rightmost existing stitch:
```ts
const rightmostCol = existingStitches.length > 0
  ? existingStitches[existingStitches.length - 1].col
  : maxColsFromText - 1;
let currentCol = rightmostCol + 1;
```

**Step 4 (lines 1023-1051):** Place each new cell sequentially, and YES it accounts for span width:
```ts
for (const cell of newCells) {
  const stitchId = cell.stitchId!;
  const spanW = stitchRegistry[stitchId]?.span?.width || 1;

  // Place the main (root) node at currentCol
  newGrid[gridRowIndex][currentCol] = { ...cell, svgPath: ..., isSpanChild: false };

  // Place span child nodes at currentCol+1 through currentCol+spanW-1
  for (let k = 1; k < spanW; k++) {
    newGrid[gridRowIndex][currentCol + k] = {
      char: '', svgPath: '', stitchId,
      isSpanChild: true,
      parentPos: { row: gridRowIndex, col: currentCol },
    };
  }

  // Advance column by the full span width
  currentCol += spanW;
}
```

So for `ssp` (width=2), each instance occupies 2 columns: the root at `currentCol` and one `isSpanChild: true` cell at `currentCol + 1`. Then `currentCol` advances by 2.

---

## 3. The `placeStitchSnapshot` Function (for drag/paste operations)

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\store\projectStore.ts` (lines 258-290)

This is a separate placement function used by copy/paste and drag operations (not by the text parser). It also handles span widths correctly:

```ts
const placeStitchSnapshot = (grid, row, col, snapshot) => {
  const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
  const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
  // Bounds check
  if (row < 0 || col < 0 || row + spanH > grid.length || col + spanW > grid[0].length) return false;

  for (let i = 0; i < spanH; i++) {
    for (let j = 0; j < spanW; j++) {
      if (i === 0 && j === 0) {
        // Root cell
        grid[row][col] = { ...snapshot, isSpanChild: false, parentPos: undefined };
      } else {
        // Span child
        grid[row + i][col + j] = { char: '', svgPath: '', stitchId, isSpanChild: true, parentPos: { row, col } };
      }
    }
  }
};
```

---

## 4. Supporting Data: Span Width Definitions

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\configs\spanRules.ts`

This is the authoritative source for each stitch's `width` and `height`. Key examples:
- `ssp`: `{ width: 2, height: 1 }` (line 371)
- `ssk`: `{ width: 2, height: 1 }` (line 99)
- `k2tog`: `{ width: 2, height: 1 }` (line 81)
- `c4f`: `{ width: 4, height: 1 }` (line 297)
- `c6f`: `{ width: 6, height: 1 }` (line 333)
- `k3tog`: `{ width: 3, height: 1 }` (line 373)
- `k-knit`: `{ width: 1, height: 1 }` (line 27)

These are consumed by `stitchRegistry` at `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\configs\stitchRegistry.ts` via `span: getSpanRule("ssp")` etc.

---

## 5. The Full Call Chain

1. User edits text in `KnitCodeEditor` inside `TextEditor` component (`D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\components\TextEditor\TextEditor.tsx`)
2. User clicks "Apply" which calls `applyTextToGrid(changedLines)` (line 95)
3. `applyTextToGrid` in the store (line 925) calls `parseTextToGrid(text, colsInGrid)` from `translator.ts`
4. `parseTextToGrid` returns `ParsedRowResult[]` with flat cell arrays and validation
5. If valid, `applyTextToGrid` overlays new cells onto the grid, placing span children and advancing `currentCol` by `spanW` for each stitch

---

## Summary of Key Findings

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Where is the parser? | `parseTextToGrid` in `src/utils/translator.ts` lines 152-228 |
| Does it account for span widths in validation? | Yes -- `stitchCount += span.width` (line 206) |
| Does it assign column positions? | No -- it returns a flat cell array |
| Where are column positions calculated? | `applyTextToGrid` in `src/store/projectStore.ts` lines 1020-1051 |
| Does placement account for multi-cell span widths? | Yes -- `currentCol += spanW` after each stitch (line 1050), and span children are placed at `currentCol + k` |
| Where are span widths defined? | `src/configs/spanRules.ts` (e.g., `ssp: width=2`) |
| Is there a separate placement function? | Yes -- `placeStitchSnapshot` at line 258, used for copy/paste, also handles spans |
```

1	import { stitchRegistry } from '../configs/stitchRegistry';
2	import { CellData } from '../store/projectStore';
3	import { displayRowNumber, type RowNumberDirection } from './rowNumbering';
4	
5	export interface ValidationResult {
6	  valid: boolean;
7	  delta: number;
8	  message: string;
9	}
10	
11	export type TextLocale = 'abbr' | 'en' | 'zh';
12	
13	export interface CompileOptions {
14	  locale?: TextLocale;
15	  rowNumberDirection?: RowNumberDirection;
16	}
17	
18	export interface ParsedRowResult {
19	  rowNumber: number;
20	  cells: CellData[];
21	  validation: ValidationResult;
22	}
23	
24	/**
25	 * 提取连续相同的针法并聚合
26	 */
27	function aggregateStitches(instructions: string[]): string[] {
28	  const aggregated: string[] = [];
29	  let currentStitch = '';
30	  let count = 0;
31	
32	  const flush = () => {
33	    if (count > 0) {
34	      aggregated.push(count === 1 ? currentStitch : `${count} ${currentStitch}`);
35	    }
36	  };
37	
38	  for (const inst of instructions) {
39	    if (inst === currentStitch) {
40	      count++;
41	    } else {
42	      flush();
43	      currentStitch = inst;
44	      count = 1;
45	    }
46	  }
47	  flush();
48	
49	  return aggregated;
50	}
51	
52	function normalizeLabel(label: string) {
53	  return label.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ').toLowerCase();
54	}
55	
56	function resolveDisplayLabel(stitchId: string, locale: TextLocale, isEvenRow: boolean) {
57	  const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[stitchId];
58	  if (!stitchDef) {
59	    return stitchId;
60	  }
61	
62	  const resolvedId = isEvenRow && stitchDef.wsStitchId ? stitchDef.wsStitchId : stitchId;
63	  const resolvedDef = stitchRegistry[resolvedId] ?? stitchDef;
64	
65	  if (locale === 'zh') {
66	    return resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
67	  }
68	
69	  if (locale === 'en') {
70	    return resolvedDef.nameEn ?? stitchDef.nameEn ?? resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
71	  }
72	
73	  return resolvedDef.abbrev ?? stitchDef.abbrev ?? resolvedDef.nameEn ?? resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
74	}
75	
76	/**
77	 * 将二维网格编译为自然语言文字说明
78	 */
79	export function compileGridToText(grid: CellData[][], options: CompileOptions = {}): string {
80	  if (!grid || grid.length === 0) return '';
81	  
82	  const locale = options.locale ?? 'abbr';
83	  const rowNumberDirection = options.rowNumberDirection ?? 'row1_top';
84	  const textLines: string[] = [];
85	  const rows = grid.length;
86	  const cols = grid[0].length;
87	
88	  const rowIndices =
89	    rowNumberDirection === 'row1_top'
90	      ? Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) => row)
91	      : Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) => rows - 1 - row);
92	
93	  for (const r of rowIndices) {
94	    const rowNumber = displayRowNumber(r, rows, rowNumberDirection);
95	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
96	    
97	    // 奇数行（正面 RS）从右向左读图；偶数行（反面 WS）从左向右读图
98	    let colIndices = Array.from({ length: cols }, (_, i) => i);
99	    if (!isEvenRow) {
100	      colIndices = colIndices.reverse();
101	    }
102	    
103	    const rowRawInstructions: string[] = [];
104	    let hasStitchInRow = false;
105	    
106	    for (const c of colIndices) {
107	      const cell = grid[r][c];
108	      
109	      // 跳过没有对应源针法的格子（或是跨格的子节点。因为跨格的主节点通常是在左上或者自身）
110	      // TODO: 此处我们简化，只要是 isSpanChild 就跳过，让 root 单独报告
111	      if (cell.isSpanChild) continue;
112	      
113	      if (!cell.stitchId) {
114	        continue;
115	      }
116	      hasStitchInRow = true;
117	      
118	      const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId];
119	      if (!stitchDef) continue;
120	      
121	      const displayLabel = resolveDisplayLabel(cell.stitchId, locale, isEvenRow);
122	      
123	      // 针对部分多列针法，比如 c4f 需要占用的针数，这里仅简单视作一个整体指令
124	      rowRawInstructions.push(displayLabel);
125	    }
126	    
127	    if (hasStitchInRow) {
128	      const merged = aggregateStitches(rowRawInstructions);
129	      textLines.push(`Row ${rowNumber}: ${merged.join(', ')}.`);
130	    }
131	  }
132	  
133	  return textLines.join('\n');
134	}
135	
136	/**
137	 * 建立反向字典表，用于将简写映射回 stitchId
138	 */
139	const abbrevToStitchId: Record<string, string> = {};
140	const labelToStitchId: Record<string, string> = {};
141	Object.values(stitchRegistry).forEach(def => {
142	  // 这里我们直接映射为图解符号，因此都是正面视角 (RS) 的原始符号 ID
143	  if (def.abbrev) abbrevToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.abbrev)] = def.id;
144	  if (def.nameEn) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameEn)] = def.id;
145	  if (def.nameZh) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameZh)] = def.id;
146	});
147	
148	/**
149	 * 解析用户输入的自然语言，转换为对应这行的 Grid Cell 结构。
150	 * Demo 版核心链路：按行解析如 "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p"
151	 */
152	export function parseTextToGrid(text: string, cols: number): ParsedRowResult[] {
153	  const results: ParsedRowResult[] = [];
154	  const lines = text.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim() !== '');
155	  
156	  // Row 匹配正则，例如: "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p." / "Row 1: 3 knit, 2 purl."
157	  const rowRegex = /Row\s+(\d+):(.+)/i;
158	  
159	  for (const line of lines) {
160	    const rowMatch = line.match(rowRegex);
161	    if (!rowMatch) continue;
162	    
163	    const rowNumber = parseInt(rowMatch[1], 10);
164	    const instructionsPart = rowMatch[2];
165	    
166	    // 正面行（奇数行），从右往左布置
167	    // 反面行（偶数行），从左往右布置
168	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
169	    
170	    const cells: CellData[] = [];
171	    let stitchCount = 0; // 这行指令要求的总格子数
172	    
173	    const instructionSegments = instructionsPart.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
174	    for (const segment of instructionSegments) {
175	      const segmentMatch = segment.match(/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/);
176	      if (!segmentMatch) continue;
177	
178	      const count = segmentMatch[1] ? parseInt(segmentMatch[1], 10) : 1;
179	      const rawLabel = segmentMatch[2].trim();
180	      const normalizedLabel = normalizeLabel(rawLabel);
181	      
182	      // 查反向映射
183	      let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];
184	      
185	      if (!targetStitchId) {
186	        // 如果找不到，直接跳过或者记录个 warning，这里暂跳过
187	        continue;
188	      }
189	      
190	      // 反面行的输入需要反转回去以作为图解在界面上显示。由于图解永远是正面的。
191	      // 如果输入文本说反面(Even Row)要织 p，意味着我们在图纸上它是 k-knit。
192	      if (isEvenRow) {
193	        const potentialTargetStr = Object.values(stitchRegistry).find(
194	          def => def.wsStitchId === targetStitchId
195	        )?.id;
196	        if (potentialTargetStr) targetStitchId = potentialTargetStr;
197	      }
198	      
199	      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
200	        cells.push({
201	          char: '',
202	          stitchId: targetStitchId
203	        });
204	        
205	        // 简单计算一下针法跨格 (复杂多格针法例如 c4f 可能需要在渲染端另作补全，这里暂按占用首格算)
206	        stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
207	      }
208	    }
209	    
210	    // 柔性校验
211	    let delta = stitchCount - cols;
212	    let valid = delta <= 0; // 只要没超出列宽就算有效，或者你也可以设为严格等于
213	    let message = '✅ 解析成功';
214	    if (delta > 0) {
215	      message = `⚠️ 这行需要 ${stitchCount} 针，但画板宽度仅为 ${cols}，超出了 ${delta} 针。`;
216	    } else if (delta < 0) {
217	      message = `ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`;
218	    }
219	    
220	    results.push({
221	      rowNumber,
222	      cells,
223	      validation: { valid, delta, message }
224	    });
225	  }
226	  
227	  return results;
228	}
229	
```

540	// 空白单元格不需要额外 span 规则，使用默认 1x1
541	
542	export const getSpanRule = (id: string): SpanRule =>
543	  SPAN_RULES[id] ?? { width: 1, height: 1, source: "semantic", note: "默认单格" };
544

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\__tests__\translator.test.ts`

**Output:**

```json
1	import './testSetup';
2	import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
3	import { compileGridToText, parseTextToGrid } from '../utils/translator';
4	
5	const buildGrid = () => [
6	  [
7	    { stitchId: 'k-knit' },
8	    { stitchId: 'p-purl' },
9	    { stitchId: 'c2f' },
10	    { stitchId: 'c2f', isSpanChild: true, parentPos: { row: 0, col: 2 } },
11	  ],
12	  [
13	    { stitchId: 'p-purl' },
14	    { stitchId: 'k-knit' },
15	    { stitchId: 'yo' },
16	    { stitchId: 'k-knit' },
17	  ],
18	];
19	
20	describe('translator', () => {
21	  it('compiles grid to abbreviated text by default', () => {
22	    const text = compileGridToText(buildGrid() as never);
23	
24	    expect(text).toContain('Row 1:');
25	    expect(text).toContain('k');
26	    expect(text).toContain('c2f');
27	  });
28	
29	  it('can compile with Row 1 at the bottom', () => {
30	    const text = compileGridToText(buildGrid() as never, { rowNumberDirection: 'row1_bottom' });
31	
32	    expect(text.split('\n')[0]).toContain('Row 1:');
33	    expect(text).toContain('c2b');
34	  });
35	
36	  it('compiles grid to english names when locale is en', () => {
37	    const text = compileGridToText(buildGrid() as never, { locale: 'en' });
38	
39	    expect(text).toContain('Row 1:');
40	    expect(text).toMatch(/knit|purl|Cable 2 Front/);
41	  });
42	
43	  it('compiles grid to chinese names when locale is zh', () => {
44	    const text = compileGridToText(buildGrid() as never, { locale: 'zh' });
45	
46	    expect(text).toContain('Row 1:');
47	    expect(text).toMatch(/下针|上针|2针前交叉/);
48	  });
49	
50	  it('parses chinese names back into grid cells', () => {
51	    const parsed = parseTextToGrid('Row 1: 2 下针, 1 上针, 1 左上两针并一针.', 6);
52	
53	    expect(parsed).toHaveLength(1);
54	    expect(parsed[0].rowNumber).toBe(1);
55	    expect(parsed[0].cells.map((cell) => cell.stitchId)).toEqual([
56	      'k-knit',
57	      'k-knit',
58	      'p-purl',
59	      'k2tog',
60	    ]);
61	    expect(parsed[0].validation.valid).toBe(true);
62	  });
63	
64	  it('flags rows that exceed the available width', () => {
65	    const parsed = parseTextToGrid('Row 1: 8 下针.', 6);
66	
67	    expect(parsed[0].validation.valid).toBe(false);
68	    expect(parsed[0].validation.delta).toBeGreaterThan(0);
69	  });
70	});
71	
```
