> Read: `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\components\TextEditor\TextEditor.tsx`

**Output:**

```json
1	import React, { useMemo, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
2	import { useCanvasStore } from '../../store/canvasStore';
3	import { useProjectStore } from '../../store/projectStore';
4	import { compileGridToText, type TextLocale } from '../../utils/translator';
5	import { gridRowFromDisplayRow } from '../../utils/rowNumbering';
6	import KnitCodeEditor from './KnitCodeEditor';
7	import './text-editor.css';
8	
9	const LOCALES: Array<{ id: TextLocale; label: string }> = [
10	  { id: 'abbr', label: 'Abbr' },
11	  { id: 'en', label: 'EN' },
12	  { id: 'zh', label: '中文' },
13	];
14	
15	export const TextEditor: React.FC = () => {
16	  const {
17	    grids,
18	    currentMode,
19	    textLocale,
20	    setTextLocale,
21	    rowNumberDirection,
22	    setRowNumberDirection,
23	    applyTextToGrid,
24	    validationResults,
25	    resizeGrid,
26	  } = useProjectStore();
27	  const setHighlightedRow = useCanvasStore((state) => state.setHighlightedRow);
28	
29	  const [isEditMode, setIsEditMode] = useState(false);
30	  const [editText, setEditText] = useState('');
31	  const [originalText, setOriginalText] = useState('');
32	
33	  const currentGrid = grids[currentMode];
34	  const rowsInGrid = currentGrid.length;
35	  const colsInGrid = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
36	
37	  const instructionLines = useMemo(() => {
38	    const text = compileGridToText(currentGrid, { locale: textLocale, rowNumberDirection });
39	    return text
40	      .split('\n')
41	      .map((line) => line.trim())
42	      .filter(Boolean)
43	      .map((line) => {
44	        const rowNumber = Number(line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i)?.[1] ?? 0);
45	        return { line, rowNumber };
46	      });
47	  }, [currentGrid, rowNumberDirection, textLocale]);
48	
49	  const handleRowClick = (rowNumber: number) => {
50	    const gridRow = gridRowFromDisplayRow(rowNumber, rowsInGrid, rowNumberDirection);
51	    if (gridRow >= 0 && gridRow < rowsInGrid) {
52	      setHighlightedRow(gridRow);
53	    }
54	  };
55	
56	  // 进入编辑模式：用当前编译文本填充编辑器，并保存原始文本用于 diff
57	  const handleEnterEdit = useCallback(() => {
58	    const text = compileGridToText(currentGrid, { locale: textLocale, rowNumberDirection });
59	    setEditText(text);
60	    setOriginalText(text);
61	    setIsEditMode(true);
62	  }, [currentGrid, textLocale, rowNumberDirection]);
63	
64	  // 退出编辑模式
65	  const handleExitEdit = useCallback(() => {
66	    setIsEditMode(false);
67	  }, []);
68	
69	  // 应用文字到画布：逐行 diff，只发送变更的行
70	  const handleApply = useCallback(() => {
71	    const originalLines = originalText.split('\n').map((l) => l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
72	    const editedLines = editText.split('\n').map((l) => l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
73	
74	    // 建立原始行 Map: rowNumber → line text
75	    const originalMap = new Map<number, string>();
76	    for (const line of originalLines) {
77	      const match = line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i);
78	      if (match) originalMap.set(parseInt(match[1], 10), line);
79	    }
80	
81	    // 只保留变化的行或新增的行
82	    const changedLines: string[] = [];
83	    for (const line of editedLines) {
84	      const match = line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i);
85	      if (!match) continue;
86	      const rowNum = parseInt(match[1], 10);
87	      const origLine = originalMap.get(rowNum);
88	      if (!origLine || origLine !== line) {
89	        changedLines.push(line);
90	      }
91	    }
92	
93	    if (changedLines.length === 0) return;
94	
95	    applyTextToGrid(changedLines.join('\n'));
96	  }, [editText, originalText, applyTextToGrid]);
97	
98	  // 扩展画布
99	  const handleResize = useCallback(
100	    (newCols: number) => {
101	      resizeGrid(newCols);
102	    },
103	    [resizeGrid]
104	  );
105	
106	  return (
107	    <div className="text-editor-container instruction-map-panel">
108	      <div className="text-editor-header">
109	        <div>
110	          <span className="text-editor-kicker">Instruction Map</span>
111	          <h3>指令映射</h3>
112	        </div>
113	        {!isEditMode ? (
114	          <button type="button" className="edit-toggle-btn" onClick={handleEnterEdit}>
115	            编辑
116	          </button>
117	        ) : (
118	          <button type="button" className="edit-toggle-btn exit" onClick={handleExitEdit}>
119	            退出编辑
120	          </button>
121	        )}
122	      </div>
123	
124	      <div className="text-editor-toolbar" role="group" aria-label="行号方向">
125	        <button
126	          type="button"
127	          className={rowNumberDirection === 'row1_top' ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
128	          onClick={() => setRowNumberDirection('row1_top')}
129	        >
130	          Row 1 顶部
131	        </button>
132	        <button
133	          type="button"
134	          className={rowNumberDirection === 'row1_bottom' ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
135	          onClick={() => setRowNumberDirection('row1_bottom')}
136	        >
137	          Row 1 底部
138	        </button>
139	      </div>
140	
141	      <div className="text-editor-toolbar" role="group" aria-label="文本输出语言">
142	        {LOCALES.map((locale) => (
143	          <button
144	            key={locale.id}
145	            type="button"
146	            className={textLocale === locale.id ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
147	            onClick={() => setTextLocale(locale.id)}
148	          >
149	            {locale.label}
150	          </button>
151	        ))}
152	      </div>
153	
154	      {/* 编辑模式 */}
155	      {isEditMode ? (
156	        <div className="edit-mode-section">
157	          <KnitCodeEditor
158	            value={editText}
159	            onChange={setEditText}
160	            locale={textLocale}
161	          />
162	          <div className="edit-actions">
163	            <button type="button" className="apply-btn" onClick={handleApply}>
164	              应用到画布
165	            </button>
166	            <span className="edit-hint">格式：Row N: 数量 针法, 数量 针法.</span>
167	          </div>
168	
169	          {/* 校验结果 */}
170	          {validationResults.length > 0 && (
171	            <div className="validation-results">
172	              {validationResults.map((result, index) => (
173	                <div
174	                  key={index}
175	                  className={`validation-row ${result.validation.valid ? 'valid' : 'invalid'}`}
176	                >
177	                  <span className="validation-row-num">Row {result.rowNumber}</span>
178	                  <span className="validation-message">{result.validation.message}</span>
179	                  {result.validation.delta > 0 && (
180	                    <button
181	                      type="button"
182	                      className="resize-btn"
183	                      onClick={() => handleResize(colsInGrid + result.validation.delta)}
184	                    >
185	                      扩展到 {colsInGrid + result.validation.delta} 列
186	                    </button>
187	                  )}
188	                </div>
189	              ))}
190	            </div>
191	          )}
192	        </div>
193	      ) : (
194	        /* 只读映射模式（原有逻辑，完全不变） */
195	        <div className="instruction-map-list" aria-label="只读指令映射">
196	          {instructionLines.length ? (
197	            instructionLines.map(({ line, rowNumber }) => (
198	              <button
199	                key={`${rowNumber}-${line}`}
200	                type="button"
201	                className="instruction-map-row"
202	                onClick={() => handleRowClick(rowNumber)}
203	              >
204	                {line}
205	              </button>
206	            ))
207	          ) : (
208	            <p className="instruction-map-empty">画布中暂无可映射的针法。</p>
209	          )}
210	        </div>
211	      )}
212	    </div>
213	  );
214	};
215	
```

```json
1	import type { GridCellPosition, SelectedCellState, ViewportSize } from '../store/canvasStore';
2	import type { CellData } from '../store/projectStore';
3	
4	export interface Point {
5	  x: number;
6	  y: number;
7	}
8	
9	export interface ResolvedGridCell {
10	  anchor: GridCellPosition;
11	  root: GridCellPosition;
12	  cell: CellData | null;
13	}
14	
15	export interface NavigatorMetrics {
16	  miniCellSize: number;
17	  originX: number;
18	  originY: number;
19	  gridWidth: number;
20	  gridHeight: number;
21	}
22	
23	export const clamp = (value: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
24	
25	export function screenToGrid(
26	  screenPoint: Point,
27	  viewportOffset: Point,
28	  scale: number,
29	  cellSize: number
30	): { row: number; col: number } {
31	  const gridX = (screenPoint.x - viewportOffset.x) / scale;
32	  const gridY = (screenPoint.y - viewportOffset.y) / scale;
33	
34	  return {
35	    col: Math.floor(gridX / cellSize),
36	    row: Math.floor(gridY / cellSize),
37	  };
38	}
39	
40	export function gridToScreen(
41	  row: number,
42	  col: number,
43	  viewportOffset: Point,
44	  scale: number,
45	  cellSize: number
46	): Point {
47	  return {
48	    x: col * cellSize * scale + viewportOffset.x,
49	    y: row * cellSize * scale + viewportOffset.y,
50	  };
51	}
52	
53	export function calculateZoomOffset(
54	  currentOffset: Point,
55	  currentScale: number,
56	  newScale: number,
57	  mousePoint: Point
58	): Point {
59	  const logicalX = (mousePoint.x - currentOffset.x) / currentScale;
60	  const logicalY = (mousePoint.y - currentOffset.y) / currentScale;
61	
62	  return {
63	    x: mousePoint.x - logicalX * newScale,
64	    y: mousePoint.y - logicalY * newScale,
65	  };
66	}
67	
68	export function resolveGridCell(
69	  grid: CellData[][],
70	  row: number,
71	  col: number
72	): ResolvedGridCell | null {
73	  if (!grid[row] || !grid[row][col]) {
74	    return null;
75	  }
76	
77	  const anchor = { row, col };
78	  const cell = grid[row][col];
79	
80	  if (cell.isSpanChild && cell.parentPos) {
81	    const root = cell.parentPos;
82	    return {
83	      anchor,
84	      root,
85	      cell: grid[root.row]?.[root.col] ?? null,
86	    };
87	  }
88	
89	  return {
90	    anchor,
91	    root: anchor,
92	    cell,
93	  };
94	}
95	
96	export function toSelectedCellState(resolved: ResolvedGridCell): SelectedCellState {
97	  return {
98	    anchor: resolved.anchor,
99	    root: resolved.root,
100	  };
101	}
102	
103	export function getNavigatorMetrics(
104	  rows: number,
105	  cols: number,
106	  _viewportSize: ViewportSize,
107	  _scale: number,
108	  navigatorSize: number,
109	  _cellSize: number,
110	  padding: number
111	): NavigatorMetrics {
112	  const safeRows = Math.max(rows, 1);
113	  const safeCols = Math.max(cols, 1);
114	  const contentSize = Math.max(1, navigatorSize - padding * 2);
115	  const miniCellSize = Math.min(contentSize / safeCols, contentSize / safeRows);
116	  const gridWidth = cols * miniCellSize;
117	  const gridHeight = rows * miniCellSize;
118	
119	  return {
120	    miniCellSize,
121	    gridWidth,
122	    gridHeight,
123	    originX: (navigatorSize - gridWidth) / 2,
124	    originY: (navigatorSize - gridHeight) / 2,
125	  };
126	}
127	
128	export function getNavigatorViewportRect(
129	  rows: number,
130	  cols: number,
131	  viewportOffset: Point,
132	  viewportSize: ViewportSize,
133	  scale: number,
134	  cellSize: number,
135	  metrics: NavigatorMetrics
136	) {
137	  if (rows <= 0 || cols <= 0 || viewportSize.width <= 0 || viewportSize.height <= 0 || scale <= 0) {
138	    return null;
139	  }
140	
141	  const scaledCellSize = cellSize * scale;
142	  const x = metrics.originX + (-viewportOffset.x / scaledCellSize) * metrics.miniCellSize;
143	  const y = metrics.originY + (-viewportOffset.y / scaledCellSize) * metrics.miniCellSize;
144	  const width = (viewportSize.width / scaledCellSize) * metrics.miniCellSize;
145	  const height = (viewportSize.height / scaledCellSize) * metrics.miniCellSize;
146	
147	  return {
148	    x: clamp(x, metrics.originX, metrics.originX + metrics.gridWidth),
149	    y: clamp(y, metrics.originY, metrics.originY + metrics.gridHeight),
150	    width: Math.max(1, Math.min(width, metrics.gridWidth)),
151	    height: Math.max(1, Math.min(height, metrics.gridHeight)),
152	  };
153	}
154	
155	export function getViewportOffsetFromNavigatorPointer(
156	  pointer: Point,
157	  rows: number,
158	  cols: number,
159	  viewportSize: ViewportSize,
160	  scale: number,
161	  cellSize: number,
162	  metrics: NavigatorMetrics
163	): Point | null {
164	  if (rows <= 0 || cols <= 0 || viewportSize.width <= 0 || viewportSize.height <= 0 || scale <= 0) {
165	    return null;
166	  }
167	
168	  const scaledCellSize = cellSize * scale;
169	  const logicalCenterCol = (pointer.x - metrics.originX) / metrics.miniCellSize;
170	  const logicalCenterRow = (pointer.y - metrics.originY) / metrics.miniCellSize;
171	  const gridPixelWidth = cols * scaledCellSize;
172	  const gridPixelHeight = rows * scaledCellSize;
173	
174	  return {
175	    x: clamp(viewportSize.width / 2 - logicalCenterCol * scaledCellSize, viewportSize.width - gridPixelWidth, 0),
176	    y: clamp(viewportSize.height / 2 - logicalCenterRow * scaledCellSize, viewportSize.height - gridPixelHeight, 0),
177	  };
178	}
179	
```

```json
258	const placeStitchSnapshot = (grid: CellData[][], row: number, col: number, snapshot: CellData) => {
259	  if (!snapshot.stitchId) return false;
260	  const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[snapshot.stitchId];
261	  const spanW = stitchDef?.span?.width || 1;
262	  const spanH = stitchDef?.span?.height || 1;
263	
264	  if (row < 0 || col < 0 || row + spanH > grid.length || col + spanW > (grid[0]?.length ?? 0)) {
265	    return false;
266	  }
267	
268	  for (let i = 0; i < spanH; i++) {
269	    for (let j = 0; j < spanW; j++) {
270	      if (i === 0 && j === 0) {
271	        grid[row][col] = {
272	          ...snapshot,
273	          isSpanChild: false,
274	          parentPos: undefined,
275	          svgPath: snapshot.svgPath || stitchDef?.svgPath || '',
276	        };
277	      } else {
278	        grid[row + i][col + j] = {
279	          char: '',
280	          svgPath: '',
281	          stitchId: snapshot.stitchId,
282	          isSpanChild: true,
283	          parentPos: { row, col },
284	        };
285	      }
286	    }
287	  }
288

305	const forageStorage: StateStorage = {
306	  getItem: async (name: string): Promise<string | null> => {
307	    let val = (await storage.getItem(name)) as string | null;
308	    // Legacy migration step from simple localStorage
309	    if (!val && typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.localStorage) {
310	      val = window.localStorage.getItem(name);
311	      if (val) {
312	        try {
313	          await storage.setItem(name, val);
314	        } catch (e) {
315	          console.warn('Failed to migrate item to localforage', e);
316	        }
317	      }
318	    }
319	    return val || null;
320	  },
321	  setItem: async (name: string, value: string): Promise<void> => {
322	    await storage.setItem(name, value);
323	  },
324	  removeItem: async (name: string): Promise<void> => {
325	    await storage.removeItem(name);
326	  },
327	};
328	
329	// Default autosave debounce delay (ms). Increase to reduce save frequency.
330	const DEFAULT_AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS = 10000;
331	const AUTOSAVE_DELAY_STORAGE_KEY = 'kintting:autosaveDelayMs';
332	
333	// Create a debounced wrapper around the forage storage so frequent writes
334	// (e.g., during continuous drawing) are coalesced. Exposes the same
335	// StateStorage async API expected by zustand's persistence layer.
336	const createDebouncedForageStorage = (delay = DEFAULT_AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS): StateStorage => {
337	  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return forageStorage;
338	
339	  let timeout: number | undefined;
340	  const pending = new Map<string, string>();
341	  let flushing = false;
342	
343	  const flush = async () => {
344	    if (flushing) return;
345	    flushing = true;
346	    for (const [k, v] of pending) {
347	      try {
348	        await storage.setItem(k, v);
349	      } catch (e) {
350	        // ignore individual write errors
351	        console.warn('debounced storage setItem failed', e);
352	      }
353	    }
354	    pending.clear();
355	    if (typeof timeout !== 'undefined') {
356	      clearTimeout(timeout);
357	      timeout = undefined;
358	    }
359	    flushing = false;
```

#### Thinking

The agent found the key issue. Let me look at the `applyTextToGrid` function more carefully. The issue is in how it finds the starting column for new stitches.

From the agent's analysis:

Step 3 (lines 1014-1020): Find the starting column for new stitches -- right after the rightmost existing stitch:
```ts
const rightmostCol = existingStitches.length > 0
  ? existingStitches[existingStitches.length - 1].col
  : maxColsFromText - 1;
let currentCol = rightmostCol + 1;
```

The problem is that `existingStitches` only includes cells where `!row[i]?.isSpanChild`. So for 6 ssp stitches, the existing stitches would be at columns 0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10 (the root positions). The span children at columns 1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11 are skipped.


So `rightmostCol` = 10, and `currentCol` = 11. That seems correct. But wait—I need to reconsider what's actually happening here. The user is editing an existing row, not adding to a fresh one. When they change "Row 4: 6 ssp" to "Row 4: 6 ssp, 9k", the function is re-parsing the entire row and overlaying it onto the existing grid. Let me trace through the `applyTextToGrid` logic more carefully to see where the positioning goes wrong.

The function extracts existing stitches from the row first, then calculates where new stitches should start based on the rightmost existing stitch's column position. But here's the issue: if the row already contains 6 ssp stitches occupying columns 0-11, the function might be treating those as "existing" and then trying to place the 9k stitches starting at column 12, when really it should be replacing the entire row content. I'm realizing the issue might be in how the parser handles the stitch count—when it sees "9k", it creates 9 individual cells, each with width 1, so they'd occupy columns 12-20. But the user is saying the 9k overlaps with the last ssp, which suggests the positioning calculation might be off or the existing stitches aren't being accounted for correctly when determining where new stitches should start.

#### Thinking

Now I can see the bug clearly. Let me trace through the scenario:

**Initial state:** Row 4 has "6 ssp" already placed on the grid.
- 6 ssp stitches, each with width=2
- They occupy columns 0-11:
  - ssp at col 0 (root), col 1 (span child)
  - ssp at col 2 (root), col 3 (span child)
  - ssp at col 4 (root), col 5 (span child)
  - ssp at col 6 (root), col 7 (span child)
  - ssp at col 8 (root), col 9 (span child)
  - ssp at col 10 (root), col 11 (span child)

**User edits to:** "Row 4: 6 ssp, 9k"

**parseTextToGrid produces:**
- parsed.cells = [ssp, ssp, ssp, ssp, ssp, ssp, k, k, k, k, k, k, k, k, k] (15 cells)
- textStitchCount = 15

**applyTextToGrid:**
- existingStitches = [{col:0, ssp}, {col:2, ssp}, {col:4, ssp}, {col:6, ssp}, {col:8, ssp}, {col:10, ssp}] (6 entries, only root positions)
- existingCount = 6
- newCount = 15 - 6 = 9
- rightmostCol = 10 (the last existing stitch root position)
- currentCol = 11

**BUT WAIT** - the rightmost ssp occupies columns 10 AND 11 (root + span child). So column 11 is a span child of the ssp at column 10.

The bug is: `rightmostCol = 10`, then `currentCol = 10 + 1 = 11`. But column 11 is already occupied by the span child of the last ssp! The code should have calculated `currentCol = rightmostCol + spanWidth_of_rightmost_stitch = 10 + 2 = 12`.

The fix: when calculating `currentCol`, we need to account for the span width of the rightmost existing stitch, not just its root position. The rightmost stitch might span multiple columns, so we need to start placing new stitches after all of its columns are accounted for.

Fixing the calculation...

Now I'm verifying the logic: with the corrected `rightmostCol = 11`, `currentCol` becomes 12, which properly skips past the span child column and places the 9k stitches starting at column 12. The bounds check at line 1028 ensures we don't exceed the grid width, so this approach handles both normal cases and edge cases where stitches would overflow.

找到 bug 了。问题在 `applyTextToGrid` 的 Step 4 中计算起始列位置时，没有考虑最右侧已有针法的 span 宽度。

具体来说：6 个 ssp（每个 width=2）占据列 0-11，其中列 10 是最后一个 ssp 的根节点，列 11 是它的 span 子节点。代码取 `rightmostCol = 10`（最后一个根节点位置），然后 `currentCol = 10 + 1 = 11`，但列 11 已经被 ssp 的 span 子节点占用了，所以 9k 的第一个 k 就写到了列 11，和 ssp 重合了。

#### Thinking

All 210 tests pass. The fix is correct. Let me explain the bug and fix to the user.

全部 210 个测试通过。

问题原因：`applyTextToGrid` 在计算新增针法的起始列时，只取了最后一个已有针法的**根节点列号**（列 10），然后 +1 得到列 11 开始放置。但 ssp 的 span 宽度是 2，根节点在列 10，span 子节点占了列 11。所以 9k 的第一个 k 被写到了列 11，和 ssp 的 span 子节点重叠了。

修复方式：计算起始列时改为 `last.col + lastSpanW`（根节点列 + span 宽度），这样 6 个 ssp 的结束位置是 10 + 2 = 12，9k 从列 12 开始放置，就不会重叠了。

```json
148	/**
149	 * 解析用户输入的自然语言，转换为对应这行的 Grid Cell 结构。
150	 * Demo 版核心链路：按行解析如 "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p"
151	 */
152	export function parseTextToGrid(text: string, cols: number): ParsedRowResult[] {
153	  const results: ParsedRowResult[] = [];
154	  const lines = text.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim() !== '');
155	  
156	  // Row 匹配正则，例如: "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p." / "Row 1: 3 knit, 2 purl."
157	  const rowRegex = /Row\s+(\d+):(.+)/i;
158	  
159	  for (const line of lines) {
160	    const rowMatch = line.match(rowRegex);
161	    if (!rowMatch) continue;
162	    
163	    const rowNumber = parseInt(rowMatch[1], 10);
164	    const instructionsPart = rowMatch[2];
165	    
166	    // 正面行（奇数行），从右往左布置
167	    // 反面行（偶数行），从左往右布置
168	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
169	    
170	    const cells: CellData[] = [];
171	    let stitchCount = 0; // 这行指令要求的总格子数
172	    
173	    const instructionSegments = instructionsPart.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
174	    for (const segment of instructionSegments) {
175	      const segmentMatch = segment.match(/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/);
176	      if (!segmentMatch) continue;
177	
178	      const count = segmentMatch[1] ? parseInt(segmentMatch[1], 10) : 1;
179	      const rawLabel = segmentMatch[2].trim();
180	      const normalizedLabel = normalizeLabel(rawLabel);
181	      
182	      // 查反向映射
183	      let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];
184	      
185	      if (!targetStitchId) {
186	        // 如果找不到，直接跳过或者记录个 warning，这里暂跳过
187	        continue;
188	      }
189	      
190	      // 反面行的输入需要反转回去以作为图解在界面上显示。由于图解永远是正面的。
191	      // 如果输入文本说反面(Even Row)要织 p，意味着我们在图纸上它是 k-knit。
192	      if (isEvenRow) {
193	        const potentialTargetStr = Object.values(stitchRegistry).find(
194	          def => def.wsStitchId === targetStitchId
195	        )?.id;
196	        if (potentialTargetStr) targetStitchId = potentialTargetStr;
197	      }
198	      
199	      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
200	        cells.push({
201	          char: '',
202	          stitchId: targetStitchId
203	        });
204	        
205	        // 简单计算一下针法跨格 (复杂多格针法例如 c4f 可能需要在渲染端另作补全，这里暂按占用首格算)
206	        stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
207	      }
208	    }
209	    
210	    // 柔性校验
211	    let delta = stitchCount - cols;
212	    let valid = delta <= 0; // 只要没超出列宽就算有效，或者你也可以设为严格等于
213	    let message = '✅ 解析成功';
214	    if (delta > 0) {
215	      message = `⚠️ 这行需要 ${stitchCount} 针，但画板宽度仅为 ${cols}，超出了 ${delta} 针。`;
216	    } else if (delta < 0) {
217	      message = `ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`;
218	    }
219	    
220	    results.push({
221	      rowNumber,
222	      cells,
223	      validation: { valid, delta, message }
224	    });
225	  }
226	  
227	  return results;
228	}
229	
```

- `\.?` - optional period
- `$` - end

- `\s*` matches " "

- `$` matches end

Wait, that's not right. The regex engine would try to match the entire string. Let me think about this more carefully.

For "9 fan.":
- `^` matches start
- `(?:(\d+)\s*)?` matches "9 " (digits + whitespace)
- `(.+?)` needs to match one or more characters, non-greedy
- `\.?` optionally matches a period
- `$` matches end

The regex engine would try:
1. `(.+?)` = "f", `\.?` = "" → remaining "an." doesn't match `$`
2. `(.+?)` = "fa", `\.?` = "" → remaining "n." doesn't match `$`
3. `(.+?)` = "fan", `\.?` = "." → remaining "" matches `$` ✓

So the match would be: count=9, label="fan". That's correct.


So if the row already has stitches and the new text has the same or fewer stitches, it skips the row. This is the "diff + overlay" strategy.

- Original: "3 k, 5 p" = 8 stitches

All 212 tests passed (184 audit + 8 translator + 5 canvas + 4 coordinate + 3 project + 5 interaction + 3 phase2 = 212). The fix is working correctly.

Now let me explain the fix to the user.

全部 212 个测试通过。

问题原因：`applyTextToGrid` 使用的"diff + overlay"策略有缺陷。它假设用户只在行末**添加**新针法，无法处理**修改**行中间内容的情况。

具体来说，当用户把 Row 4 从 "3 k, 5 p" 改成 "3 k, 1 p, 9 fan" 时：
- 原有 8 个针法（3 k + 5 p）
- 新的 13 个针法（3 k + 1 p + 9 fan）
- 旧逻辑计算 `newCount = 13 - 8 = 5`，只取最后 5 个 cells（5 个 fan）
- 这 5 个 fan 被放在原有 8 个针法后面
- 结果：3 k + 5 p + 5 fan（而不是用户期望的 3 k + 1 p + 9 fan）

修复方案：应用新文本时，先清空整行，然后从列 0 开始放置所有解析出的针法。这样用户输入什么，画布就显示什么。

### **You**

应用新文本时，先清空整行，然后从列 0 开始放置所有解析出的针法。这样用户输入什么，画布就显示什么。

#### Thinking

Now I have a clear picture. The current code (lines 992-1033) has the "wrong fix" - it clears the entire row and places all stitches from column 0. I need to replace this with a smart diff algorithm.

Let me think about the algorithm design:

The user's requirements:
1. Preserve unchanged stitches in their original positions
2. Handle modifications in the middle of rows
3. Respect leading empty cells (rows may start at column 4, not 0)
4. Preserve middle spaces/gaps

The core challenge: Given a row with existing stitches and a new text instruction for that row, how do we figure out which stitches changed and which didn't?


I'm thinking through a sequence alignment approach - extract the existing stitches as a sequence with their positions, parse the new text into target stitches, then find the longest common prefix and suffix to identify what's actually changed in the middle, and only re-place those modified stitches while keeping everything else intact. I'm extracting the existing stitches from the row with their column positions and span widths, then comparing them against the parsed cells from the new text to identify what's changed. The key is finding the longest common prefix and suffix between the old and new stitch sequences, then only replacing the stitches in the middle section that actually differ. I'm working through the edge cases here—when there are fewer existing stitches than new ones, or when the middle section needs to expand or contract. The key insight is that I need to compare the existing stitches against the new sequence, identify what's changed in the middle, and then shift any suffix stitches accordingly while clearing out the span children from the old middle section. I'm realizing the core issue: when the middle section changes size, I need to shift the suffix stitches left or right to accommodate the new content, while keeping the prefix anchored in place. The algorithm should extract the existing prefix, middle, and suffix stitches, then clear only the middle and suffix regions before placing the new middle stitches and repositioning the suffix at its adjusted location. I need to reconsider how I'm matching the suffix stitches—when the middle section changes from 2 cells to 9 cells, the suffix stitches remain the same type, but their positions shift. So I'm comparing the stitch types from the end backward to identify which ones are truly unchanged, then recalculating where they should be placed based on the new middle width. I need to be more careful about how I'm defining the suffix matching. If the prefix takes the first `prefixLen` stitches and the suffix takes the last `suffixLen` stitches from the new cells, then the middle section is everything between those bounds. The key constraint is that `prefixLen + suffixLen` can't exceed the total number of new cells, and I need to make sure the existing stitches map correctly to these three sections.

For the actual placement, I'm thinking through how to handle the grid updates: the prefix stays put, but the middle and suffix sections need to be cleared and repositioned based on how much space the new middle section takes up. The tricky part is that when I clear the old suffix cells, I also need to clean up any span children that might extend beyond the suffix region itself.

Actually, I'm realizing a cleaner approach might be to clear everything after the prefix—the old middle and suffix combined—then place the new middle and suffix in sequence. This avoids the complexity of trying to figure out which span children belong where. The suffix stitches will end up at different column positions if the middle section changed size, but that's fine since I'm re-placing them anyway.

For the span children of the suffix, since I'm clearing all cells after the prefix before placing anything new, those old span children get wiped out automatically, and the new ones get created when I place the suffix stitches.

But I need to be careful—suffix span children could potentially extend back into the prefix area if the suffix starts close enough to the prefix boundary. Let me think through a concrete example: if the prefix ends at column 5 and the suffix starts at column 6 with a span width of 3, those span children would occupy columns 7 and 8, which are safely after the prefix. #### Thinking

智能 diff 算法已经实现并通过验证。以下是改动的核心思路：

**算法逻辑（projectStore.ts applyTextToGrid）：**

1. **提取现有针法序列** — 从当前行中取出所有非 span 子节点的针法，记录它们的列位置
2. **前缀匹配** — 从头开始比较已有针法和新文本解析出的针法，找到连续的相同部分
3. **后缀匹配** — 从尾开始比较，找到另一侧连续相同的部分（不与 prefix 重叠）
4. **精准清除** — 只清除前缀之后的区域（旧中间段 + 旧后缀及其 span 子节点）
5. **重新放置** — 从前缀结束位置开始，依次放入新的中间段和后缀针法

这样做的效果是：如果一行从第 4 列开始有针法，前缀不变的情况下，前导空格完好保留；如果只修改了中间的针法，前后未变动的针法位置纹丝不动。

**验证结果：**
- TypeScript 类型检查通过（无错误）
- 全部 212 个测试通过（包括 184 个 span 审计测试）

我发现问题了！从截图来看，添加 "9p" 后 Row 5 的原有针法完全消失。让我仔细分析代码逻辑。

关键问题：`parseTextToGrid` 返回的 `parsed.cells` 中，每个 cell 可能包含 `parentPos` 等属性，这些属性在放置时会覆盖掉正确的值。更重要的是，我需要检查 `parsed.cells` 的结构是否正确。

让我先查看 `parseTextToGrid` 的实现：



#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\utils\translator.ts`

**Output:**

```json
140	const labelToStitchId: Record<string, string> = {};
141	Object.values(stitchRegistry).forEach(def => {
142	  // 这里我们直接映射为图解符号，因此都是正面视角 (RS) 的原始符号 ID
143	  if (def.abbrev) abbrevToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.abbrev)] = def.id;
144	  if (def.nameEn) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameEn)] = def.id;
145	  if (def.nameZh) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameZh)] = def.id;
146	});
147	
148	/**
149	 * 解析用户输入的自然语言，转换为对应这行的 Grid Cell 结构。
150	 * Demo 版核心链路：按行解析如 "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p"
151	 */
152	export function parseTextToGrid(text: string, cols: number): ParsedRowResult[] {
153	  const results: ParsedRowResult[] = [];
154	  const lines = text.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim() !== '');
155	  
156	  // Row 匹配正则，例如: "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p." / "Row 1: 3 knit, 2 purl."
157	  const rowRegex = /Row\s+(\d+):(.+)/i;
158	  
159	  for (const line of lines) {
160	    const rowMatch = line.match(rowRegex);
161	    if (!rowMatch) continue;
162	    
163	    const rowNumber = parseInt(rowMatch[1], 10);
164	    const instructionsPart = rowMatch[2];
165	    
166	    // 正面行（奇数行），从右往左布置
167	    // 反面行（偶数行），从左往右布置
168	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
169	    
170	    const cells: CellData[] = [];
171	    let stitchCount = 0; // 这行指令要求的总格子数
172	    
173	    const instructionSegments = instructionsPart.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
174	    for (const segment of instructionSegments) {
175	      const segmentMatch = segment.match(/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/);
176	      if (!segmentMatch) continue;
177	
178	      const count = segmentMatch[1] ? parseInt(segmentMatch[1], 10) : 1;
179	      const rawLabel = segmentMatch[2].trim();
180	      const normalizedLabel = normalizeLabel(rawLabel);
181	      
182	      // 查反向映射
183	      let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];
184	      
185	      if (!targetStitchId) {
186	        // 如果找不到，直接跳过或者记录个 warning，这里暂跳过
187	        continue;
188	      }
189	      
190	      // 反面行的输入需要反转回去以作为图解在界面上显示。由于图解永远是正面的。
191	      // 如果输入文本说反面(Even Row)要织 p，意味着我们在图纸上它是 k-knit。
192	      if (isEvenRow) {
193	        const potentialTargetStr = Object.values(stitchRegistry).find(
194	          def => def.wsStitchId === targetStitchId
195	        )?.id;
196	        if (potentialTargetStr) targetStitchId = potentialTargetStr;
197	      }
198	      
199	      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
200	        cells.push({
201	          char: '',
202	          stitchId: targetStitchId
203	        });
204	        
205	        // 简单计算一下针法跨格 (复杂多格针法例如 c4f 可能需要在渲染端另作补全，这里暂按占用首格算)
206	        stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
207	      }
208	    }
209	    
210	    // 柔性校验
211	    let delta = stitchCount - cols;
212	    let valid = delta <= 0; // 只要没超出列宽就算有效，或者你也可以设为严格等于
213	    let message = '✅ 解析成功';
214	    if (delta > 0) {
215	      message = `⚠️ 这行需要 ${stitchCount} 针，但画板宽度仅为 ${cols}，超出了 ${delta} 针。`;
216	    } else if (delta < 0) {
217	      message = `ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`;
218	    }
219	    
220	    results.push({
221	      rowNumber,
222	      cells,
223	      validation: { valid, delta, message }
224	    });
225	  }
226	  
227	  return results;
228	}
229	
```

Looking at the parser code:
```typescript
const instructionSegments = instructionsPart.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
for (const segment of instructionSegments) {
  const segmentMatch = segment.match(/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/);
  if (!segmentMatch) continue;

  const count = segmentMatch[1] ? parseInt(segmentMatch[1], 10) : 1;
  const rawLabel = segmentMatch[2].trim();
  const normalizedLabel = normalizeLabel(rawLabel);
  
  let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];
  
  if (!targetStitchId) {
    continue;
  }
  
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    cells.push({
      char: '',
      stitchId: targetStitchId
    });
    
    stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
  }
}
```

For "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p":
- "6 no" → count=6, label="no" → targetStitchId="no-stitch" → 6 cells, stitchCount += 6
- "4 ssk" → count=4, label="ssk" → targetStitchId="ssk" → 4 cells, stitchCount += 8
- "9p" → count=9, label="p" → targetStitchId="purl" → 9 cells, stitchCount += 9

Total: 19 cells, stitchCount = 23

Let me check the loop:

```typescript
const instructionSegments = instructionsPart.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
for (const segment of instructionSegments) {
  const segmentMatch = segment.match(/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/);
  if (!segmentMatch) continue;

  const count = segmentMatch[1] ? parseInt(segmentMatch[1], 10) : 1;
  const rawLabel = segmentMatch[2].trim();
  const normalizedLabel = normalizeLabel(rawLabel);
  
  let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];
  
  if (!targetStitchId) {
    continue;
  }
  
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    cells.push({
      char: '',
      stitchId: targetStitchId
    });
    
    stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
  }
}
```

For "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p":
- instructionSegments = ["6 no", "4 ssk", "9p"]
- "6 no" → segmentMatch matches, count=6, rawLabel="no", targetStitchId="no-stitch" → 6 cells, stitchCount=6
- "4 ssk" → segmentMatch matches, count=4, rawLabel="ssk", targetStitchId="ssk" → 4 cells, stitchCount=14
- "9p" → segmentMatch matches, count=9, rawLabel="p", targetStitchId="purl" → 9 cells, stitchCount=23

This should work. So why is stitchCount = 6?

我发现问题了！让我仔细分析截图中的关键线索。

**核心问题：验证消息显示 "34 针空白"，这意味着 stitchCount = 6（40 - 34 = 6），而不是预期的 23。**

这说明 `parseTextToGrid` 只解析出了 6 个 "no" 针法，而 "4 ssk" 和 "9p" 没有被正确解析。

让我检查 "ssk" 和 "p" 是否在反向映射表中：



#### Tool: Grep

**Input:**

```json
{
  "-n": true,
  "output_mode": "content",
  "path": "D:\\aaa-llx\\MyKinttingDesign\\MyKinttingDesignApp\\src\\configs\\stitchRegistry.ts",
  "pattern": "abbrev.*ssk|id.*ssk"
}
```

**Output:**

```json
60:    id: "ssk", nameZh: "右上两针并一针", nameEn: "ssk", abbrev: "ssk",
282:    id: "xssk", nameZh: "交叉右上并针", nameEn: "crossed ssk", abbrev: "xssk",
672:    id: "sssk", nameZh: "三针左上并", nameEn: "sssk", abbrev: "sssk",
```

#### Thinking

OK so "ssk" is in the registry with abbrev "ssk". Let me check "p" (purl).

#### Tool: Grep

**Input:**

```json
{
  "-n": true,
  "output_mode": "content",
  "path": "D:\\aaa-llx\\MyKinttingDesign\\MyKinttingDesignApp\\src\\configs\\stitchRegistry.ts",
  "pattern": "abbrev.*\"p\"|id.*p-purl"
}
```

**Output:**

```json
37:    id: "p-purl", nameZh: "上针", nameEn: "purl", abbrev: "p",
```

#### Thinking

OK so both "ssk" and "p" are in the registry. The parser should be able to find them.

Let me think about this more carefully. The validation message says "34 针空白", which means stitchCount = 6. But the parser should produce stitchCount = 23 for "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p".

Wait, I just realized something important. Let me re-read the validation message format:

```typescript
if (delta > 0) {
  message = `⚠️ 这行需要 ${stitchCount} 针，但画板宽度仅为 ${cols}，超出了 ${delta} 针。`;
} else if (delta < 0) {
  message = `️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`;
}
```

For "Row 5: 6 no, 4 ssk, 9p" with cols = 40:
- stitchCount = 6*1 + 4*2 + 9*1 = 23
- delta = 23 - 40 = -17
- message = "️ 这行排布后画布剩余 17 针空白。"

But the screenshot says "34 针空白". This means delta = -34, which means stitchCount = 6.

So the parser is only producing stitchCount = 6, which means it's only parsing "6 no" and not "4 ssk" or "9p".

But why? The text is "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p", which should produce 19 cells with stitchCount = 23.

Unless... the text being parsed is not "Row 5: 6 no, 4 ssk, 9p" but something else. What if the text is "Row 5: 6 no" or "Row 5: 6 no."?

Actually, I just realized something. The user said they added "9p" to the instruction. But looking at the screenshots, the instruction changed from "6 no, 4 ssk" to "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p". So the text should be correct.

But what if the issue is that the text is being constructed from the UI state, and the UI state is not correctly updated? What if the UI is showing "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p" but the actual text being passed to the parser is different?

Actually, I think the issue might be simpler. Let me re-read the validation message one more time: "Row 5: 1这行排布后画布剩余 34 针空白。"

The "1" before "这行" is very strange. It might be a rendering issue or a bug in the UI.

But more importantly, the message says "34 针空白", which means stitchCount = 6. This is the key clue.

So the parser is only producing 6 cells (the "no" stitches). The "ssk" and "p" stitches are not being produced.

This means either:
1. The parser is not parsing "4 ssk" and "9p" correctly
2. The parser is parsing them correctly, but the cells are not being added to the array
3. The parser is parsing them correctly, but the stitchCount calculation is wrong

Let me check option 3 first. If the parser produces 19 cells but stitchCount = 6, that would mean the span width calculation is wrong. But I already checked the span widths, and they should be correct.

Let me check option 2. If the parser produces the cells but doesn't add them to the array, that would mean there's a bug in the loop. But the loop looks correct.

Let me check option 1. If the parser is not parsing "4 ssk" and "9p" correctly, that would mean the regex or label lookup is failing.

Actually, I just realized something. What if the issue is that the `targetStitchId` is not being found for "ssk" or "p"? Let me check the label lookup logic:

```typescript
let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];

if (!targetStitchId) {
  continue;
}
```

If `targetStitchId` is not found, the parser skips the segment. So if "ssk" or "p" is not in the mapping, the parser would skip them.

But I already checked, and both "ssk" and "p" are in the registry. So they should be in the mapping.

Unless... the `normalizeLabel` function is changing the label in a way that prevents the lookup from succeeding. Let me check the `normalizeLabel` function.

啊！我突然意识到一个关键点：**验证消息的格式不对！**

代码中验证消息应该是 `"ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 X 针空白。"`，但截图中显示的是 `"Row 5: 1这行排布后画布剩余 34 针空白。"`

这个 "Row 5: 1" 前缀说明验证消息不是来自 `parseTextToGrid`，而是来自 UI 层的某个地方。而且 "1" 可能是某种索引或标识符。

更重要的是：**如果 stitchCount = 23 且 cols = 40，delta 应该是 -17，消息应该是 "17 针空白"，而不是 "34 针空白"。**

"34 针空白" 意味着 delta = -34，即 stitchCount = 6。这确认了 parser 只产生了 6 个单元格。

但为什么？文本是 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"，应该产生 19 个单元格。

让我检查是否有其他问题。也许问题不在 parser，而在 `applyTextToGrid` 函数本身。让我重新审视智能 diff 算法的逻辑。

等等，我刚刚意识到一个更严重的问题：**当 grid 扩展时，`newGrid` 被重新赋值为新的数组，但 `rowsInGrid` 仍然是旧的行数！**

看这段代码：
```typescript
let newGrid: CellData[][] = cloneGrid(currentGrid);

if (maxColsFromText > colsInGrid) {
  const addedCols = maxColsFromText - colsInGrid;
  const emptyCols = Array.from({ length: addedCols }, () => ({} as CellData));
  newGrid = newGrid.map((row) => [...emptyCols, ...row]);
  // ...
}

parsedRows.forEach((parsed: any) => {
  const gridRowIndex = gridRowFromDisplayRow(parsed.rowNumber, rowsInGrid, project.rowNumberDirection);
  if (gridRowIndex < 0 || gridRowIndex >= rowsInGrid) return;
  // ...
});
```

这里 `rowsInGrid` 是在扩展之前计算的，所以它仍然是旧的值。但 grid 扩展只是增加了列数，行数没有变化，所以这应该没问题。

让我再仔细看看...

哦！我发现了真正的问题！**当 grid 扩展时，`newGrid` 被重新赋值，但 `row` 变量是在扩展之后从 `newGrid` 中获取的，所以它应该指向正确的行。**

但是，等等。让我再仔细看看扩展逻辑：

```typescript
newGrid = newGrid.map((row) => [...emptyCols, ...row]);
```

这会创建新的行数组，每个新行是 `[...emptyCols, ...oldRow]`。所以 `newGrid[gridRowIndex]` 应该是一个新的数组，包含 prepend 的空列和旧的行数据。

然后 `const row = newGrid[gridRowIndex];` 会获取这个新行的引用。对 `row[i]` 的修改应该会反映在 `newGrid[gridRowIndex][i]` 中。

这看起来是正确的。

OK，让我换个思路。也许问题不在代码逻辑，而在数据本身。让我检查一下用户的数据是否有什么特殊之处。

从截图来看，用户的网格是 40x40，已填充 52 格。Row 5 有 "6 no, 4 ssk"。

当用户添加 "9p" 后，文本变成 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"。parser 应该产生 19 个单元格，stitchCount = 23。

但验证消息说 "34 针空白"，这意味着 stitchCount = 6。

所以 parser 只产生了 6 个单元格。这只能意味着 parser 没有正确解析 "4 ssk" 和 "9p"。

但为什么？"ssk" 和 "p" 都在 registry 中，标签查找应该能成功。

除非... **parser 根本没有接收到 "4 ssk, 9p" 这部分文本！**

也许问题在于文本是如何传递给 parser 的。也许 UI 层在构建文本时出了问题，只传递了 "6 no" 而不是完整的 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"。

但这不太可能，因为指令映射显示了完整的文本 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"。

但首先，让我再仔细想想。验证消息说 "34 针空白"，这意味着 stitchCount = 6。但如果 parser 产生了 19 个单元格，stitchCount 应该是 23。

所以要么：
1. Parser 只产生了 6 个单元格
2. stitchCount 计算错误
3. 验证消息显示错误

让我检查选项 2。stitchCount 是这样计算的：
```typescript
stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
```

对于 "6 no"：stitchCount += 6 * 1 = 6
对于 "4 ssk"：stitchCount += 4 * 2 = 8
对于 "9p"：stitchCount += 9 * 1 = 9

总计：23

这应该是正确的。

所以问题一定是 parser 没有产生 "4 ssk" 和 "9p" 的单元格。

但为什么？文本是 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"，应该被正确解析。

除非... **文本中有什么特殊字符或格式问题？**

让我检查一下文本是否可能包含不可见字符或格式问题。

实际上，我认为最可能的解释是：**UI 层在构建文本时出了问题，只传递了 "6 no" 而不是完整的 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"。**

但指令映射显示了完整的文本，所以这不太可能。

OK，我真的需要添加调试日志来看看实际发生了什么。让我这样做。

实际上，我刚刚想到另一个可能性：**也许问题在于 `applyTextToGrid` 函数中的智能 diff 算法有 bug，导致它清除了整个行而不是只清除部分行。**

让我重新审视智能 diff 算法的逻辑。

```typescript
// Step 1: 提取当前行已有的针法序列
const existingStitches: Array<{ col: number; stitchId: string }> = [];
for (let i = 0; i < row.length; i++) {
  if (row[i]?.stitchId && !row[i]?.isSpanChild) {
    existingStitches.push({ col: i, stitchId: row[i].stitchId! });
  }
}

const textStitchCount = parsed.cells.length;
const existingCount = existingStitches.length;
const newCount = textStitchCount - existingCount;

// Step 2: 如果没有新增针法，跳过这行
if (newCount <= 0) return;
```

如果 `textStitchCount` = 19 且 `existingCount` = 10，那么 `newCount` = 9，算法会继续执行。

```typescript
// Step 4a: 计算前缀匹配长度
let prefixLen = 0;
const minCount = Math.min(existingCount, textStitchCount);
while (
  prefixLen < minCount &&
  existingStitches[prefixLen].stitchId === parsed.cells[prefixLen].stitchId
) {
  prefixLen++;
}
```

如果现有行有 "6 no, 4 ssk"（10 个针法），新文本有 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"（19 个针法），那么前缀匹配应该是 10（所有现有针法都匹配）。

```typescript
// Step 4b: 计算后缀匹配长度
let suffixLen = 0;
while (
  suffixLen < minCount - prefixLen &&
  existingStitches[existingCount - 1 - suffixLen].stitchId ===
    parsed.cells[textStitchCount - 1 - suffixLen].stitchId
) {
  suffixLen++;
}
```

由于 `minCount - prefixLen` = 10 - 10 = 0，循环不会执行，`suffixLen` = 0。

```typescript
// Step 4c: 确定清除起点
let clearStartCol: number;
if (prefixLen > 0) {
  const lastPrefix = existingStitches[prefixLen - 1];
  const lastPrefixSpanW = stitchRegistry[lastPrefix.stitchId]?.span?.width || 1;
  clearStartCol = lastPrefix.col + lastPrefixSpanW;
} else {
  clearStartCol = existingStitches.length > 0 ? existingStitches[0].col : 0;
}
```

如果最后一个前缀针法是第 4 个 ssk，位于列 18（假设），且 ssk 的 span width = 2，那么 `clearStartCol` = 18 + 2 = 20。

```typescript
// Step 4d: 清除 clearStartCol 之后的所有单元格
for (let i = clearStartCol; i < row.length; i++) {
  row[i] = {} as CellData;
}
```

这会清除从列 20 开始的所有单元格。

```typescript
// Step 4e: 放置新针法
let currentCol = clearStartCol;
for (let i = prefixLen; i < textStitchCount; i++) {
  const cell = parsed.cells[i];
  const stitchId = cell.stitchId!;
  const spanW = stitchRegistry[stitchId]?.span?.width || 1;

  // 放置主节点
  if (currentCol >= 0 && currentCol < maxColsFromText) {
    newGrid[gridRowIndex][currentCol] = {
      ...cell,
      svgPath: stitchRegistry[stitchId]?.svgPath || '',
      isSpanChild: false,
      parentPos: undefined,
    };
  }

  // 放置跨格子节点
  for (let k = 1; k < spanW; k++) {
    const childCol = currentCol + k;
    if (childCol >= 0 && childCol < maxColsFromText) {
      newGrid[gridRowIndex][childCol] = {
        char: '',
        svgPath: '',
        stitchId,
        isSpanChild: true,
        parentPos: { row: gridRowIndex, col: currentCol },
      };
    }
  }
  currentCol += spanW;
}
```

这会从列 20 开始放置 9 个 p 针法。

这看起来是正确的。所以智能 diff 算法本身应该没有问题。

那么问题一定出在其他地方。也许是 parser 没有正确解析文本，或者是验证消息显示错误。

让我添加调试日志来查看实际发生了什么。

实际上，我刚刚意识到我应该先检查验证消息的来源。也许验证消息不是来自 `parseTextToGrid`，而是来自其他地方。

```json
}
```

```json
D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\utils\translator.ts:217:      message = `ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`;
```

OK so the validation message is only in translator.ts line 217. The format is `ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`

If stitchCount = 23 and cols = 40, delta = -17, and the message should be "17 针空白".

我发现问题了！让我仔细分析截图中的关键线索。

**核心问题：验证消息显示 "34 针空白"，这意味着 stitchCount = 6（40 - 34 = 6），而不是预期的 23。**

这说明 `parseTextToGrid` 只解析出了 6 个 "no" 针法，而 "4 ssk" 和 "9p" 没有被正确解析。

但等等，"ssk" 和 "p" 都在 stitchRegistry 中，所以标签查找应该能成功。让我重新思考...

啊！我突然意识到一个关键点：**验证消息的格式不对！**

代码中验证消息应该是 `"️ 这行排布后画布剩余 X 针空白。"`，但截图中显示的是 `"Row 5: 1这行排布后画布剩余 34 针空白。"`

这个 "Row 5: 1" 前缀说明验证消息不是来自 `parseTextToGrid`，而是来自 UI 层的某个地方。而且 "1" 可能是某种索引或标识符。

更重要的是：**如果 stitchCount = 23 且 cols = 40，delta 应该是 -17，消息应该是 "17 针空白"，而不是 "34 针空白"。**

"34 针空白" 意味着 delta = -34，即 stitchCount = 6。这确认了 parser 只产生了 6 个单元格。

但为什么？文本是 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"，应该产生 19 个单元格。

让我检查是否有其他问题。也许问题不在 parser，而在 `applyTextToGrid` 函数本身。让我重新审视智能 diff 算法的逻辑。

等等，我刚刚意识到一个更严重的问题：**当 grid 扩展时，`newGrid` 被重新赋值为新的数组，但 `rowsInGrid` 仍然是旧的行数！**

看这段代码：
```typescript
let newGrid: CellData[][] = cloneGrid(currentGrid);

if (maxColsFromText > colsInGrid) {
  const addedCols = maxColsFromText - colsInGrid;
  const emptyCols = Array.from({ length: addedCols }, () => ({} as CellData));
  newGrid = newGrid.map((row) => [...emptyCols, ...row]);
  // ...
}

parsedRows.forEach((parsed: any) => {
  const gridRowIndex = gridRowFromDisplayRow(parsed.rowNumber, rowsInGrid, project.rowNumberDirection);
  if (gridRowIndex < 0 || gridRowIndex >= rowsInGrid) return;
  // ...
});
```

这里 `rowsInGrid` 是在扩展之前计算的，所以它仍然是旧的值。但 grid 扩展只是增加了列数，行数没有变化，所以这应该没问题。

让我再仔细看看...

哦！我发现了真正的问题！**当 grid 扩展时，`newGrid` 被重新赋值，但 `row` 变量是在扩展之后从 `newGrid` 中获取的，所以它应该指向正确的行。**

但是，等等。让我再仔细看看扩展逻辑：

```typescript
newGrid = newGrid.map((row) => [...emptyCols, ...row]);
```

这会创建新的行数组，每个新行是 `[...emptyCols, ...oldRow]`。所以 `newGrid[gridRowIndex]` 应该是一个新的数组，包含 prepend 的空列和旧的行数据。

然后 `const row = newGrid[gridRowIndex];` 会获取这个新行的引用。对 `row[i]` 的修改应该会反映在 `newGrid[gridRowIndex][i]` 中。

这看起来是正确的。

所以 parser 只产生了 6 个单元格。这只能意味着 parser 没有正确解析 "4 ssk" 和 "9p"。

但首先，让我再仔细想想。验证消息说 "34 针空白"，这意味着 stitchCount = 6。但如果 parser 产生了 19 个单元格，stitchCount 应该是 23。

2. stitchCount 计算错误
3. 验证消息显示错误

让我检查选项 2。stitchCount 是这样计算的：
```typescript
stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
```

对于 "6 no"：stitchCount += 6 * 1 = 6
对于 "4 ssk"：stitchCount += 4 * 2 = 8
对于 "9p"：stitchCount += 9 * 1 = 9

总计：23

这应该是正确的。

所以问题一定是 parser 没有产生 "4 ssk" 和 "9p" 的单元格。

但为什么？文本是 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"，应该被正确解析。

除非... **文本中有什么特殊字符或格式问题？**

但指令映射显示了完整的文本，所以这不太可能。

实际上，我刚刚想到另一个可能性：**也许问题在于 `applyTextToGrid` 函数中的智能 diff 算法有 bug，导致它清除了整个行而不是只清除部分行。**

让我重新审视智能 diff 算法的逻辑。

```typescript
// Step 1: 提取当前行已有的针法序列
const existingStitches: Array<{ col: number; stitchId: string }> = [];
for (let i = 0; i < row.length; i++) {
  if (row[i]?.stitchId && !row[i]?.isSpanChild) {
    existingStitches.push({ col: i, stitchId: row[i].stitchId! });
  }
}

const textStitchCount = parsed.cells.length;
const existingCount = existingStitches.length;
const newCount = textStitchCount - existingCount;

// Step 2: 如果没有新增针法，跳过这行
if (newCount <= 0) return;
```

如果 `textStitchCount` = 19 且 `existingCount` = 10，那么 `newCount` = 9，算法会继续执行。

```typescript
// Step 4a: 计算前缀匹配长度
let prefixLen = 0;
const minCount = Math.min(existingCount, textStitchCount);
while (
  prefixLen < minCount &&
  existingStitches[prefixLen].stitchId === parsed.cells[prefixLen].stitchId
) {
  prefixLen++;
}
```

如果现有行有 "6 no, 4 ssk"（10 个针法），新文本有 "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p"（19 个针法），那么前缀匹配应该是 10（所有现有针法都匹配）。

```typescript
// Step 4b: 计算后缀匹配长度
let suffixLen = 0;
while (
  suffixLen < minCount - prefixLen &&
  existingStitches[existingCount - 1 - suffixLen].stitchId ===
    parsed.cells[textStitchCount - 1 - suffixLen].stitchId
) {
  suffixLen++;
}
```

由于 `minCount - prefixLen` = 10 - 10 = 0，循环不会执行，`suffixLen` = 0。

```typescript
// Step 4c: 确定清除起点
let clearStartCol: number;
if (prefixLen > 0) {
  const lastPrefix = existingStitches[prefixLen - 1];
  const lastPrefixSpanW = stitchRegistry[lastPrefix.stitchId]?.span?.width || 1;
  clearStartCol = lastPrefix.col + lastPrefixSpanW;
} else {
  clearStartCol = existingStitches.length > 0 ? existingStitches[0].col : 0;
}
```

如果最后一个前缀针法是第 4 个 ssk，位于列 18（假设），且 ssk 的 span width = 2，那么 `clearStartCol` = 18 + 2 = 20。

```typescript
// Step 4d: 清除 clearStartCol 之后的所有单元格
for (let i = clearStartCol; i < row.length; i++) {
  row[i] = {} as CellData;
}
```

这会清除从列 20 开始的所有单元格。

```typescript
// Step 4e: 放置新针法
let currentCol = clearStartCol;
for (let i = prefixLen; i < textStitchCount; i++) {
  const cell = parsed.cells[i];
  const stitchId = cell.stitchId!;
  const spanW = stitchRegistry[stitchId]?.span?.width || 1;

  // 放置主节点
  if (currentCol >= 0 && currentCol < maxColsFromText) {
    newGrid[gridRowIndex][currentCol] = {
      ...cell,
      svgPath: stitchRegistry[stitchId]?.svgPath || '',
      isSpanChild: false,
      parentPos: undefined,
    };
  }

  // 放置跨格子节点
  for (let k = 1; k < spanW; k++) {
    const childCol = currentCol + k;
    if (childCol >= 0 && childCol < maxColsFromText) {
      newGrid[gridRowIndex][childCol] = {
        char: '',
        svgPath: '',
        stitchId,
        isSpanChild: true,
        parentPos: { row: gridRowIndex, col: currentCol },
      };
    }
  }
  currentCol += spanW;
}
```

这会从列 20 开始放置 9 个 p 针法。

这看起来是正确的。所以智能 diff 算法本身应该没有问题。

那么问题一定出在其他地方。也许是 parser 没有正确解析文本，或者是验证消息显示错误。

#### Thinking

Now I can see the bug clearly! Let me trace through the logic for the user's scenario:

**Initial state of Row 5**: "6 no, 4 ssk" → 6 no-stitch cells + 4 ssk cells (each ssk has span.width=2, so 4*2=8 columns) = 14 columns total used.

**New text**: "Row 5: 6 no, 4 ssk, 9p." → 6 no-stitch + 4 ssk + 9 p-purl = 6 + 4 + 9 = 19 cells (parsed.cells.length = 19)
 
Now stepping through the algorithm: the existing stitches array has 10 entries (6 no-stitch at columns 0-5, then 4 ssk at columns 6, 8, 10, 12 since each ssk spans 2 columns), and I need to compare this against the 19 cells from the parsed text to figure out where the mismatch occurs.

The prefix matches perfectly for the first 10 stitches, but then I'm trying to match a suffix of length 0 against a suffix of length 9 from the parsed cells, which fails immediately since there's nothing to compare.

With no suffix match, the clear operation starts at column 14 (after the last prefix stitch), wiping everything from there onward. Then I'm placing the 9 new p-purl stitches starting at column 14, each taking up 1 column, so they fill columns 14 through 22. This should work correctly, but something's still off.

Let me trace through the logic more carefully. The early return only triggers if `newCount <= 0`, and with 19 text stitches versus 10 existing ones, that's 9 new stitches, so we proceed. But I need to verify what `maxColsFromText` actually is and how it's being used in the placement condition.

Looking at the validation output, the parser is only producing 6 cells total instead of 19, which suggests it's stopping after parsing just the "6 no" segment and ignoring the "4 ssk" and "9p" parts. Let me examine the parser logic to see where it's breaking down.

Tracing through the regex matching for each segment...

For "4 ssk", the regex captures "4" as the count and "ssk" as the label, giving me 4 cells with the ssk stitch ID. Then "9p" matches with "9" as count and "p" as label, producing 9 purl cells. That's 6 + 4 + 9 = 19 cells total, which seems right. But the validation message shows "34 针空白" (34 stitches blank), which would mean only 6 cells were placed if the grid has 40 columns. Something's off with how the validation is calculating the remaining space.

Looking at the actual validation message in the screenshot, it shows "Row 5: 1这行排布后画布剩余 34 针空白" — the "1" before the Chinese text is suspicious. The validation code should produce a message starting with the info emoji, but instead there's a "1" there. This suggests the message format might be getting constructed differently than I expected, or the UI is concatenating the row number with the validation message in an unexpected way.

Let me trace through what's actually happening. The delta calculation shows 34 empty stitches, which means only 6 cells were placed (40 - 34 = 6). If the parser is working correctly and producing 19 cells total, then something in the placement logic must be stopping early or only placing the first segment. I need to look more carefully at how the parsed cells are being applied to the grid. I'm tracing through the column calculations again—after clearing from column 14 onward and placing the 9 p-purl stitches, they should occupy columns 14 through 22, which fits within the 40-column grid. But the user is reporting the entire row is empty, not just missing the new stitches, which suggests something's wiping out the existing stitches too. Let me reconsider what could cause that kind of wholesale clearing.

Looking at the validation message more carefully—it shows stitchCount = 6, which matches only the first segment of "6 no, 4 ssk, 9p". This makes me wonder if the parser is somehow only capturing the first instruction instead of all three, or if the text being passed to the parser is getting truncated somewhere before it even reaches parseTextToGrid. I'm tracing through the regex matching for "9p." — the non-greedy quantifier captures just "p" before the optional period matches, so it should correctly extract the stitch type. But I'm realizing the real issue might be in how `applyTextToGrid` calculates `maxColsFromText` across all parsed rows, since that determines the grid dimensions being allocated.

Let me actually run the test to see what's happening, and I should also check whether the smart diff logic is properly handling the span children when it's comparing existing stitches against the parsed cells — the existing stitches list skips over span children, but the parsed cells include them, so there might be a mismatch in how they're being compared.

Actually, I think I found the issue. When calculating `newCount`, the code compares the total number of parsed cells against the count of existing root stitches, which should give a positive number and allow the placement to proceed. But then when placing the stitches, there's a boundary check against `maxColsFromText` that might be preventing the new stitches from being placed if that value is too small.
```json
Here is my thorough analysis of the `applyTextToGrid` call chain and the text editor system.

---

## 1. What triggers `applyTextToGrid`

There is exactly **one call site** in the entire codebase:

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\components\TextEditor\TextEditor.tsx`, line 95

The trigger is a **manual button click** -- the user clicks the "应用到画布" (Apply to Canvas) button (line 163). This calls `handleApply`, which:

1. Splits both `originalText` (the text captured when edit mode was entered) and `editText` (the current editor content) into lines.
2. Builds a map of `rowNumber -> line text` from the original.
3. Computes a **diff** -- only lines that are new or changed compared to the original are collected into `changedLines`.
4. If there are changed lines, calls `applyTextToGrid(changedLines.join('\n'))`.

This is **not** auto-sync. It is a deliberate user action. The flow is:
- User clicks "编辑" button -> enters edit mode -> `compileGridToText` produces the initial editor content and saves it as `originalText`.
- User edits in the CodeMirror editor.
- User clicks "应用到画布" -> `handleApply` diffs and sends only changed rows.

---

## 2. What text is passed -- full content or just modified rows?

**Only the modified/new rows are passed**, not the full editor content.

In `handleApply` (TextEditor.tsx lines 70-96):
- `originalLines` are parsed from `originalText` (snapshot taken at edit-mode entry).
- `editedLines` are parsed from `editText` (current editor content).
- For each edited line matching `Row N:`, it checks whether the original had the same row number with identical text.
- Only lines that are **new** (no original for that row number) or **different** (text changed) are pushed into `changedLines`.
- The final call is `applyTextToGrid(changedLines.join('\n'))` -- a string containing only the changed rows, each in the format `Row N: 3 k, 2 p.`

Inside `applyTextToGrid` in the store (`projectStore.ts` line 925 onward):
- The passed text is fed to `parseTextToGrid(text, colsInGrid)` from `translator.ts`.
- `parseTextToGrid` splits by newlines, parses each `Row N: ...` line, and returns `ParsedRowResult[]`.
- The store then uses a **diff + overlay** strategy: it clones the current grid, and for each parsed row, performs prefix/suffix matching against existing stitches in that row to minimize changes (lines 986-1081).

---

## 3. How validation results are displayed in the UI

**Validation is produced in** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\utils\translator.ts`, function `parseTextToGrid` (line 152).

For each parsed row, a `ValidationResult` is computed:
- `valid`: `true` if `stitchCount <= cols` (the row's stitches don't exceed grid width).
- `delta`: `stitchCount - cols` (positive means overflow, negative means leftover space).
- `message`: A human-readable string:
  - `"✅ 解析成功"` when delta is exactly 0.
  - `"⚠️ 这行需要 X 针，但画板宽度仅为 Y，超出了 Z 针。"` when delta > 0.
  - `"ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 Z 针空白。"` when delta < 0.

**The store saves them** at line 936: `set({ validationResults: parsedRows })`.

**The UI renders them** in `TextEditor.tsx` lines 170-191. When `validationResults.length > 0`, a `<div className="validation-results">` is rendered below the editor, containing one `<div>` per row:
- Each row gets CSS class `valid` or `invalid` based on `result.validation.valid`.
- Shows `Row {rowNumber}` and the validation message.
- If `delta > 0` (row overflows), a **"扩展到 X 列"** button is shown, which calls `resizeGrid(colsInGrid + delta)` to widen the grid.

**Important behavior in the store** (lines 938-947): if any row has `valid === false`, the grid is **not** modified. The function returns early after setting `validationResults`, and the grid stays unchanged. The user must fix the overflow (or click the resize button) before the text is applied.

---

## 4. How the editor text is constructed and displayed

**Note:** This project does **not** use Monaco editor. It uses **CodeMirror 6**. The only reference to "Monaco" is a CSS `fontFamily` string.

### Text construction (grid -> text):

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\utils\translator.ts`, function `compileGridToText` (line 79).

- Iterates grid rows in order determined by `rowNumberDirection` (`row1_top` = normal, `row1_bottom` = reversed).
- For each row, odd rows (RS/right side) are read right-to-left, even rows (WS/wrong side) left-to-right.
- Cells with `isSpanChild` are skipped.
- Consecutive identical stitches are aggregated (e.g., `k, k, k` becomes `3 k`).
- Output format: `Row 1: 3 k, 2 p.` per line.
- Locale (`abbr`, `en`, `zh`) controls which label is used via `resolveDisplayLabel`.

### Editor component:

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\components\TextEditor\KnitCodeEditor.tsx`

- Wraps CodeMirror 6 with `EditorState.create`.
- Extensions: line numbers, active line highlight, custom `knitLanguage` (stream-based syntax highlighting), and autocompletion from `stitchRegistry`.
- On `docChanged`, calls `onChange(update.state.doc.toString())` which updates `editText` state in the parent.
- Initial value is set once on mount; subsequent external `value` prop changes are ignored (guarded by `isInitialSet` ref).

### Language support:

**File:** `D:\aaa-llx\MyKinttingDesign\MyKinttingDesignApp\src\utils\knitLang.ts`

- `knitLanguage`: a `StreamLanguage` that tokenizes `Row N:` as keyword, numbers as number, punctuation, English abbreviations as variableName, and Chinese characters as string.
- `buildCompletionSource`: builds autocomplete options from `stitchRegistry` entries (abbreviations, English names, Chinese names).

---

## Summary of all relevant files

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `src\components\TextEditor\TextEditor.tsx` | UI panel: edit toggle, apply button, validation display |
| `src\components\TextEditor\KnitCodeEditor.tsx` | CodeMirror 6 editor wrapper |
| `src\components\TextEditor\text-editor.css` | Styling for validation rows |
| `src\store\projectStore.ts` (line 925) | `applyTextToGrid` implementation: parse, validate, diff-overlay onto grid |
| `src\utils\translator.ts` | `compileGridToText` (grid->text) and `parseTextToGrid` (text->grid + validation) |
| `src\utils\knitLang.ts` | CodeMirror syntax highlighting and autocompletion |
| `src\configs\stitchRegistry.ts` | Stitch definitions used for reverse lookup and validation |

There is no `src/components/KnittingEditor/` directory in this project. The relevant editor components live under `src/components/TextEditor/`.
```

```json
1	import React, { useMemo, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
2	import { useCanvasStore } from '../../store/canvasStore';
3	import { useProjectStore } from '../../store/projectStore';
4	import { compileGridToText, type TextLocale } from '../../utils/translator';
5	import { gridRowFromDisplayRow } from '../../utils/rowNumbering';
6	import KnitCodeEditor from './KnitCodeEditor';

9	const LOCALES: Array<{ id: TextLocale; label: string }> = [
10	  { id: 'abbr', label: 'Abbr' },
11	  { id: 'en', label: 'EN' },
12	  { id: 'zh', label: '中文' },
13	];
14	
15	export const TextEditor: React.FC = () => {
16	  const {
17	    grids,
18	    currentMode,
19	    textLocale,
20	    setTextLocale,
21	    rowNumberDirection,
22	    setRowNumberDirection,
23	    applyTextToGrid,
24	    validationResults,
25	    resizeGrid,
26	  } = useProjectStore();
27	  const setHighlightedRow = useCanvasStore((state) => state.setHighlightedRow);
28	
29	  const [isEditMode, setIsEditMode] = useState(false);
30	  const [editText, setEditText] = useState('');
31	  const [originalText, setOriginalText] = useState('');
32	
33	  const currentGrid = grids[currentMode];
34	  const rowsInGrid = currentGrid.length;
35	  const colsInGrid = currentGrid[0]?.length ?? 0;
36	
37	  const instructionLines = useMemo(() => {
38	    const text = compileGridToText(currentGrid, { locale: textLocale, rowNumberDirection });
39	    return text
40	      .split('\n')
41	      .map((line) => line.trim())
42	      .filter(Boolean)
43	      .map((line) => {
44	        const rowNumber = Number(line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i)?.[1] ?? 0);
45	        return { line, rowNumber };
46	      });
47	  }, [currentGrid, rowNumberDirection, textLocale]);
48	
49	  const handleRowClick = (rowNumber: number) => {
50	    const gridRow = gridRowFromDisplayRow(rowNumber, rowsInGrid, rowNumberDirection);
51	    if (gridRow >= 0 && gridRow < rowsInGrid) {
52	      setHighlightedRow(gridRow);
53	    }
54	  };
55	
56	  // 进入编辑模式：用当前编译文本填充编辑器，并保存原始文本用于 diff
57	  const handleEnterEdit = useCallback(() => {
58	    const text = compileGridToText(currentGrid, { locale: textLocale, rowNumberDirection });
59	    setEditText(text);
60	    setOriginalText(text);
61	    setIsEditMode(true);
62	  }, [currentGrid, textLocale, rowNumberDirection]);
63	
64	  // 退出编辑模式
65	  const handleExitEdit = useCallback(() => {
66	    setIsEditMode(false);
67	  }, []);
68	
69	  // 应用文字到画布：逐行 diff，只发送变更的行
70	  const handleApply = useCallback(() => {
71	    const originalLines = originalText.split('\n').map((l) => l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
72	    const editedLines = editText.split('\n').map((l) => l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
73	
74	    // 建立原始行 Map: rowNumber → line text
75	    const originalMap = new Map<number, string>();
76	    for (const line of originalLines) {
77	      const match = line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i);
78	      if (match) originalMap.set(parseInt(match[1], 10), line);
79	    }
80	
81	    // 只保留变化的行或新增的行
82	    const changedLines: string[] = [];
83	    for (const line of editedLines) {
84	      const match = line.match(/^Row\s+(\d+):/i);
85	      if (!match) continue;
86	      const rowNum = parseInt(match[1], 10);
87	      const origLine = originalMap.get(rowNum);
88	      if (!origLine || origLine !== line) {
89	        changedLines.push(line);
90	      }
91	    }
92	
93	    if (changedLines.length === 0) return;
94	
95	    applyTextToGrid(changedLines.join('\n'));
96	  }, [editText, originalText, applyTextToGrid]);
97	
98	  // 扩展画布
99	  const handleResize = useCallback(
100	    (newCols: number) => {
101	      resizeGrid(newCols);
102	    },
103	    [resizeGrid]
104	  );
105	
106	  return (
107	    <div className="text-editor-container instruction-map-panel">
108	      <div className="text-editor-header">
109	        <div>
110	          <span className="text-editor-kicker">Instruction Map</span>
111	          <h3>指令映射</h3>
112	        </div>
113	        {!isEditMode ? (
114	          <button type="button" className="edit-toggle-btn" onClick={handleEnterEdit}>
115	            编辑
116	          </button>
117	        ) : (
118	          <button type="button" className="edit-toggle-btn exit" onClick={handleExitEdit}>
119	            退出编辑
120	          </button>
121	        )}
122	      </div>
123	
124	      <div className="text-editor-toolbar" role="group" aria-label="行号方向">
125	        <button
126	          type="button"
127	          className={rowNumberDirection === 'row1_top' ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
128	          onClick={() => setRowNumberDirection('row1_top')}
129	        >
130	          Row 1 顶部
131	        </button>
132	        <button
133	          type="button"
134	          className={rowNumberDirection === 'row1_bottom' ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
135	          onClick={() => setRowNumberDirection('row1_bottom')}
136	        >
137	          Row 1 底部
138	        </button>
139	      </div>
140	
141	      <div className="text-editor-toolbar" role="group" aria-label="文本输出语言">
142	        {LOCALES.map((locale) => (
143	          <button
144	            key={locale.id}
145	            type="button"
146	            className={textLocale === locale.id ? 'locale-chip is-active' : 'locale-chip'}
147	            onClick={() => setTextLocale(locale.id)}
148	          >
149	            {locale.label}
150	          </button>
151	        ))}
152	      </div>
153	
154	      {/* 编辑模式 */}
155	      {isEditMode ? (
156	        <div className="edit-mode-section">
157	          <KnitCodeEditor
158	            value={editText}
159	            onChange={setEditText}
160	            locale={textLocale}
161	          />
162	          <div className="edit-actions">
163	            <button type="button" className="apply-btn" onClick={handleApply}>
164	              应用到画布
165	            </button>
166	            <span className="edit-hint">格式：Row N: 数量 针法, 数量 针法.</span>
167	          </div>
168	
169	          {/* 校验结果 */}
170	          {validationResults.length > 0 && (
171	            <div className="validation-results">
172	              {validationResults.map((result, index) => (
173	                <div
174	                  key={index}
175	                  className={`validation-row ${result.validation.valid ? 'valid' : 'invalid'}`}
176	                >
177	                  <span className="validation-row-num">Row {result.rowNumber}</span>
178	                  <span className="validation-message">{result.validation.message}</span>
179	                  {result.validation.delta > 0 && (
180	                    <button
181	                      type="button"
182	                      className="resize-btn"
183	                      onClick={() => handleResize(colsInGrid + result.validation.delta)}
184	                    >
185	                      扩展到 {colsInGrid + result.validation.delta} 列
186	                    </button>
187	                  )}
188	                </div>
189	              ))}
190	            </div>
191	          )}
192	        </div>
193	      ) : (
194	        /* 只读映射模式（原有逻辑，完全不变） */
195	        <div className="instruction-map-list" aria-label="只读指令映射">
196	          {instructionLines.length ? (
197	            instructionLines.map(({ line, rowNumber }) => (
198	              <button
199	                key={`${rowNumber}-${line}`}
200	                type="button"
201	                className="instruction-map-row"
202	                onClick={() => handleRowClick(rowNumber)}
203	              >
204	                {line}
205	              </button>
206	            ))
207	          ) : (
208	            <p className="instruction-map-empty">画布中暂无可映射的针法。</p>
209	          )}
210	        </div>
211	      )}
212	    </div>
213	  );
214	};
215
```

```json
920	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];

929	
930	          const currentGrid = project.grids[project.currentMode];

935

937

940	          if (hasInvalidRows) {
941	            if (text.trim() === '') {
942	              updateActiveProject(() => ({ description: '' }));
943	            } else {
944	              get().compileToText(); 
945	            }
946	            return parsedRows; 
947	          }
948	
949	          _saveSnapshot(); 
950	
951	          let maxColsFromText = colsInGrid;
952	          parsedRows.forEach((pRow: any) => {
953	            if (pRow.validation.delta > 0) {
954	              maxColsFromText = Math.max(maxColsFromText, colsInGrid + pRow.validation.delta);
955	            }
956	          });
957	
958	          if (rowsInGrid === 0 || text.trim() === '') {
959	            const emptyGrid = createEmptyGrid(rowsInGrid, maxColsFromText);
960	            updateActiveProject(() => ({ grids: { ...project.grids, [project.currentMode]: emptyGrid }, description: '' }));
961	            return parsedRows;
962	          }
963

966	          // 2. 对要修改的行，不清空整行，而是检测现有针法位置作为锚点
```

```json
1	import { stitchRegistry } from '../configs/stitchRegistry';
2	import { CellData } from '../store/projectStore';
3	import { displayRowNumber, type RowNumberDirection } from './rowNumbering';
4	
5	export interface ValidationResult {
6	  valid: boolean;
7	  delta: number;
8	  message: string;
9	}
10	
11	export type TextLocale = 'abbr' | 'en' | 'zh';
12	
13	export interface CompileOptions {
14	  locale?: TextLocale;
15	  rowNumberDirection?: RowNumberDirection;
16	}
17	
18	export interface ParsedRowResult {
19	  rowNumber: number;
20	  cells: CellData[];
21	  validation: ValidationResult;
22	}
23	
24	/**
25	 * 提取连续相同的针法并聚合
26	 */
27	function aggregateStitches(instructions: string[]): string[] {
28	  const aggregated: string[] = [];
29	  let currentStitch = '';
30	  let count = 0;
31	
32	  const flush = () => {
33	    if (count > 0) {
34	      aggregated.push(count === 1 ? currentStitch : `${count} ${currentStitch}`);
35	    }
36	  };
37	
38	  for (const inst of instructions) {
39	    if (inst === currentStitch) {
40	      count++;
41	    } else {
42	      flush();
43	      currentStitch = inst;
44	      count = 1;
45	    }
46	  }
47	  flush();
48	
49	  return aggregated;
50	}
51	
52	function normalizeLabel(label: string) {
53	  return label.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ').toLowerCase();
54	}
55	
56	function resolveDisplayLabel(stitchId: string, locale: TextLocale, isEvenRow: boolean) {
57	  const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[stitchId];
58	  if (!stitchDef) {
59	    return stitchId;
60	  }
61	
62	  const resolvedId = isEvenRow && stitchDef.wsStitchId ? stitchDef.wsStitchId : stitchId;
63	  const resolvedDef = stitchRegistry[resolvedId] ?? stitchDef;
64	
65	  if (locale === 'zh') {
66	    return resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
67	  }
68	
69	  if (locale === 'en') {
70	    return resolvedDef.nameEn ?? stitchDef.nameEn ?? resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
71	  }
72	
73	  return resolvedDef.abbrev ?? stitchDef.abbrev ?? resolvedDef.nameEn ?? resolvedDef.nameZh ?? stitchId;
74	}
75	
76	/**
77	 * 将二维网格编译为自然语言文字说明
78	 */
79	export function compileGridToText(grid: CellData[][], options: CompileOptions = {}): string {
80	  if (!grid || grid.length === 0) return '';
81	  
82	  const locale = options.locale ?? 'abbr';
83	  const rowNumberDirection = options.rowNumberDirection ?? 'row1_top';
84	  const textLines: string[] = [];
85	  const rows = grid.length;
86	  const cols = grid[0].length;
87	
88	  const rowIndices =
89	    rowNumberDirection === 'row1_top'
90	      ? Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) => row)
91	      : Array.from({ length: rows }, (_, row) => rows - 1 - row);
92	
93	  for (const r of rowIndices) {
94	    const rowNumber = displayRowNumber(r, rows, rowNumberDirection);
95	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
96	    
97	    // 奇数行（正面 RS）从右向左读图；偶数行（反面 WS）从左向右读图
98	    let colIndices = Array.from({ length: cols }, (_, i) => i);
99	    if (!isEvenRow) {
100	      colIndices = colIndices.reverse();
101	    }
102	    
103	    const rowRawInstructions: string[] = [];
104	    let hasStitchInRow = false;
105	    
106	    for (const c of colIndices) {
107	      const cell = grid[r][c];
108	      
109	      // 跳过没有对应源针法的格子（或是跨格的子节点。因为跨格的主节点通常是在左上或者自身）
110	      // TODO: 此处我们简化，只要是 isSpanChild 就跳过，让 root 单独报告
111	      if (cell.isSpanChild) continue;
112	      
113	      if (!cell.stitchId) {
114	        continue;
115	      }
116	      hasStitchInRow = true;
117	      
118	      const stitchDef = stitchRegistry[cell.stitchId];
119	      if (!stitchDef) continue;
120	      
121	      const displayLabel = resolveDisplayLabel(cell.stitchId, locale, isEvenRow);
122	      
123	      // 针对部分多列针法，比如 c4f 需要占用的针数，这里仅简单视作一个整体指令
124	      rowRawInstructions.push(displayLabel);
125	    }
126	    
127	    if (hasStitchInRow) {
128	      const merged = aggregateStitches(rowRawInstructions);
129	      textLines.push(`Row ${rowNumber}: ${merged.join(', ')}.`);
130	    }
131	  }
132	  
133	  return textLines.join('\n');
134	}
135	
136	/**
137	 * 建立反向字典表，用于将简写映射回 stitchId
138	 */
139	const abbrevToStitchId: Record<string, string> = {};
140	const labelToStitchId: Record<string, string> = {};
141	Object.values(stitchRegistry).forEach(def => {
142	  // 这里我们直接映射为图解符号，因此都是正面视角 (RS) 的原始符号 ID
143	  if (def.abbrev) abbrevToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.abbrev)] = def.id;
144	  if (def.nameEn) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameEn)] = def.id;
145	  if (def.nameZh) labelToStitchId[normalizeLabel(def.nameZh)] = def.id;
146	});
147	
148	/**
149	 * 解析用户输入的自然语言，转换为对应这行的 Grid Cell 结构。
150	 * Demo 版核心链路：按行解析如 "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p"
151	 */
152	export function parseTextToGrid(text: string, cols: number): ParsedRowResult[] {
153	  const results: ParsedRowResult[] = [];
154	  const lines = text.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim() !== '');
155	  
156	  // Row 匹配正则，例如: "Row 1: 3 k, 2 p." / "Row 1: 3 knit, 2 purl."
157	  const rowRegex = /Row\s+(\d+):(.+)/i;
158	  
159	  for (const line of lines) {
160	    const rowMatch = line.match(rowRegex);
161	    if (!rowMatch) continue;
162	    
163	    const rowNumber = parseInt(rowMatch[1], 10);
164	    const instructionsPart = rowMatch[2];
165	    
166	    // 正面行（奇数行），从右往左布置
167	    // 反面行（偶数行），从左往右布置
168	    const isEvenRow = rowNumber % 2 === 0;
169	    
170	    const cells: CellData[] = [];
171	    let stitchCount = 0; // 这行指令要求的总格子数
172	    
173	    const instructionSegments = instructionsPart.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
174	    for (const segment of instructionSegments) {
175	      const segmentMatch = segment.match(/^(?:(\d+)\s*)?(.+?)\.?$/);
176	      if (!segmentMatch) continue;
177	
178	      const count = segmentMatch[1] ? parseInt(segmentMatch[1], 10) : 1;
179	      const rawLabel = segmentMatch[2].trim();
180	      const normalizedLabel = normalizeLabel(rawLabel);
181	      
182	      // 查反向映射
183	      let targetStitchId = abbrevToStitchId[normalizedLabel] ?? labelToStitchId[normalizedLabel];
184	      
185	      if (!targetStitchId) {
186	        // 如果找不到，直接跳过或者记录个 warning，这里暂跳过
187	        continue;
188	      }
189	      
190	      // 反面行的输入需要反转回去以作为图解在界面上显示。由于图解永远是正面的。
191	      // 如果输入文本说反面(Even Row)要织 p，意味着我们在图纸上它是 k-knit。
192	      if (isEvenRow) {
193	        const potentialTargetStr = Object.values(stitchRegistry).find(
194	          def => def.wsStitchId === targetStitchId
195	        )?.id;
196	        if (potentialTargetStr) targetStitchId = potentialTargetStr;
197	      }
198	      
199	      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
200	        cells.push({
201	          char: '',
202	          stitchId: targetStitchId
203	        });
204	        
205	        // 简单计算一下针法跨格 (复杂多格针法例如 c4f 可能需要在渲染端另作补全，这里暂按占用首格算)
206	        stitchCount += (stitchRegistry[targetStitchId]?.span?.width || 1);
207	      }
208	    }
209	    
210	    // 柔性校验
211	    let delta = stitchCount - cols;
212	    let valid = delta <= 0; // 只要没超出列宽就算有效，或者你也可以设为严格等于
213	    let message = '✅ 解析成功';
214	    if (delta > 0) {
215	      message = `⚠️ 这行需要 ${stitchCount} 针，但画板宽度仅为 ${cols}，超出了 ${delta} 针。`;
216	    } else if (delta < 0) {
217	      message = `ℹ️ 这行排布后画布剩余 ${Math.abs(delta)} 针空白。`;
218	    }
219	    
220	    results.push({
221	      rowNumber,
222	      cells,
223	      validation: { valid, delta, message }
224	    });
225	  }
226	  
227	  return results;
228	}
229	
```

```json
970	          // 如果需要扩展列数，向左扩展（prepend 空单元格，原有数据右移）
971	          if (maxColsFromText > colsInGrid) {

973	            const emptyCols = Array.from({ length: addedCols }, () => ({} as CellData));
974	            newGrid = newGrid.map((row) => [...emptyCols, ...row]);
975

978	              for (const cell of row) {
```
